question: What are the "en" methods with solutions from repository "1093"
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.id FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.RepoId = 1093 AND T2.Lang = 'en'

question: What is the solution path for method number 3?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Id = 3

question: How many XML format does the github address "https://github.com/dogeth/vss2git.git" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.CommentIsXml) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId INNER JOIN Method AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.SolutionId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/dogeth/vss2git.git' AND T3.CommentIsXml = 1

question: Show the solution path for the method "Mosa.Platform.x86.Instructions.IMul.EmitLegacy"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'Mosa.Platform.x86.Instructions.IMul.EmitLegacy'

question: Give the repository Url of the one with most solutions.
original_query: SELECT T1.Url FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId GROUP BY T2.RepoId ORDER BY COUNT(T2.RepoId) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List 5 solution path that has sampling time of 636431758961741000.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.SampledAt = 636431758961741000 LIMIT 5

question: Please provide the path of solution of method whose tokenized name is html parser feed.
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.NameTokenized = 'html parser feed'

question: How many solution path does the repository with 111 stars, 58 forks, and 111 watchers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Path) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = 111 AND T1.Forks = 58 AND T1.Watchers = 111

question: What's the task of the method whose tokenized name is "html parser feed"?
original_query: SELECT SUBSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), '.') - 1) task FROM Method WHERE NameTokenized = 'html parser feed'

question: Which method has the summary "Write a command to the log"?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Method WHERE Summary = 'Write a command to the log'

question: How many followers do the most followed repository on Github have? Give the github address of the repository.
original_query: SELECT Forks, Url FROM Repo WHERE Forks = ( SELECT MAX(Forks) FROM Repo )

question: How many more stars in percentage are there for the repository of solution "1" than solution "2"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 1 THEN T1.Stars ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 2 THEN T1.Stars ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 2 THEN T1.Stars ELSE 0 END) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId

question: Please provide the id of the solution whose repository has the most watchers.
original_query: SELECT T2.Id FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Watchers = ( SELECT MAX(Watchers) FROM Repo )

question: What is the repository number for the solution of method "SCore.Poisson.ngtIndex"?

question: What is the url of solution 1?

question: How many path does the github address "https://github.com/jeffdik/tachy.git" have?

question: Among the repositories with over 200 likes, how many of them have files contained by solutions with a processed time of under 636439500080712000?

question: List all the methods with a solution with a "636449700980488000" processed time.

question: How many percent more of the Forks for the repository of solution No.53546 than No.1502?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 53546 THEN T1.Forks ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 1502 THEN T1.Forks ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 1502 THEN T1.Forks ELSE 0 END) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId

question: List the summary of the method "Castle.MonoRail.Framework.Test.StubViewComponentContext.RenderSection".

question: For the repository which got '189' Stars, how many solutions which needs to be compiled does it contain?

question: Which solution contains files within a more popular repository, the solution ID18 or solution ID19?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 18 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 19 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) THEN 'SolutionID18' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 18 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 19 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) THEN 'SolutionID19' END isMorePopular FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId

question: In the "https://github.com/wallerdev/htmlsharp.git", give all the linearized sequenced of API calls.
original_query: SELECT T3.ApiCalls FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId INNER JOIN Method AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.SolutionId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/wallerdev/htmlsharp.git'

question: How many more followers in percentage are there for the repository used by solution ID 18 than solution ID19?

"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), '.') - 1) task FROM Method WHERE NameTokenized = 'string extensions to pascal case'

question: Please list the IDs of the solutions that contain files within the top 3 followed repositories.
original_query: SELECT T2.Id FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId ORDER BY T1.Forks DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the percentage of the methods' solutions that need to be compiled among the methods whose comments is XML format?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.WasCompiled = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.SolutionId) FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.CommentIsXml = 1

question: For the repository which got '8094' Stars, how many solutions does it contain?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = 8094

question: Give the number of watchers that the repository of the solution No. 338082 have.
original_query: SELECT T1.Watchers FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T2.Id = 338082

question: How many solution paths are there inside the 2nd most popular repository?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Path) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Watchers = ( SELECT Watchers FROM Repo ORDER BY Watchers DESC LIMIT 1, 1 )

question: How much is the processed time of the method whose tokenized name is "about box1 dispose"? Indicate the language of the method.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ProcessedTime, T2.Lang FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.NameTokenized = 'about box1 dispose'

question: Please provide a link to the most well-known repository's Github address.
original_query: SELECT Url FROM Repo WHERE Watchers = ( SELECT MAX(Watchers) FROM Repo )

question: Please list all display names of users who are adults.
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65

question: Which post by slashnick has the most answers count? State the post ID.
original_query: SELECT T2.PostId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'slashnick' ORDER BY T3.AnswerCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total score of the posts edited by Yevgeny and include the user's website URL.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Score), T2.WebsiteUrl FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.LastEditorUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny' GROUP BY T2.WebsiteUrl

question: What is the badge name that user 'SilentGhost' obtained?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'SilentGhost'

question: How many positive comments are there on the list?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM comments WHERE score > 60

question: How many users with more than 10 views created their account after the year 2013?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) > '2013' AND Views > 10

question: Under the vote type of 8, provide the display names and websites URLs of the user who got the highest bounty amount.
original_query: SELECT DisplayName, WebsiteUrl FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT UserId FROM votes WHERE VoteTypeId = 8 ORDER BY BountyAmount DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the percentage of posts whose owners had a reputation of over 1000 in 2011?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', T2.CreaionDate) = '2011' AND T1.Reputation > 1000, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId

question: How long did it take the user, known by his or her display name 'Zolomon' to get the badge? Count from the date the user's account was created.
original_query: SELECT T1.Date - T2.CreationDate FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Zolomon'

question: For the post that got the most number of answers owned by csgillespie, how many answers did it get?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T1.AnswerCount) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: What are the name of badges that users who have the lowest reputation obtained?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Reputation = (SELECT MIN(Reputation) FROM users)

question: Name the user that commented 'thank you user93!'
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Text = 'thank you user93!'

question: Write all comments made on the post titled 'How does gentle boosting differ from AdaBoost?'
original_query: SELECT T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'How does gentle boosting differ from AdaBoost?'

question: What is the display name of the user who acquired the highest amount of badges?
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId GROUP BY T1.DisplayName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average score of the posts owned by the user csgillespie?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Score) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: Identify the display name and location of the user, who was the last to edit the post with ID 183.
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName, T2.Location FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Id = 183 ORDER BY T1.LastEditDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among products comments with 0 score, what is the total number of users ages 40 years old?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score = 0 AND T2.Age = 40

question: Which user added a bounty amount of 50 to the post title mentioning variance?
original_query: SELECT T3.DisplayName, T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.BountyAmount = 50 AND T1.Title LIKE '%variance%'

question: How many users were awarded with 'Citizen Patrol' badge?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM badges WHERE `Name` = 'Citizen Patrol'

question: List out all post that are related to post ID 61217 and what is the popularity of this post?
original_query: SELECT T1.ViewCount FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postLinks AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T2.PostId = 61217

question: What is the reputation and view count of the user, who is known by his or her display name 'Jarrod Dixon'?
original_query: SELECT Reputation, Views FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon'

question: What is the location of the owner of the post "Eliciting priors from experts"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Location FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Eliciting priors from experts'

question: Identify the number of posts and comments left by the user, who has the latest created user account.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T3.PostId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage difference of student badges given during 2010 and 2011?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id) - CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id) FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Student'

question: Which users have the highest number of views?
original_query: SELECT Id, DisplayName FROM users WHERE Views = ( SELECT MAX(Views) FROM users )

question: Which post by Harvey Motulsky has the most views? Please give the id and title of this post.
original_query: SELECT T2.Id, T2.Title FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' ORDER BY T2.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the owner's display name of the most popular post?
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts ORDER BY ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Among the posts that were voted by user 1465, what is the id of the most valuable post?
original_query: SELECT T2.Id FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.UserId = 1465 ORDER BY T2.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which user has the website URL listed at 'http://stackoverflow.com'
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE WebsiteUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com'

question: List out the dates that users who are located in Rochester, NY obtained their badges?
original_query: SELECT T2.Date FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Location = 'Rochester, NY'

question: Among the users who obtained the "Organizer" badges, calculate the percentage of users who are teenagers.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.`Name` = 'Organizer'

question: How many users are awarded with supporter badge during year 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM badges WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' AND Name = 'Supporter'

question: What is the date when the youngest user made his or her first post?
original_query: SELECT T2.CreaionDate FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Age IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.Age, T2.CreaionDate LIMIT 1

question: How many users from India have the teacher badges?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Location = 'India' AND T1.Name = 'Teacher'

question: List out all post ID with score more than 60 and list out all the user ID that created these post.
original_query: SELECT PostId, UserId FROM postHistory WHERE PostId IN ( SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Score > 60 )

question: Indicate the creation date of the maximum number of votes.
original_query: SELECT CreationDate FROM votes GROUP BY CreationDate ORDER BY COUNT(Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title for the post which got the highest score comment?
original_query: SELECT Title FROM posts WHERE Id = ( SELECT PostId FROM comments ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the average score of Stephen Turner's posts?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Score) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Stephen Turner'

question: Among all the posts posted by the most influential user, identify the percentage with a score above 50.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users T1 INNER JOIN posts T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) AS max_reputation FROM users ) T3 ON T1.Reputation = T3.max_reputation

question: Provide the display name of the user who made the vote No.6347.
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Id = 6347

question: Which user created post ID 1 and what is the reputation of this user?
original_query: SELECT T2.Id, T2.Reputation FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.PostId = 1

question: How many users from New York have a teacher and supporter badge?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Name IN ('Supporter', 'Teacher') AND T2.Location = 'New York'

question: Provide the users' display names and available website URLs of the post with favorite count of more than 150.
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName, T1.WebsiteUrl FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.FavoriteCount > 150

question: Who is the editor of the post titled 'Open source tools for visualizing multi-dimensional data?'
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Open source tools for visualizing multi-dimensional data?'

question: Write down the related posts titles and link type IDs of the post "What are principal component scores?".
original_query: SELECT T3.Title, T2.LinkTypeId FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postLinks AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.RelatedPostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'What are principal component scores?'

question: How many adults who obtained the badge Supporter?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Supporter' AND T1.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65

question: Name 10 users with the badge name 'Necromancer.'
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Necromancer' LIMIT 10

question: Write the contents of comments with a score of 17.
original_query: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE Score = 17

question: State the name of badge that the user whose display name is "Sharpie" obtained.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Sharpie'

question: Give the total number of comments posted by user ID 13.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM comments WHERE UserId = 13

question: What is the average monthly number of links created in 2010 for posts that have no more than 2 answers?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / 12 FROM postLinks AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.AnswerCount <= 2 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2010'

question: How many users obtained the "Announcer" badge?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Announcer'

question: How many users were adult?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65

question: What is the name of badge that the user whose display name is "Pierre" obtained?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Pierre'

question: List the comments commented by the user with a username of Harvey Motulsky.
original_query: SELECT T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky'

question: Among the posts owned by csgillespie, how many of them are root posts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' AND T1.ParentId IS NULL

question: Which post has the highest score? Please give its id and title's name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Id, T2.Title FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId ORDER BY T2.Score DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the display names of all the users who owns a post that is well-finished.
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.ClosedDate IS NOT NULL

question: Identify the number of posts that offer a bounty amount over 30.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM votes WHERE BountyAmount >= 30

question: List out the age of users who located in Vienna, Austria obtained the badge?
original_query: SELECT T1.Age FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Location = 'Vienna, Austria'

question: From which post is the most popular tag excerpted from? Please give the body of the post.
original_query: SELECT Body FROM posts WHERE id = ( SELECT ExcerptPostId FROM tags ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which user has a higher reputation, Harlan or Jarrod Dixon?
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') AND Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') )

question: What is the display name of the user who has obtained the most number of badges?
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id GROUP BY T2.DisplayName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many votes did the user No.58 take on 2010/7/19?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM votes WHERE UserId = 58 AND CreationDate = '2010-07-19'

question: Count the number of posts with a tag specified as 'careers'.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM tags WHERE TagName = 'careers'

question: How many tags have post count between 5,000 to 7,000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM tags WHERE Count BETWEEN 5000 AND 7000

question: Which is the most valuable post in 2010? Please give its id and the owner's display name.
original_query: SELECT T2.OwnerUserId, T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2010' ORDER BY T2.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Write all comments made by user 'A Lion.'
original_query: SELECT T2.Text FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'A Lion'

question: What is the name of tags used by John Salvatier's?
original_query: SELECT T3.Tags FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'John Salvatier'

question: Give the texts commented on the post about linear regression.
original_query: SELECT T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Title LIKE '%linear regression%'

question: Who is the owner of the post "Eliciting priors from experts"?
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Eliciting priors from experts'

question: When did the user known as 'IrishStat' create his or her account?
original_query: SELECT CreationDate FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'IrishStat'

question: Give the number of votes for the post about data visualization.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title LIKE '%data visualization%'

question: What are the titles of the top 5 posts with the highest popularity?
original_query: SELECT Title FROM posts ORDER BY ViewCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many elders obtained the "Supporter" badge?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Age > 65 AND T2.Name = 'Supporter'

question: Which user have only one post history per post and having at least 1000 views?
original_query: SELECT T2.UserId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T3.ViewCount >= 1000 GROUP BY T2.UserId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.PostHistoryTypeId) = 1

question: Provide the text of the latest 10 comments to the post with the title 'Analysing wind data with R' and the display name of the user who left it.
original_query: SELECT T3.Text, T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.PostId WHERE T2.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R' ORDER BY T1.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 10

question: Give the only one comment text of the post with parent id 107829.
original_query: SELECT T2.Text FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.ParentId = 107829 AND T1.CommentCount = 1

question: How many negative comments were given by user ID 13?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM comments WHERE UserId = 13 AND Score < 60

question: Among the users who obtained the "Teacher" badge, calculate their percentage of users
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Teacher'

question: How many posts does the user csgillespie own?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: What is the post ID and the comments commented in the post titled by "Group differences on a five point Likert item"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Id, T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'Group differences on a five point Likert item'

question: What is the name of user with the ID of 30?
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = 30

question: User No.3025 gave a comment at 20:29:39 on 2014/4/23 to a post, how many favorite counts did that post get?
original_query: SELECT T1.FavoriteCount FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T2.CreationDate = '2014-04-23 20:29:39.0' AND T2.UserId = 3025

question: What is the score and the link type ID for post ID 395?
original_query: SELECT T1.Score, T2.LinkTypeId FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postLinks AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T2.PostId = 395

question: List all the name of users that obtained the Organizer Badges.
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.`Name` = 'Organizer'

question: What is the title of the post with the oldest post link?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postLinks AS T2 ON T2.PostId = T1.Id ORDER BY T1.CreaionDate LIMIT 1

question: Which user ID has the highest reputation?
original_query: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users )

question: How many votes were made by Harlan?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN votes AS T3 ON T3.PostId = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Harlan'

question: What is the owner user id of the most valuable post?
original_query: SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts WHERE FavoriteCount = ( SELECT MAX(FavoriteCount) FROM posts )

question: For the user with the display name of "Tiago Pasqualini", how many posts did he/she own?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Tiago Pasqualini'

question: What are the post history type IDs for post ID 3720 and how many unique users have commented on the post?
original_query: SELECT T1.PostHistoryTypeId, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) FROM comments WHERE PostId = 3720) AS NumberOfUsers FROM postHistory AS T1 WHERE T1.PostId = 3720

question: State the detailed content of the comment which was created on 7/19/2010 7:25:47 PM.
original_query: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE CreationDate = '2010-07-19 19:16:14.0'

question: What is the total value of Argentum coined traded in the past 24 hours on 2016/10/11.
original_query: SELECT T2.volume_24h FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Argentum' AND T2.date = '2016-10-11'

question: Name the coin that have higher than average percentage price changed from the previous 24 hours for transaction on 2013/6/22.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2020-06-22' GROUP BY T1.name HAVING AVG(T2.percent_change_24h) > T2.PRICE

question: How much was a Bitcoin on 2013/4/28?
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: List the names and symbols of the coins that were added on June 14, 2013.
original_query: SELECT name, symbol FROM coins WHERE date_added LIKE '2013-06-14%'

question: Name the coins that have three tags.
original_query: SELECT name FROM coins WHERE LENGTH(tag_names) - LENGTH(replace(tag_names, ',', '')) = 2

question: What is the average monthly circulating supply for Frozen in 2014.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.circulating_supply) AS REAL) / 12 FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Frozen' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '2014'

question: Had Bitcoin's price increased or decreased on 2013/5/5 compared with the price 7 days before?
original_query: SELECT (CASE WHEN T2.percent_change_7d > 0 THEN 'INCREASED' ELSE 'DECREASED' END) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-05-05' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: Which crytocurrency was not opened on 2013/5/3?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-05-03' AND T2.open IS NULL

question: List the names of coins that cannot be traded in 2014.
original_query: SELECT name FROM coins WHERE date_added LIKE '2014%' AND status = 'untracked'

question: List all the inactive coins and state the last date of its transaction?
original_query: SELECT T1.NAME, MAX(T2.DATE) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.status = 'inactive' ORDER BY T2.DATE DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the coin that has the highest market capitalization for all transactions in 2018.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date LIKE '2018%' AND T2.market_cap = ( SELECT MAX(market_cap) FROM historical WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '2018' )

question: Please list the names of coins that has been disappeared.
original_query: SELECT name FROM coins WHERE status = 'extinct'

question: Name the coin under the token category that gives the highest max profit.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.category = 'token' ORDER BY T2.high - T2.low DESC LIMIT 1

question: When is Devcoin most valuable in the market?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Devcoin' ORDER BY T2.market_cap DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the percentage of the Bitcoins verifiably burned until 2018/4/28?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(T2.max_supply) - SUM(T2.total_supply)) AS REAL) / SUM(T2.total_supply) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date < '2018-04-28' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: What is the name of the coin that creates the most total value in the past 24 hours?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.volume_24h = ( SELECT MAX(volume_24h) FROM historical )

question: State the transaction date whereby DigixDAO was transacted at the hightest price.
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'DigixDAO' ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of the crytocurrencies that have a total amount of existence of over 10000000 on 2013/4/28.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T2.total_supply > 10000000

question: What was the price of 1 Bitcoin in 2016?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.price) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Bitcoin' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '2016'

question: Which crytocurrency was traded in the highest value on 2016/1/8?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2016-01-08' AND T2.volume_24h = ( SELECT MAX(volume_24h) FROM historical WHERE date = '2016-01-08' )

question: What's the percentage of coins that is higher than the price 1 hour ago in May 29,2013? List the names of these coins.
original_query: SELECT T1.NAME FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.DATE = '2013-05-29' AND T2.percent_change_1h > 0

question: When was Lebowskis not opened?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Lebowskis' AND (T2.open IS NULL OR T2.open = 0)

question: How many times was Bytecoin traded in June 2013?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.coin_id) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Bytecoin' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T2.date) = '2013-06'

question: For all transactions for WRAP in August 2016, list the time to achieve highest price and the time to achieve the lowest price.
original_query: SELECT T2.time_high, T2.time_low, T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'WARP' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T2.date) = '2016-08'

question: What is the number of female graduates between 2011 to 2013 from the state where 'Gateway Community College' is located?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year BETWEEN 2011 AND 2013 AND T1.chronname = 'Gateway Community College' AND T2.gender = 'F'

question: In Alaska with school count of 1 from year 2011 to 2013, how many of the students are white?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.race) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T1.schools_count = 1 AND T2.year BETWEEN 2011 AND 2013 AND T2.race = 'W' AND T1.state = 'Alaska'

question: State the name and website of the institutes from the state with 209 graduate cohort in 2011.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname, T1.site FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.grad_cohort = 209

question: How many students graduated from Central Alabama Community College in 2011 in total?
original_query: SELECT T2.grad_cohort FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College' AND T2.year = 2011

question: Which institute has the highest percentage of male White students graduating in 2011 within 150 percent of normal/expected time?
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'W' AND T2.grad_150 = ( SELECT MAX(T2.grad_150) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'W' )

question: What is the average SAT value for incoming students in all of the schools located in the state with the lowest state appropriations to higher education in fiscal year 2011 per resident?
original_query: SELECT AVG(t1.med_sat_value) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON t1.state = t2.state ORDER BY t2.state_appr_value LIMIT 1

question: In total, how many Hispanic male students graduated from Amridge University?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Amridge University' AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'H'

question: From which institute is harder to graduate for a bachelor, Amridge University or Auburn University?
original_query: SELECT chronname FROM institution_details WHERE chronname IN ('Amridge University', 'Auburn University') ORDER BY grad_100_value LIMIT 1

question: Which cohort had the higher percentage of students who graduated from Central Alabama Community College in 2011 within 150 percent of normal/expected time, female White students or male White students?
original_query: SELECT IIF(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'F' THEN T2.grad_150 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'M' THEN T2.grad_150 ELSE 0 END), 'female White students', 'male White students') FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.race = 'W'

question: Among the states with a public school count of 20 and below, list their race.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.race FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T1.schools_count <= 20 AND T1.control = 'Public'

question: Among the Ivy League Schools, which school have the highest number of Hispanic graduates of all time?
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname IN ( 'Brown University', 'Columbia University', 'Cornell University', 'Dartmouth College', 'Harvard University', 'Princeton University', 'University of Pennsylvania', 'Yale University' ) AND T2.race = 'H' GROUP BY T1.chronname ORDER BY SUM(T2.grad_cohort) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the number of female Hispanic students who graduated within 100 percent of expected time for "Pennsylvania State University-Altoona"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_100) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Pennsylvania State University-Altoona' AND T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.race = 'H'

question: Which 4-year private for-profit school in "KY" has the highest graudation 150 value? Give the ID for the school.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname, T1.unitid FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'KY' AND T1.level = '4-year' AND T1.control = 'Private for-profit' GROUP BY T1.chronname ORDER BY SUM(T1.grad_150_value) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which city is "Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute" located in?
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN chronname = 'Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute' THEN city ELSE NULL END AS T FROM institution_details ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: What is the ratio of Asian male graduates to Asian female graduates from Harvard University in 2013?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Gender = 'M' THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Gender = 'F' THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Harvard University' AND T2.year = 2013 AND T2.race = 'A'

question: Among the Ivy League Schools in 2013, which schools have the highest number of Black students who graduated within 150 percent of normal/expected time who were seeking a bachelor's/equivalent cohort at 4-year institutions?
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname IN ( 'Brown University', 'Columbia University', 'Cornell University', 'Dartmouth College', 'Harvard University', 'Princeton University', 'University of Pennsylvania', 'Yale University' ) AND T2.year = 2013 AND T2.race = 'B' AND T2.cohort = '4y bach' ORDER BY T2.grad_cohort DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the total number of all graduated students from a 2-year public schools in Alabama in 2011.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T1.state = 'Alabama' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T1.level = '2-year' AND T1.control = 'Public' AND T2.race = 'X'

question: Provide the institute name with less than 200 graduate cohort of all races and genders in 2013. Also, please state the total number of full-time equivalent undergraduates for the institute.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname, T2.grad_cohort FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2013 AND T2.gender = 'B' AND T2.race = 'X' AND T2.grad_cohort < 200

question: Compare the graduate cohort for Auburn University from 2011 to 2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 2011 THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 2012 THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 2013 THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.gender = 'B' AND T2.race = 'X' AND T1.chronname = 'Auburn University'

question: What's the number of male Hispanic students who graduated from Central Alabama Community College in 2011 within 100 percent of normal/expected time?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_100) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'H'

question: Give the web site address for "Swarthmore College".
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN chronname = 'Swarthmore College' THEN site ELSE NULL END AS T FROM institution_details ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: How many 2-year public schools are there in "California"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(stateid) FROM state_sector_details WHERE state = 'California' AND level = '2-year' AND control = 'Public'

question: In the state of Connecticut, what is the name of the instution with the highest percent rank for freshman retention percentage within the sector?
original_query: SELECT chronname FROM institution_details WHERE state = 'Connecticut' AND retain_percentile = ( SELECT MAX(retain_percentile) FROM institution_details WHERE state = 'Connecticut' )

question: In year 2010 at schools located in Hawaii, what is the percentage of schools offers an associate's degree?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.level = '2-year' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.level) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.state = 'Hawaii' AND T2.year = 2010

question: What is the average percentage of students graduating within 100 percent of normal/expected time for Central Alabama Community College?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.grad_100_rate) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College'

question: What is the website address of the institution with the highest number of White degree-seeking students at 2-year institutions in 2008?
original_query: SELECT T1.site FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.race = 'W' AND T2.cohort = '2y all' AND T2.year = 2008 ORDER BY T2.grad_cohort DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the state with the most number of graduate cohort in 2012 from private institute for profit? List all such institutes in the mentioned state.
original_query: SELECT T1.state, T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2012 AND T1.control = 'Private for-profit' GROUP BY T2.grad_cohort ORDER BY COUNT(T2.grad_cohort) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Tell the abbreviation for "Delaware" state.
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN state = 'Delaware' THEN state_abbr ELSE NULL END AS T FROM state_sector_grads ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: List the race of institutions in Alabama with number of students greater than the 90% of average number of students of all institutions?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.race FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.student_count > ( SELECT AVG(T1.student_count) * 0.9 FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.state = 'Alabama' ) AND T1.state = 'Alabama'

question: List the site of institution within the student count of 500 to 1000 that has the recent year of data release.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.site FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.student_count BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 AND T2.year = ( SELECT MAX(T2.year) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid )

question: List the basic of the institution in 2012 with race of all male students.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.basic, T2.race FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2012 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND t2.race = 'X'

question: Calculate the percentage of Asian students among students of other races who graduated from institution in Alabama in year 2013 within 100 percent of normal / expected time.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.race = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2013 AND T1.state = 'Alabama'

question: Tell the number of 4-year public schools in UT whose graduation rate exceeds the average for the state.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.chronname) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'UT' AND T1.level = '4-year' AND T1.control = 'Public' AND T1.awards_per_value > T1.awards_per_state_value

question: What is the percentage of the number of 4-year public schools from Madison Area Technical College's home state in the Alabama?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.state = ( SELECT T1.state FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T1.chronname = 'Madison Area Technical College' ) AND T1.level = '4-year' AND T1.control = 'Public' THEN T1.chronname ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.state = 'Alabama' THEN T1.chronname ELSE NULL END) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state

question: How many 2-year private nonprofit schools in "CT" whose graduation rate falls below the average for the state?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.chronname) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'CT' AND T2.level = '2-year' AND T1.control = 'Private not-for-profit' AND T1.awards_per_value < T1.awards_per_natl_value

question: Among the institutes in the state of Alabama whose percent rank for median SAT value within sector is 77, how many of them have over 500 graduates in total in 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.chronname) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.state = 'Alabama' AND T1.med_sat_percentile = '100' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.grad_cohort > 500

question: How many 4-year public institutions are there in the state of Florida? Give all of their names.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 WHERE T2.level = '4-year' AND T2.control = 'Public' AND T2.state = 'Florida'

question: Between the Ivy League Schools, which school's state have the lowest sate appropriations to higher education in fiscal year 2011 per resident?
original_query: SELECT T1.state FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T1.chronname IN ( 'Brown University', 'Columbia University', 'Cornell University', 'Dartmouth College', 'Harvard University', 'Princeton University', 'University of Pennsylvania', 'Yale University' ) GROUP BY T1.state ORDER BY SUM(T2.state_appr_value) ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of professional or master/undergraduate courses being taught by each professor?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.course_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.p_id) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: How many courses are there for basic or medium undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(course_id) FROM course WHERE courseLevel = 'Level_300'

question: Find the ID of advisor of student ID 80 and state the level of courses taught by him/her.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id_dummy, T2.courseLevel FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.p_id = 80

question: What year in the program do the students with more than 2 advisors are in?
original_query: SELECT T2.yearsInProgram FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.student = 1 GROUP BY T2.p_id HAVING COUNT(T2.p_id) > 2

question: List all the course IDs for professional or master/graduate courses.
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM course WHERE courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: List the ID of all professors who are not faculty member along with the courses taught by him/her.
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id, T2.course_id FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.professor = 1 AND T1.hasPosition <> 0

question: Describe the course level and list of person IDs who taught course ID of 147.
original_query: SELECT T1.courseLevel, T1.course_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.p_id = 141

question: Please list the IDs of the teachers who have advised more than 4 others to teach.
original_query: SELECT p_id_dummy FROM advisedBy GROUP BY p_id_dummy HAVING COUNT(p_id_dummy) > 4

question: Provide the ID of professors who teach in both harder undergraduate course and master/graduate courses.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_400' OR T1.courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: Please list the IDs of the top 3 professors that teaches the most courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.professor = 1 GROUP BY T1.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Among the students being advised by Advisor 5, how many students are in the 5th year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.p_id_dummy = 5 AND T2.student = 1 AND T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_5'

question: What is the sum of year 1 and year 2 students?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person WHERE yearsInProgram = 'Year_1' OR yearsInProgram = 'Year_2'

question: Which level of courses is taught by professor ID 297?
original_query: SELECT T1.courseLevel FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.p_id = 297

question: Who are the professors who gave advice to students in the 12th years of program?
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id_dummy FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_12'

question: How many basic and medium undergraduate courses are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE courseLevel = 'Level_300'

question: Please list the levels of the all courses taught by teacher no.79.
original_query: SELECT T1.courseLevel FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.p_id = 79

question: How many professors are teaching course ID 18?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p_id) FROM taughtBy WHERE course_id = 18

question: In total, all the students in the 3rd year of their program are advised by how many professors?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.p_id_dummy) FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_3'

question: List the advisor IDs for students with eighth year of program and position status in faculty of those professors.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id_dummy, T2.hasPosition FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_8'

question: Which member of the faculty are teaching the most courses and what is his/her general course level?
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T3.courseLevel FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id GROUP BY T1.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the courses and level of courses by professors who are faculty employees.
original_query: SELECT T3.course_id, T3.courseLevel FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T1.course_id WHERE T2.hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme'

question: What is the ratio of professors and students?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN professor = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE  WHEN student = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS per FROM person

question: Describe the year in program and in phase status for the student with most number in advisor.
original_query: SELECT T2.yearsInProgram, T2.inPhase FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id GROUP BY T1.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the course IDs and levels of person IDs from 40 to 50.
original_query: SELECT T1.course_id, T1.courseLevel FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.p_id BETWEEN 40 AND 50

question: Calculate the percentage of high-level undergraduate course.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN courseLevel = 'Level_400' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS per FROM course

question: Which professor taught the most courses and what is the position of this person in the university?
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T1.hasPosition FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id GROUP BY T1.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Between the faculty employee professors, how many teaches high-level or harder undergraduate courses? Indicate each of the professors unique identifying number.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme' AND T1.professor = 1 AND T3.courseLevel = 'Level_400'

question: Who are the top 5 professors who teaches the highest number of professional or master/undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_500' GROUP BY T2.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.p_id) DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many students are under advisor 415?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advisedBy WHERE p_id_dummy = 415

question: List down all the person IDs who taught course ID of 18.
original_query: SELECT p_id FROM taughtBy WHERE course_id = 18

question: What level is course 165? List the professors who teach the course.
original_query: SELECT T1.courseLevel, T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.course_id = 165

question: How many basic or medium undergraduate courses are taught by a professor?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T3.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_300' AND T3.professor = 1

question: What is the total of professional courses available at the university? List out all the course id.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(course_id) FROM course WHERE courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: How many courses were taught by a professor who is currently the member of faculty?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.professor = 1 AND T1.hasPosition <> 0

question: Mention the person ID of faculty professor who taught course ID 104 and the course level.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T3.courseLevel FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T3.course_id = 104 AND T1.hasPosition <> 0

question: How many courses were taught by more than 4 people?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(course_id) FROM taughtBy GROUP BY course_id HAVING COUNT(course_id) > 4 )

question: How many calories does the turkey tenderloin bundles recipe have?
original_query: SELECT T2.calories FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Turkey Tenderloin Bundles'

question: Name the recipes which can lead to constipation.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.iron > 20

question: Please list the titles of all the recipes that may lead to constipation, feeling sick or stomach pain.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.iron > 20

question: How many times do seedless red grapes appear in the recipes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.name = 'seedless red grapes'

question: Name the recipe with the most Vitamin C.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.vitamin_c DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the recipes from The California Tree Fruit Agreement, calculate the percentage of sodium-free recipes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.sodium < 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.source = 'The California Tree Fruit Agreement'

question: How much Vitamin A is in Sherry beef?
original_query: SELECT T2.vitamin_a FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sherried Beef'

question: What are the names of the recipes that will cause stomach pain?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.iron > 20

question: Identify recipes with different maximum and minimum quantities.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.max_qty <> T2.min_qty

question: What are the names of the top 5 recipes that are best for wound healing?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.vitamin_c DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many recipes include the ingredient "graham cracker crumbs"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.name = 'graham cracker crumbs'

question: Which recipe in the database contains the most total fat? Give its title.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.total_fat DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which recipe has the highest calories?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.calories DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which ingredient appeared the least in recipes?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id GROUP BY T2.ingredient_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.ingredient_id) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many dairy recipes can serve more than 10 people?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.category = 'dairy' AND T1.servings > 10

question: Provide the ingredients and maximum quantities of the recipe which can serve 7 people.
original_query: SELECT T3.name, T2.max_qty FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.servings = 7

question: List all the ingredients for Strawberry Sorbet.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Strawberry Sorbet'

question: What is the average vitamin C amount of all cakes?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.vitamin_c) FROM Nutrition AS T1 INNER JOIN Recipe AS T2 ON T2.recipe_id = T1.recipe_id WHERE T2.title LIKE '%cake%'

question: Among all recipes containing cheese, what is the percentage of recipes with calories greater than 200?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T4.calories > 200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T4 ON T4.recipe_id = T1.recipe_id WHERE T3.category = 'cheese'

question: How many calories on average does a recipe that comes from "Produce for Better Health Foundation and 5 a Day" contain?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.calories) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.source = 'Produce for Better Health Foundation and 5 a Day'

question: How many cups of 1% lowfat milk should be added to no.1436 recipe?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.name = '1% lowfat milk' AND T2.unit = 'cup(s)' AND T2.recipe_id = 1436

question: Among the recipes with sea bass, how many percent of recipes can serve 10 people and above?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.servings >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.name = 'sea bass steak'

question: List all the ingredients of Apricot Yogurt Parfaits.
original_query: SELECT T3.name, T3.category FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Apricot Yogurt Parfaits'

question: What is the percentage calories protein of Raspberry Chiffon Pie?
original_query: SELECT pcnt_cal_prot FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: Describe the ingredients in the recipe with the highest vitamin that helps vision in dim light.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T3 ON T3.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T3.vitamin_a DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many ingredients are there in Apricot Yogurt Parfaits?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Apricot Yogurt Parfaits'

question: Among the recipes that take more than 10 minutes to prepare, what is the title of the one with the most calories?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.prep_min > 10 ORDER BY T2.calories DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the title and total time of the recipe which has the highest possibility of gaining weight.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.prep_min + T1.cook_min + T1.stnd_min FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.total_fat DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the ingredients in Tomato-Cucumber Relish.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Tomato-Cucumber Relish'

question: Which ingredient appeared the most in recipes? Calculate its amount of appearance in percentage.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, CAST(COUNT(T2.ingredient_id) AS FLOAT) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(T2.ingredient_id) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T2.ingredient_id = T1.ingredient_id ) AS "percentage" FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T2.ingredient_id = T1.ingredient_id GROUP BY T2.ingredient_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.ingredient_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which recipe is more beneficial in wound healing, "Raspberry Chiffon Pie" or "Fresh Apricot Bavarian"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN CASE WHEN T2.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' THEN T1.vitamin_c END > CASE WHEN T2.title = 'Fresh Apricot Bavarian' THEN T1.vitamin_c END THEN 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' ELSE 'Fresh Apricot Bavarian' END AS "vitamin_c is higher" FROM Nutrition T1 INNER JOIN Recipe T2 ON T2.recipe_id = T1.recipe_id

question: What is the unsaturated fat content in the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie"?
original_query: SELECT T2.total_fat - T2.sat_fat FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: Please list the titles of all the recipes that are salt/sodium-free.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.sodium < 5

question: State the name of the optional ingredient of no.1397 recipe.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T2.recipe_id = 1397 AND T2.optional = 'TRUE'

question: What is the average alcohol content per 12-ounce beer bottle produced by Boston Beer Company?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.abv) FROM beers AS T1 INNER JOIN breweries AS T2 ON T1.brewery_id = T2.id WHERE T2.name = 'Boston Beer Company' AND T1.ounces = 12

question: Which city and state produces the most and least bitter beer, and what is the difference in bitterness between the two? List also the names of the beer.
original_query: SELECT T1.state, T1.city, T2.name, T2.ibu FROM breweries AS T1 INNER JOIN beers AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.brewery_id GROUP BY T1.state, T1.city, T2.name, T2.ibu HAVING MAX(ibu) AND MIN(ibu) LIMIT 2

question: Which distinct state makes beer that has the least amount of bitterness?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.state, T1.ibu FROM beers AS T1 INNER JOIN breweries AS T2 ON T1.brewery_id = T2.id WHERE T1.ibu IS NOT NULL AND T1.ibu = ( SELECT MIN(ibu) FROM beers )

question: What is the average satisfying degree of the course Machine Learning Theory?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.sat) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.name = 'Machine Learning Theory'

question: How many students, who have a GPA between 3 to 4, failed a course?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.student_id) FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.grade IS NULL AND T1.gpa BETWEEN 3 AND 4

question: Among the professors with a teachability of 3 and below, what is the percentage of their student advisees with a low salary?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.salary = 'low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.salary) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.teachingability < 3

question: Give the full name and capability of students who failed in any courses.
original_query: SELECT T2.f_name, T2.l_name, T1.capability FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T2.student_id = T1.student_id INNER JOIN registration AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.grade IS NULL OR T3.grade = ''

question: Please list the names of the courses taken by Laughton Antonio.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.f_name = 'Laughton' AND T1.l_name = 'Antonio'

question: What is the difficulty of the course in which a student with level of intellengence of 5 got an A grade?
original_query: SELECT T3.diff FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T2.grade = 'A' AND T1.intelligence = 5

question: List the research assistants' full names, capabilities and GPAs who were under the supervision of Merwyn Conkay.
original_query: SELECT T3.f_name, T3.l_name, T2.capability, T3.gpa FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Merwyn' AND T1.last_name = 'Conkay'

question: Which student has the highest gpa? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT f_name, l_name FROM student WHERE gpa = ( SELECT MAX(gpa) FROM student )

question: Calculate the GPA of the semester for Laughton Antonio.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T3.credit * CASE T1.grade WHEN 'A' THEN 4 WHEN 'B' THEN 3 WHEN 'C' THEN 2 WHEN 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T3.credit) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T2.f_name = 'Laughton' AND T2.l_name = 'Antonio'

question: How many students got an A in Applied Deep Learning?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.student_id) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.grade = 'A' AND T1.name = 'Applied Deep Learning '

question: Provide the registered courses' names by undergraduate students with GPA of 3.7 and above.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.f_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.type = 'UG' AND T1.gpa > 3.7

question: What is the average teaching ability of the most popular professors?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(teachingability) AS REAL) / COUNT(prof_id) FROM prof WHERE popularity = ( SELECT MAX(popularity) FROM prof )

question: What is the average number of students who registered for the courses with a difficulty of 4?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.student_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.course_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.diff = 4

question: For the 3-credit course with the easiest difficulty, how many students get an "A" in that course?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.grade = 'A' AND T2.credit = '3' AND T2.diff = 1

question: Which professor is Oliy Spratling working with? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.f_name = 'Oliy' AND T3.l_name = 'Spratling'

question: Give the student's ID of students with 2.5 GPA and enrolled in C for Programmers.
original_query: SELECT T2.student_id FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'C for Programmers' AND T1.gpa = 2.5

question: Which student is more satisfied with the course Machine Learning Theory, Willie Rechert or Laughton Antonio?
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE (T1.f_name = 'Laughton' OR T1.f_name = 'Willie') AND (T1.l_name = 'Antonio' OR T1.l_name = 'Rechert') AND T3.name = 'Machine Learning Theory' ORDER BY T2.sat DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which professor advised Faina Mallinar to become a research assistant? Please give his or her full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.f_name = 'Faina' AND T3.l_name = 'Mallinar'

question: Among the most important courses, what is the name of the most difficult course?
original_query: SELECT name FROM course WHERE credit = ( SELECT MAX(credit) FROM course ) AND diff = ( SELECT MAX(diff) FROM course )

question: Among professors with the highest teachability, how many of their students have high salary?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T1.salary = 'high' ORDER BY T2.teachingability DESC LIMIT 1

question: Of the students with high salaries, how many took the computer vision course?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T2.student_id = T1.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.salary = 'high' AND T3.name = 'Computer Vision'

question: List the course's name where students acquired a grade of D.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.grade = 'D'

question: Describe the names and capability of the students who were advised by professors from the University of Washington.
original_query: SELECT T3.f_name, T3.l_name, T2.capability FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T1.graduate_from = 'University of Washington'

question: List the student's first and last name that got a C in the course named "Applied Deep Learning".
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Applied Deep Learning ' AND T2.grade = 'C'

question: Provide the number of students enrolled in the "Statistical Learning" course.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.student_id) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.name = 'Statistical learning'

question: What are the GPAs of the unpaid Research Assistants?
original_query: SELECT T2.gpa FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.salary = 'free'

question: Provide the full names and emails of unpaid research assistants.
original_query: SELECT T2.f_name, T2.l_name, T2.email FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.salary = 'free'

question: How many students have the highest intelligence among those taking a bachelor's degree?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(student_id) FROM student WHERE type = 'UG' AND intelligence = ( SELECT MAX(intelligence) FROM student )

question: Calculate the average satisfaction of the good students with their courses.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(sat) AS REAL) / COUNT(course_id) FROM registration WHERE grade = 'B'

question: How many professors are more popular than Zhou Zhihua?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(prof_id) FROM prof WHERE popularity > ( SELECT popularity FROM prof WHERE first_name = 'Zhihua' AND last_name = 'Zhou' )

question: Among students registered for the most difficult course, list the students' full names who got grade A.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T2.grade = 'A' ORDER BY T3.diff DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the students with above-average capability.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.capability > ( SELECT AVG(capability) FROM RA )

question: Give the student's last name that gave the highest student satisfaction for the course "Intro to Database 2".
original_query: SELECT T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Intro to Database 2' ORDER BY T2.sat DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average capability of students with less than a 2.5 GPA?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.capability) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.gpa < 2.5

question: Give the grade score for Rik Unsworth in "Computer Network".
original_query: SELECT CASE grade WHEN 'A' THEN 4 WHEN 'B' THEN 3 WHEN 'C' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS result FROM registration WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE f_name = 'Rik' AND l_name = 'Unsworth' AND course_id IN ( SELECT course_id FROM course WHERE name = 'Computer Network' ) )

question: How many research postgraduate students are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(student_id) FROM student WHERE type = 'RPG'

question: Describe the full names, emails and intelligence of the students with the highest capability and salary.
original_query: SELECT f_name, l_name, email, intelligence FROM student WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM RA WHERE salary = 'high' AND capability = ( SELECT MAX(capability) FROM RA ) )

question: What is the percentage of students who get a "B" in the course "Computer Network"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.grade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.name = 'Computer Network'

question: Please list the names of the courses that are less important than Machine Learning Theory.
original_query: SELECT name FROM course WHERE credit < ( SELECT credit FROM course WHERE name = 'Machine Learning Theory' )

question: Among the most popular professors, how many are females?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(prof_id) FROM prof WHERE gender = 'Female' AND popularity = ( SELECT MAX(popularity) FROM prof )

question: What is the name of the most difficult course?
original_query: SELECT name FROM course WHERE diff = ( SELECT MAX(diff) FROM course )

question: Among the students with high salary, what is total number of students with a GPA higher than 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.salary = 'high' AND T2.gpa > 3

question: List the capability of research postgraduate students with an intellegence level of 4 and above.
original_query: SELECT T1.capability FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.type = 'RPG' AND T2.intelligence >= 4

question: How many students does Ogdon Zywicki advise?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Ogdon' AND T2.last_name = 'Zywicki'

question: Find the university from which the professor who advised most undergraduate students graduated.
