original_query: SELECT playerID FROM ScoringSC ORDER BY A DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name all goalies with 10 or more empty net goals. Name the players and season where he played.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName , T2.year FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.ENG >= 10

question: Name the goalies with the most seasons played. State the average time he played for each season.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year, AVG(T2.Min) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.playerID = ( SELECT playerID FROM Goalies GROUP BY playerID ORDER BY COUNT(playerID) DESC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year

question: When was the birthday for the goalie who had most goal againsts in 1965 season?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthYear, T1.birthMon, birthDay FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1965 ORDER BY T2.GA DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the players who won an award in the year 1983, how many of them play the position of goalie?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(playerID) FROM AwardsPlayers WHERE pos = 'G' AND year = 1983

question: How many penalty minutes did the Montreal Canadiens have in the 1918's Stanley Cup Finals?
original_query: SELECT T2.PIM FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens' AND T1.year = 1918

question: Who was the coach for the team which had the most bench minors penalty in 2003？
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.firstName, T3.lastName FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T2.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T1.year = '2003' GROUP BY T3.firstName, T3.lastName ORDER BY SUM(T1.BenchMinor) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the first Name and last name of all players not from USA and who are born in 1990 .
original_query: SELECT firstName, lastName FROM Master WHERE birthYear = 1990 AND birthCountry != 'USA'

question: Name the goalies who played for more than two teams from Year 2000 to 2005.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year >= 2000 AND T2.year <= 2005 GROUP BY T2.playerID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.tmID) > 2

question: What is the average weight of players who have height greater than 72 inches.
original_query: SELECT AVG(weight) FROM Master WHERE height > 72

question: State the nick name of player ID 'aubinje01'. List all the teams and season he played for.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.nameNick, T3.year, T3.name FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T2.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T1.playerID = 'aubinje01'

question:
How many teams did the team with the most victories in 1915 play against?
Indicate the name of the team who won the most games in 1915, as well as the names of the opposing team.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oppID), T2.tmID, T2.oppID FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamVsTeam AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T2.year = 1915 GROUP BY T2.tmID, T2.oppID ORDER BY SUM(T2.W) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the shortest player and state the team ID of that player from 1925 to 1936.
original_query: SELECT T2.playerID, T2.tmID FROM ( SELECT playerID FROM Master WHERE height IS NOT NULL ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT playerID, tmID FROM Scoring WHERE year BETWEEN 1925 AND 1936 ) AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID

question: What is the power play chances of New York Rangers in 2009?
original_query: SELECT CAST(PPG AS REAL) / PPC FROM Teams WHERE year = 2009 AND name = 'New York Rangers'

question: Which country produced the most number of hockey players? Identify which year was most of the hockey players are born.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT birthCountry, birthYear FROM Master GROUP BY birthCountry, birthYear ORDER BY COUNT(birthCountry) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the first names of the coaches who have taught the Montreal Canadiens.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.firstName FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Montreal Canadiens'

question: What is the percentage of American coaches among all the coaches who taught the Montreal Canadiens?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(T2.W AS REAL) / T2.G) / SUM(T2.G + T2.W) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens'

question: What is the total amount of assists of the NHL player with the most assists in history? Please indicate his/her full name.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.A), T2.firstName, T2.lastName FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.lgID = 'NHL' GROUP BY T2.firstName, T2.lastName ORDER BY SUM(T1.A) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the height and weight for coaches who have won awards in 1930?
original_query: SELECT T1.height, T1.weight FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year = '1930'

question: What is the highest total points a team got in a year?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Pts), year FROM Teams GROUP BY year, tmID ORDER BY SUM(Pts) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the total number of the games that player Id "rutlewa01" played in 1967?
original_query: SELECT GP FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'rutlewa01' AND year = 1967

question: What is the power play percentage of the team with the most number of loses?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(PPG) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(PPC) FROM Teams GROUP BY tmID ORDER BY SUM(L) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the awards the players who died in Arlington have won.
original_query: SELECT T2.award FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.deathCity = 'Kemptville'

question: Please list the birth cities of the players who have won an award in the year 1970.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.birthCity FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1970

question: For the goalie who had the highest defensive success rate in the postseason of 2011, what's his legends ID ?
original_query: SELECT T2.legendsID FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.year = 2011 ORDER BY 1 - CAST(T1.PostGA AS REAL) / T1.PostSA DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the players who were born in July and August, how many of them got in the Hall of Fame?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.playerID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID WHERE T1.birthMon IN (7, 8)

question: Which league did player id"adamsja01" play in 1920?
original_query: SELECT lgID FROM ScoringSC WHERE playerID = 'adamsja01' AND year = 1920

question: Name the deceased players whose death country is different from his birth country order by birth year.
original_query: SELECT firstName, lastName FROM Master WHERE birthCountry != deathCountry ORDER BY birthYear

question: How many games did player Id "vanbijo01" win in the 1990 season?
original_query: SELECT W FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'vanbijo01' AND year = 1990

question: Which player ID are left winger and weight more than 200?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Master WHERE pos LIKE '%L%' AND weight > 200 AND playerID IS NOT NULL AND pos = 'L'

question: In which month was the player who has won the most awards born?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthMon FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T2.playerID ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the Nicknames of the players who got in the Hall of Fame in 2007.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.nameNick FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID WHERE T2.year = 2007

question: Among the players who had 10 empty net goals in their career, who is the tallest? Show his full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T2.playerID, T1.height HAVING SUM(T2.ENG) > 10 ORDER BY T1.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: How long has the NHL player been playing during the year when he recorded the least number of times being on the ice when a goal is scored for the team versus against the team? Indicate his full name.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.firstNHL - T1.year, T3.nameGiven , T3.firstName, T3.lastName FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T2.tmID = T1.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID GROUP BY T3.firstName, T3.lastName, T3.nameGiven, T3.firstNHL - T1.year, T3.firstName, T3.lastName ORDER BY SUM(T1.`+/-`) ASC LIMIT 1

question: In which year did the Montreal Canadiens have 49 penalty minutes in the Stanley Cup finals? Was it 1924, 1923 or 1918?
original_query: SELECT T1.year FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens' AND T2.PIM = 49

question: For the coach who won Second Team All-Star in 1933, how many wins did he have that year?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.W) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year = 1933 AND T2.award = 'Second Team All-Star'

question: Which team got the most wins in the Stanley Cup finals?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM TeamsSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(T1.W) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the team which had three different goalies in the 2011 postseason games, how many games did they win in the regular season?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.W) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T2.year = 2011 GROUP BY T1.tmID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) = 3

question: Did the tallest player got in the Hall of Fame? If yes, please list the year when he got in the Hall of Fame.
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T1.hofID IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE T2.year END FROM Master AS T1 LEFT JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID WHERE T1.height = ( SELECT MAX(height) FROM Master )

question: Name the goalies who have played more than total of 5000 minutes in the all the season played. State given name of the player and from which country was he born.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.nameGiven, T1.birthCountry FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T1.nameGiven, T1.birthCountry HAVING SUM(T2.Min) > 5000

question: Please give the height of the tallest coach of the Montreal Canadiens.
original_query: SELECT T3.height FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Montreal Canadiens' AND T3.coachID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T3.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the first 3 teams that got the most penalty minutes in 2006.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Teams WHERE year = 2006 GROUP BY tmID, name ORDER BY SUM(PIM) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Among the teams that played in 1922's Stanley Cup finals, how many of them had over 20 points in that year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.tmID) FROM TeamsSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = '1922' AND T2.Pts > 20

question: Which country has the most players in the Hall of Fame?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthCountry FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID GROUP BY T1.birthCountry ORDER BY COUNT(T1.playerID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the losing team during an exhibition game in 1912?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM SeriesPost AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND tmIDLoser = tmID WHERE T1.note = 'EX' AND T2.year = '1912'

question: Between 2003 to 2005, what are the given names of the players with the most number of games played whose Penalty minutes is between 200 to 250?
original_query: SELECT T2.nameGiven FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID AND T1.PIM BETWEEN 200 AND 250 AND T1.year BETWEEN 2003 AND 2005 ORDER BY T1.GP DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which team recorded the most number of road victories in 2005? Indicate the team ID.
original_query: SELECT tmID FROM TeamSplits WHERE YEAR = '2005' ORDER BY rW DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many shots on goal did Cam Neely had in the year of 1990?
original_query: SELECT T2.SOG FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.firstName = 'Cam' AND T1.lastName = 'Neely' AND T2.year = '1990'

question: How many players were included in the Hall of Fame on average between 1950 and 1980?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(name) AS REAL) / 30 FROM HOF WHERE year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1980 AND category = 'Player'

question: In 2006, what is the overall number of october defeats for the team with the most October defeats? Indicate the team ID.
original_query: SELECT OctL, tmID FROM TeamSplits WHERE year = '2006' ORDER BY OctL DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the awards the coaches who are born in Canada have won.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.award FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.birthCountry = 'Canada'

question: List all the deceased goalies and the teams he had played whose birth country was in Canada.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT firstName, lastName, T3.name FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.lgID = T3.lgID WHERE T2.birthCountry = 'Canada' AND T2.deathYear IS NOT NULL AND T2.pos = 'G'

question: Please list the nick names of the coaches who are from the USA and have taught the Buffalo Sabres.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT nameNick FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Buffalo Sabres' AND T3.birthCountry = 'USA'

question: What's the decrease rate of the game plays did David Aebischer after he got traded in 2005?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.year = 2005 THEN T1.GP ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.year = 2006 THEN T1.GP ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.year = 2005 THEN T1.GP ELSE 0 END) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.firstName = 'David' AND T2.lastName = 'Aebischer'

question: Did legendsID "P194502" personally attend his Hall of Fame dedication?
original_query: SELECT IIF(T1.note = 'posthumous', 'YES', 'NO') FROM AwardsMisc AS T1 RIGHT JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.legendsID = 'P194502'

question: Which coach was the first one to teach the Montreal Canadiens, please give his first name.
original_query: SELECT T3.firstName FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Montreal Canadiens' ORDER BY T1.year LIMIT 1

question: Which position did Mike Antonovich play?
original_query: SELECT T1.pos FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.firstName = 'Mike' AND T1.lastName = 'Antonovich'

question: In the year that the Montreal Canadiens had 24 penalty minutes in the Stanley Cup finals, how many wins did the team had in total?
original_query: SELECT T2.W FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens' AND T2.PIM = 24

question: List all goalies who played in the year 2005 season and shorter than 72 inches. List all the team names he play for.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T3.name FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T2.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T2.year = 2005 AND T1.height < 72

question: How many bench minor penalties did the team St. Louis Blues got in total in all the games?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(BenchMinor) AS REAL) / 2 FROM Teams WHERE name = 'St. Louis Blues'

question: Please list the years in which the NHL League had shots recorded while the goalie was on the ice.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM Goalies WHERE lgID = 'NHL' AND SA IS NOT NULL

question: Who is the coach who had coached the the most seasons in MTL? State his given name, date of birth and all teams he had coaches before.
original_query: SELECT T2.nameGiven , T2.birthYear, T2.birthMon, T2.birthDay, T3.name FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T3.lgID = T1.lgID WHERE T3.tmID = 'MTL' GROUP BY T2.nameGiven, T2.birthYear, T2.birthMon, T2.birthDay, T3.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.coachID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which coach has the best performance for team DET in history? What was the winning percentage? Name the coach and the year he coached.
original_query: SELECT CAST(T2.W AS REAL) / T2.G, T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID INNER JOIN ( SELECT coachID FROM Coaches ORDER BY CAST(w AS REAL) / g DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T3 ON T2.coachID = T3.coachID

question: How many years did player Id "healygl01" play?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(year) FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'healygl01'

question: In the history of all the Quebec Bulldogs, which goalie had the most play minutes for the team? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.firstName, T2.lastName FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.tmID = T3.tmID AND T1.year = T3.year WHERE T3.name = 'Quebec Bulldogs' AND T2.pos = 'D' GROUP BY T1.playerID, T2.firstName, T2.lastName ORDER BY SUM(T1.Min) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the player who scored 7 shorthanded goals in 1989, what's his dominant hand?
original_query: SELECT T1.shootCatch FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1989 GROUP BY T2.playerID HAVING SUM(T2.SHG) = 7

question: Which player who showed as the third goalie in a game has the biggest weight? Give the full name of the player.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.stint = 3 ORDER BY T1.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the living players who have two positions. State their given name the position they play.
original_query: SELECT firstName, lastName, pos FROM Master WHERE deathYear IS NULL AND pos LIKE '%/%'

question: Which team did player Id "roypa01" play in 1992? Give the team id.
original_query: SELECT tmID FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'roypa01' AND year = 1992

question: What is the average height of all the goalies born in the 70s who's a left shooting/catching dominant and to which team do the tallest player/s play for most recently?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.height) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM AwardsPlayers AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.height IS NOT NULL AND (T2.pos = 'LW' OR T2.pos = 'L/C')

question: How many goals were scored while the goalkeeper was on the ice in the 1924 WCHL by the goalie with the most goals scored?
original_query: SELECT SUM(PostGA) FROM Goalies WHERE lgID = 'WCHL' AND year = '1924' GROUP BY playerID ORDER BY SUM(PostGA) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the goalie who had the most shutouts in 2010, what's his catching hand?
original_query: SELECT T1.shootCatch FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 2010 GROUP BY T2.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.SHO) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Is there any coach who has not been a player before but has won award? State the ID.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.coachID FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.playerID IS NULL

question: List all goalies with more lost than won games for two seasons or more. State the name of the player and team he played.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T3.name FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T2.year = T3.year AND T2.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T1.pos = 'G' AND T2.L > T2.W GROUP BY T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T3.name HAVING COUNT(T3.year) > 2

question: Which NHL award was most frequently won by the coach with the most wins?
original_query: SELECT award FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.lgID = T2.lgID WHERE T1.lgID = 'NHL' GROUP BY T2.coachID, T2.award ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For all the deceased players who are good at both left and right hand, list the player's name and the age when he died.
original_query: SELECT firstName, lastName, deathYear - birthYear FROM Master WHERE shootCatch IS NULL AND deathYear IS NOT NULL

question: List all deceased goalies by last name. List the season where he had the most time played.
original_query: SELECT T1.playerID, T2.year, Min FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.Min DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Canadian players, between the ages of 18 and 24 when they initially played their first NHL, had a cumulative goal total of no more than 5? Indicate their complete names, the year, and the team for which they scored the specified amount of goals.
original_query: SELECT T2.nameGiven, T2.lastName, T2.birthYear, birthMon, birthDay , T3.tmID FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T3.tmID = T1.tmID WHERE (T2.firstNHL - T2.birthYear) BETWEEN 18 AND 24 AND T3.G < 5

question: For all the goalies born in year 1987, who are good in both right hand and left hand? Calculate his percentage of winning for every season he played.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year, CAST(T2.W AS REAL) / T2.GP FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthYear = 1987 AND T1.shootCatch IS NULL

question: Among all goalies who are still alive, whose first season in NHL in before 1950. List the team names they were in.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.name FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T2.lgID = T3.lgID AND T2.year = T3.year WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL AND T1.firstNHL < 1950

question: Among the coaches whose team has over 30 wins in a year, how many of them are born in the USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.W > 30 AND T1.birthCountry = 'USA'

question: Name the goalies and season they played when Boston Bruins won number 1 in rank.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T3.year FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T2.year = T3.year AND T2.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL AND T3.name = 'Boston Bruins' AND T3.rank = 1 AND T1.pos = 'G'

question: Name the goalies who are good at left hand and also has become a coach after retirement. Name all teams he had played before.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT firstName, lastName, T3.name FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.lgID = T3.lgID WHERE T1.playerID IS NOT NULL AND T2.coachID IS NOT NULL AND T2.shootCatch = 'L' AND T2.pos = 'G'

question: Show me how many minutes player Id "valiqst01" played in the game in 2007 season.
original_query: SELECT Min FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'valiqst01' AND year = 2007

question: State the player ID and coach ID of person who have become coach after retirement.
original_query: SELECT playerID, coachID FROM Master WHERE playerID IS NOT NULL AND coachID IS NOT NULL

question: For the team had the biggest power play percentage in 2011, who was their coach that season? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.coachID FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T2.year = 2011 ORDER BY CAST(T2.PPG AS REAL) / T2.PPC DESC LIMIT 1

question: How much is the total goals for player with player ID aaltoan01 and how old is this person?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.G), STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - T1.birthyear FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.playerID = 'aaltoan01' GROUP BY T1.birthyear

question: What is the number of players whose last name is Green that played in the league but not coached?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(playerID) FROM Master WHERE lastName = 'Green' AND coachID IS NULL

question: Which coach had the highest winning rates in the 2009 season? What's coach's nickname.
original_query: SELECT T2.coachID, T1.nameNick FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year = 2009 ORDER BY CAST(T2.W AS REAL) / (T2.W + T2.L) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many years were there after Don Waddell retired and became a coach in NHL?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.year) - MIN(T2.year) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.firstName = 'Don' AND T1.lastName = 'Waddell'

question: What is the average winning rate of the Montreal Canadiens in the Stanley Cup finals?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.W / T2.G) / SUM(T2.G + T2.W) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens'

question: In the year 1958, what is the total number of players that became hall of famers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(hofID) FROM HOF WHERE category = 'Player' AND year = 1958

question: Among the teams whose shorthanded goals are between 1 to 5, which player is the most trustworthy in the critical moment?
original_query: SELECT T2.nameGiven, T2.lastName FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.SHG BETWEEN 1 AND 5 ORDER BY T1.GWG DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the positions of the players who were born in Canada and have won the All-Rookie award.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.pos FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthCountry = 'Canada' AND T2.award = 'All-Rookie'

question: How many "account representatives" are there in Chicago with a good performance?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Account Representative' AND T2.locationcity = 'Chicago' AND T1.performance = 'Good'

question: Which positions are suitable with 4 years degree education?
original_query: SELECT positiontitle FROM position WHERE educationrequired = '4 year degree'

question: List the location cities in the Western states.
original_query: SELECT locationcity FROM location WHERE state IN ('CO', 'UT', 'CA')

question: Mention the full name, hired date and performance status of the employee whose location is in Utah state.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T1.hiredate, T1.performance FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.state = 'UT'

question: What are the maximum and minimum salary range and position title of Bill Marlin?
original_query: SELECT T2.maxsalary, T2.minsalary, T2.positiontitle FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Bill' AND T1.lastname = 'Marlin'

question: How much is the salary of the first ever employee that was hired?
original_query: SELECT salary FROM employee ORDER BY hiredate ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many employees whose performance is poor have a salary of over $50,000 per year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE performance = 'Poor' AND CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) > 50000

question: Please list the social security numbers of all the employees who work in California.
original_query: SELECT T1.ssn FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.state = 'CA'

question: How many positions have a maximum salary of no more than US$1000,000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position WHERE CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(maxsalary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) < 100000

question: Which position has a lower minimum salary, Account Representative or Trainee?
original_query: SELECT positiontitle FROM position WHERE positiontitle = 'Account Representative' OR positiontitle = 'Trainee' ORDER BY minsalary ASC LIMIT 1

question: In which state can you find the highest amount of good performing Account Representatives?
original_query: SELECT T2.state FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Account Representative' AND T1.performance = 'Good' GROUP BY T2.state ORDER BY COUNT(T2.state) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the zip codes of the offices where all the male employees with a good job performance work at.
original_query: SELECT T2.zipcode FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T1.performance = 'Good'

question: Give the number of female employees.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE gender = 'F'

question: How many male Regional Managers are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.positiontitle = 'Regional Manager' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: Write down the full name, performance status and located city of the employee who's social security number is "767-74-7373".
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T2.state, T2.locationcity FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.ssn = '767-74-7373'

question: In which state does Emily Wood work?
original_query: SELECT T2.state FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Emily' AND T1.lastname = 'Wood'

question: Which position has the highest number of female employees with a 2 year degree?
original_query: SELECT T2.positiontitle FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.educationrequired = '2 year degree' AND T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T2.positiontitle ORDER BY COUNT(T2.positiontitle) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the full address of the office of the highest paid manager.
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Manager' ORDER BY T1.salary DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the required education for the position of regional manager?
original_query: SELECT educationrequired FROM position WHERE positiontitle = 'Regional Manager'

question: What is the education required to be account representative? Mention account representative full name and salary who got poor in performance status.
original_query: SELECT T2.educationrequired, T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T1.salary FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.performance = 'Poor' AND T2.positiontitle = 'Account Representative'

question: Among the employees with poor performance, provide the managers' full names, location city, address and its zip code.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T2.locationcity, T2.address, T2.zipcode FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Manager' AND T1.performance = 'Poor'

question: Mention the employee's full name and performance status who got the lowest in salary per year.
original_query: SELECT firstname, lastname, performance FROM employee ORDER BY salary ASC LIMIT 1

question: Describe the employees' full name, positions, located city and office phone number within Colorado state.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T3.positiontitle, T2.locationcity, T2.officephone FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T2.state = 'CO'

question: What is Kenneth Charles's position title?
original_query: SELECT T2.positiontitle FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Kenneth' AND T1.lastname = 'Charles'

question: How many Account Representatives are there in Illinois with satisfying performance?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Account Representative' AND T1.performance = 'Good' AND T2.state = 'IL'

question: Which city and address has zip code of above 90000?
original_query: SELECT locationcity, address FROM location WHERE zipcode > 90000

question: What is the full office location address where most of the employees work at?
original_query: SELECT T2.address, T2.locationcity, T2.state, T2.zipcode FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID GROUP BY T2.address, T2.locationcity, T2.state, T2.zipcode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average salary of the worst performing managers?
original_query: SELECT AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.performance = 'Poor' AND T2.positiontitle = 'Manager'

question: If Jose Rodriguez tried his best, how many percentage can his salary raise without changing his position?
original_query: SELECT 100 * (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T2.maxsalary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) - CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) / CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) AS per FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Jose' AND T1.lastname = 'Rodriguez'

question: List out the name of players who have a height of 5'8".
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T1.height_in_inch = '5''8"'

question: List the name of players who have a height over 5'9.
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T2.height_in_inch > '5''9"'

question: Who is the tallest player in team USA U20?
original_query: SELECT T.PlayerName FROM ( SELECT T1.PlayerName, T3.height_in_cm FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN height_info AS T3 ON T1.height = T3.height_id WHERE T2.TEAM = 'USA U20' ORDER BY T3.height_in_cm DESC ) AS T WHERE T.height_in_cm = ( SELECT MAX(T3.height_in_cm) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN height_info AS T3 ON T1.height = T3.height_id WHERE T2.TEAM = 'USA U20' )

question: Among all goals scored by Calgary Hitmen in the 2007-2008 season, identify the percentage scored by Ian Schultz.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PlayerName = 'Ian Schultz' THEN T1.G ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.G) FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2007-2008' AND T1.TEAM = 'Calgary Hitmen'

question: Who among the players drafted by Arizona Coyotes in 2000 has committed the highest rule violations?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.overallby = 'Arizona Coyotes' AND T2.draftyear = 2000 ORDER BY T1.PIM DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the weight in kg of Tony Martensson?
original_query: SELECT T2.weight_in_kg FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'Tony Martensson'

question: Which country do most players of team Plymouth Whalers come from?
original_query: SELECT T.nation FROM ( SELECT T1.nation, COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.TEAM = 'Plymouth Whalers' GROUP BY T1.nation ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ELITEID) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T

question: How many players were drafted by Arizona Coyotes whose height reaches 195 centimeters?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T2.overallby = 'Arizona Coyotes' AND T1.height_in_cm = 195

question: Who is the oldest player that participated in OHL league in the 1997 - 2000 season?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.LEAGUE = 'OHL' AND T2.SEASON = '1999-2000' ORDER BY T1.birthdate LIMIT 1

question: What is the weight of the player with the longest time on ice in the player’s first 7 years of NHL career in kilograms?
original_query: SELECT T2.weight_in_kg FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T1.sum_7yr_TOI = ( SELECT MAX(t.sum_7yr_TOI) FROM PlayerInfo t )

question: How many players, who were drafted by Anaheim Ducks in 2008, have played for U.S. National U18 Team?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.overallby = 'Anaheim Ducks' AND T1.draftyear = 2008 AND T2.TEAM = 'U.S. National U18 Team'

question: What is the birthplace of Aaron Gagnon?
original_query: SELECT birthplace FROM PlayerInfo WHERE PlayerName = 'Aaron Gagnon'

question: Identify the players who weigh 120 kg.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM weight_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.weight_id = T2.weight WHERE T1.weight_in_kg = 120

question: Among all penalty minutes picked up by Ak Bars Kazan in the 1999-2000 season, identify the percentage picked up by Yevgeni Muratov.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PlayerName = 'Yevgeni Muratov' THEN T1.PIM ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.PIM) FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '1999-2000' AND T1.TEAM = 'Ak Bars Kazan'

question: Calculate the average weight in pounds of all players drafted by Arizona Coyotes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.weight_in_lbs) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM weight_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.weight_id = T2.weight WHERE T2.overallby = 'Arizona Coyotes'

question: What is the percentage of players who were born in Denmark and weight above 154 lbs?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.nation = 'Denmark' AND T2.weight_in_lbs > 154 THEN T1.ELITEID ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id

question: Among the Italian players, who has the shortest height?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T2.nation = 'Italy' ORDER BY T1.height_in_cm ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many games did the tallest player have ever played?
original_query: SELECT T1.GP FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.ELITEID = ( SELECT t.ELITEID FROM PlayerInfo t ORDER BY t.height DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Please list the names of all the players that are over 90 kg and are right-shooted.
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90 AND T1.shoots = 'R'

question: Calculate the percentage of penalty minutes of Swedish players in OHL league among all players.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.nation = 'Sweden' THEN T2.PIM ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.LEAGUE = 'OHL'

question: How many teams did the heaviest player drafted by Arizona Coyotes have played for?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.TEAM) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN weight_info AS T3 ON T1.weight = T3.weight_id WHERE T1.overallby = 'Arizona Coyotes' ORDER BY T3.weight_in_lbs DESC LIMIT 1

question: How tall is the player from Yale University who picked up 28 penalty minutes in the 2005-2006 season?
original_query: SELECT T3.height_in_cm FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN height_info AS T3 ON T2.height = T3.height_id WHERE T1.SEASON = '2005-2006' AND T1.TEAM = 'Yale Univ.' AND T1.PIM = 28

question: How many games did Per Mars play in the 1997-1998 season?
original_query: SELECT T2.GP FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.SEASON = '1997-1998' AND T1.PlayerName = 'Pavel Patera'

question: What is the average weight in pounds of all the players with the highest prospects for the draft?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.weight_in_lbs) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T1.CSS_rank = ( SELECT MAX(CSS_rank) FROM PlayerInfo )

question: List out the seasons that Niklas Eckerblom played.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SEASON FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Niklas Eckerblom'

question: How heavy is Matthias Trattnig in kilograms?
original_query: SELECT T2.weight_in_kg FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'Pavel Patera'

question: Among all players drafted by the Toronto Maple Leafs in 2008, identify the player with the highest prospects for the draft.
original_query: SELECT PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo WHERE overallby = 'Toronto Maple Leafs' AND draftyear = '2008' ORDER BY CSS_rank DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which team does Andreas Jamtin belong to?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.TEAM FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Andreas Jamtin'

question: What is the average height in centimeters of all the players in the position of defense?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.height_in_cm) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T1.position_info = 'D'

question: How many players who were drafted by the Toronto Maple Leafs have played over 300 games in their first 7 years of the NHL career?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo WHERE overallby = 'Toronto Maple Leafs' AND sum_7yr_GP > 300

question: Identify the name and position of the player who has committed the most rule violations.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName, T2.position_info FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.PIM = ( SELECT MAX(PIM) FROM SeasonStatus )

question: Which team has the most Swedish?
original_query: SELECT T.TEAM FROM ( SELECT T2.TEAM, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.nation = 'Sweden' GROUP BY T2.TEAM ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ELITEID) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T

question: What is the difference in the number of goals scored by Pavel Brendl during the regular season versus the playoffs in the 1998-1999 season?
original_query: SELECT T3.Rs_G - T4.Pf_G AS diff FROM ( SELECT T2.PlayerName, T1.G AS Rs_G FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Pavel Brendl' AND T1.SEASON = '1998-1999' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Regular Season' ) AS T3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T2.PlayerName, T1.G AS Pf_G FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Pavel Brendl' AND T1.SEASON = '1998-1999' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs' ) AS T4 ON T3.PlayerName = T4.PlayerName

question: Identify the players with the same height as Brian Gionta. How tall are they?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName, T1.height_in_cm FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T2.height = ( SELECT height FROM PlayerInfo WHERE PlayerName = 'Brian Gionta' )

question: Name the player and his team who made the playoffs in the 2006-2007 season of SuperElit league with the highest points.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName, T1.TEAM FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2006-2007' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'SuperElit' ORDER BY T1.P DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the players that are right-shooted, how many of them weigh over 90 kg?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90 AND T1.shoots = 'R'

question: List the names of all players from Avangard Omsk who played in the 2000-2001 season of the International league that have no goals in draft year.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'International' AND T1.TEAM = 'Czech Republic (all)' AND T1.G = 0

question: Name the Chilliwack Chiefs players who have scored 100 points or more in the NHL.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.TEAM = 'Chilliwack Chiefs' AND T1.P >= 100

question: List the names of all players from Avangard Omsk that have played for playoffs in season 2000-2001.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.TEAM = 'Avangard Omsk' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs'

question: List the names of all players in team Avangard Omsk in season 2000-2001.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.TEAM = 'Avangard Omsk'

question: Please list the names of all the players with a height of over 6'2" inches.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T2.height_in_inch > '6''2"'

question: What team did Niklas Eckerblom play in the 1997-1998 season?
original_query: SELECT T2.TEAM FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.SEASON = '1997-1998' AND T1.PlayerName = 'Niko Kapanen'

question: What are the attributes of the widest object in image 400?
original_query: SELECT T1.ATT_CLASS FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 400 ORDER BY T3.W DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which image has the highest number of "white" class attributes?
original_query: SELECT T1.IMG_ID AS IMGID FROM IMG_OBJ_att AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.ATT_CLASS = 'white' GROUP BY T1.IMG_ID ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ATT_CLASS_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many images have "picture" as their attribute class and "bear" as their object class?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.IMG_ID) FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'picture' AND T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'bear'

question: State the coordinate of X and Y for the object with the attribute of 'sparse' in image 1.
original_query: SELECT T3.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID, T3.X, T3.Y FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID WHERE T3.IMG_ID = 1 AND T1.ATT_CLASS = 'sparse'

question: Please list all the predicted relation classes of object sample no.14 in image no.1.
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = 14 AND T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 14

question: Count the image numbers that contain the "paint" object.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'paint'

question: How many samples of clouds are there in the image no.2315533?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.IMG_ID = 2315533 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'clouds'

question: For those objects that have multiple relations, how many images have a prediction class of "reading"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.PRED_CLASS = 'reading'

question: Calculate the average number of images with an attribute class of "keyboard".
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'keyboard'

question: How many images have at least 5 "black" classes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(IMGID) FROM ( SELECT T1.IMG_ID AS IMGID FROM IMG_OBJ_att AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.ATT_CLASS = 'black' GROUP BY T1.IMG_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.ATT_CLASS_ID) >= 5 ) T3

question: List all the ids of the images that have a self-relation relationship.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT IMG_ID FROM IMG_REL WHERE OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: What is the percentage of the object samples in the class of "man" in image no.1?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'man' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID) FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1

question: What is the ratio between the number of object samples in image 1 and the number of object samples in image 6?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN IMG_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN IMG_ID = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ

question: Give the object number of the sample which has the relationship of "lying on" with object sample no.1 from image no.2345524.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2345524 AND T1.PRED_CLASS = 'lying on' AND T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 1

question: What is the percentage of "surface" object samples in image No.2654?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'surface' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 2654

question: List all the corresponding classes for attributes of image id 8.
original_query: SELECT T2.ATT_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ_att AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 8

question: How many 'blue' attribute classes are there on image ID 2355735?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ATT_CLASS) FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2355735 AND T1.ATT_CLASS = 'blue'

question: What is the prediction class between object class 'chain' and 'label' in image 2360078?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T2.PRED_CLASS_ID = T1.PRED_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID AND T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T3.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 2360078 AND T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = 15 OR T1.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 18

question: Indicating the bounding box of "kitchen" in image id 250.
original_query: SELECT T1.X, T1.Y, T1.W, T1.H FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 250 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'kitchen'

question: Calculate the percentage of "airplane" object class in the table.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'airplane' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.OBJ_CLASS) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID

question: Calculate the average of object samples for the image.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ

question: Calculate the percentage of object samples that are related to street lights.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'street lights' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID

question: List out the number of object samples in image no.41 which are in the class of "kitchen"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'kitchen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 41

question: What is the predicate class of image ID 68?
original_query: SELECT T2.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 68

question: How many images have an x-coordinate of 5 and y-coordinate of 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE X = 5 AND Y = 5

question: On image no. 5, name the attributes that are composed of multiple objects.
original_query: SELECT T2.ATT_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 5 GROUP BY T2.ATT_CLASS HAVING COUNT(T2.ATT_CLASS) > 2

question: How many object elements are there on average in each image?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(OBJ_CLASS_ID) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ

question: In the Y coordinate of image ID 12, how many are 0?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 12 AND Y = 0

question: What is the bounding box of the object with image id 4 and a prediction relationship class id of 144?
original_query: SELECT T2.X, T2.Y, T2.W, T2.H FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.IMG_ID = T2.IMG_ID WHERE T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = 144 AND T1.IMG_ID = 3

question: List all the attribute classes of the image ID "15".
original_query: SELECT T1.ATT_CLASS FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 15

question: Write 10 coordinates with the object class "pizza."
original_query: SELECT T1.IMG_ID, T1.X, T1.Y FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'pizza' LIMIT 10

question: Give the number of samples in image no.2377985 whose attribute is electrical.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.ATT_CLASS = 'white' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 2347915

question: State the name of the object class that has in most images.
original_query: SELECT OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID GROUP BY T2.OBJ_CLASS ORDER BY COUNT(T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many images have at least 25 attributes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT IMG_ID FROM IMG_OBJ_att GROUP BY IMG_ID HAVING COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) > 25 ) T1

question: What is the most common object class of image ID 56?
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 56 GROUP BY T2.OBJ_CLASS ORDER BY COUNT(T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times is the number of images containing "broccoli" than "tomato"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'broccoli' THEN T2.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'tomato' THEN T2.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID ELSE NULL END) times FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID

question: How many images have at least one object sample in the class of "man"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.IMG_ID) FROM ( SELECT T2.IMG_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'man' GROUP BY T2.IMG_ID ) T

question: What are the x and y coordinates of all the images with a prediction relationship class id of 98?
original_query: SELECT T2.X, T2.Y FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.IMG_ID = T2.IMG_ID WHERE T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = 98

question: How many pairs of object samples in image no.1 have the relation of "parked on"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.PRED_CLASS = 'parked on' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1 AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID != OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: How many images have "picture" as their attribute class?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.IMG_ID) FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'picture'

question: How many images contain 'bridge' as an object element?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'bridge'

question: List the ID of all images with objects that have multiple relations.
original_query: SELECT IMG_ID FROM IMG_REL GROUP BY PRED_CLASS_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID) != 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID) != 0

question: What are the captions of all the self-relation relationship prediction classes?
original_query: SELECT T2.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN pred_classes AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T1.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID GROUP BY T2.PRED_CLASS

question: List all the explanations about object classes of all the images with an x and y coordinate of 0.
original_query: SELECT T1.OBJ_CLASS FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.X = 0 AND T2.Y = 0 GROUP BY T1.OBJ_CLASS

question: How many images have at least one pair of object samples with the relation "parked on"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.PRED_CLASS = 'parked on' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID != T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: How many object samples are there in image no.1?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 1

question: List attributes for object class 'tip' In image 1314.
original_query: SELECT T1.ATT_CLASS FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T3.IMG_ID = 1314 AND T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'tip'

question: Please list the IDs of the object samples in class no. 297 in image no.1.
original_query: SELECT OBJ_SAMPLE_ID FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 1 AND OBJ_CLASS_ID = 297

question: Give the number of images containing the object sample of "suit".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.IMG_ID) FROM ( SELECT T2.IMG_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'suit' GROUP BY T2.IMG_ID ) T

question: How many samples of animal objects are there in image no.660?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'animal' AND T1.IMG_ID = 660

question: What are the bounding boxes of the object samples with a predicted relation class of "by" in image no.1?
original_query: SELECT T3.X, T3.Y, T3.W, T3.H FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1 AND T1.PRED_CLASS = 'by'

question: What is the prediction relationship class id of the tallest image?
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS_ID FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.IMG_ID = T2.IMG_ID ORDER BY T2.H DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many object samples in image no.1 are in the class of "man"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'man' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1

question: Please list the classes of all the object samples in image no.1.
original_query: SELECT T1.OBJ_CLASS FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.OBJ_CLASS

question: Which object has the highest attribute classes?
original_query: SELECT OBJ_SAMPLE_ID FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT GROUP BY OBJ_SAMPLE_ID ORDER BY COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Based on image 5, what is the percentage of images that belong windows object class?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.IMG_ID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'windows'

question: What is the object whose attribute is blurry in image no.2377993? Give the explanation about the object.
original_query: SELECT T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID, T4.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ_att AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.ATT_CLASS = 'blurry' AND T1.IMG_ID = 22377993

question: How many attributes are related to the object sample no. 7 on image no. 4?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT WHERE IMG_ID = 4 AND OBJ_SAMPLE_ID = 7

question: How many images include the "wood" objects?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'wood'

question: How many white objects are there in image no.2347915?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.ATT_CLASS = 'white' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 2347915

question: Give the X and Y coordinates of the sample object of image ID 23 that has the 'cast' attribute class.
original_query: SELECT T3.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID, T3.X, T3.Y FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID WHERE T3.IMG_ID = 23 AND T1.ATT_CLASS = 'cast'

question: What object class is in the X and Y coordinates of 126 and 363?
original_query: SELECT T1.IMG_ID, T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.X = 126 AND T1.Y = 363

question: Which object in image 8 is the widest? State its object sample ID.
original_query: SELECT OBJ_SAMPLE_ID FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 8 ORDER BY W DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the image ID with a predicted class of "parked on"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.IMG_ID FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.PRED_CLASS = 'parked on'

question: State the total number of the attribute classes.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) FROM ATT_CLASSES

question: List all bounding box widths and heights of object sample ID 2.
original_query: SELECT W, H FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE OBJ_SAMPLE_ID = 2

question: What is the relationship between "feathers" and "onion" in image no.2345528?
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T3.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE (T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'feathers' OR T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'onion') AND T2.IMG_ID = 2345528 GROUP BY T1.PRED_CLASS

question: On image no. 99 identify the percentage of objects that are described as white.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.ATT_CLASS = 'white' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 99

question: What attributes are used to describe the wall on image no. 27.
original_query: SELECT T4.ATT_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.ATT_CLASS_ID = T4.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'wall' AND T1.IMG_ID = 27 GROUP BY T4.ATT_CLASS

question: Which biwords pair has a higher occurrence, "àbac-xinès" or "àbac-grec"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'xinès' ) ) > ( SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'grec' ) ) THEN 'àbac-xinès' ELSE 'àbac-grec' END AS CALUS FROM words LIMIT 1

question: Name the longest Catalan language Wikipedia page title and state the number of different words in this page.
original_query: SELECT title, words FROM pages WHERE title = ( SELECT MAX(LENGTH(title)) FROM pages )

question: What's the occurrence of the biwords pair whose first word is "àbac" and second word is "xinès"?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'xinès' )

question: What is the locale of the language of the page titled "Anys 90"?
original_query: SELECT T1.locale FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN pages AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T2.title = 'Anys 90'

question: How many Wikipedia pages are there on the language of the biwords pair "àbac-xinès"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.pages) FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T2.w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac' ) AND T2.w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'xinès' )

question: What is the locale of the language of the page titled "Abril"?
original_query: SELECT T1.locale FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN pages AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T2.title = 'Abril'

question: Indicate on how many different pages the word ripoll appears.
original_query: SELECT T3.page FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'ripoll'

question: Calculate the average number of the word occurrences in which ‘system’ appeared as the first word in the pair.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.occurrences) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st WHERE T2.w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'sistema' )

question: What are the word pairs that occured only twice?
original_query: SELECT T1.word, T3.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.occurrences = 2

question: How many biwords pairs are there whose second word is "grec"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.w1st) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T1.word = 'grec'

question: Which of these pages have more words, the page titled "Afluent" or "Asclepi"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT words FROM pages WHERE title = 'Asclepi' ) > ( SELECT words FROM pages WHERE title = 'Afluent' ) THEN 'Asclepi' ELSE 'Afluent' END

question: Please list the page IDs of all the Wikipedia pages that have the word "nombre" appeared on it.
original_query: SELECT T2.pid FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'nombre'

question: What is the title of the page that has the fewest words?
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE title = ( SELECT MIN(words) FROM pages )

question: Which word has the most appearances in the Wikipedia page with the title of "Agricultura"? Give the word ID.
original_query: SELECT T2.wid FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.title = 'Agricultura' ORDER BY T2.occurrences DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the occurrence of the word "nombre"?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM words WHERE word = 'nombre'

question: Calculate the average of repetitions in the pages that have a total of 100 different words.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.occurrences) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.page) FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.words = 100

question: List all the Catalan language wikipedia page title with less than 10 number of different words in these pages.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE words < 10

question: For the word "grec", what is the percentage of the appearances in the "Art" Wikipedia page have among all the appearances?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.title = 'Art' THEN T2.occurrences ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.occurrences) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'grec'

question: How many words are there on the page titled "Asclepi"?
original_query: SELECT words FROM pages WHERE title = 'Asclepi'

question: Which word has the most repetitions in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT T2.word FROM langs_words AS T1 INNER JOIN words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM langs_words )

question: How many more times does the first word in the biwords pair "àbac-xinès" occur than the biwords pair itself?
original_query: SELECT occurrences - ( SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'xinès' ) ) AS CALUS FROM words WHERE word = 'àbac'

question: How many times the word "desena" occurs?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM words WHERE word = 'desena'

question: How many words are repeated on the Llista de conflictes armats page?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM pages_words WHERE pid = ( SELECT pid FROM pages WHERE title = 'Llista de conflictes armats' )

question: Please list the titles of all the Wikipedia pages on the Catalan language with 10 different words.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 AND words = 10 LIMIT 10

question: How many times of repetition does the word "exemple" show in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT T2.occurrences FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'exemple' AND T2.lid = 1

question: What number of words are there on revision page 27457362?
original_query: SELECT words FROM pages WHERE revision = 27457362

question: What is the total occurrence of the biwords pairs with "àbac" as its first word?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.w1st) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T1.word = 'àbac'

question: For the biwords pair that appears "116430" times, what is the second word of the pair?
original_query: SELECT T1.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.occurrences = 116430

question: How many words are there on the page that the word "grec" has occurred for 52 times?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.words) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'grec' AND T2.occurrences = 52

question: Please list any three Wikipedia pages with more than 300 words.
original_query: SELECT page FROM pages WHERE words > 300 LIMIT 3

question: State the total pages of the words that has repeated times of 2593.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.pages) FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T2.occurrences = 2593

question: How many times greater is the appearances of the biword pair "a base" than "a decimal"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(occurrences AS REAL) / ( SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'a' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'decimal' ) ) FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'a' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'base' )

question: How many times did the word pair "i" and "a" appeared in the Cataln language/page?
original_query: SELECT SUM(occurrences) FROM biwords WHERE w1st = 86 AND w2nd = 109

question: What is the revision page ID of title "Aigua dolÃ§a"?
original_query: SELECT revision FROM pages WHERE title = 'Aigua dolÃ§a'

question: How many times did the word number 8 appear?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM words WHERE wid = 8

question: List all the first words of the biwords pair where the second word is 'antic'.
original_query: SELECT T1.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st WHERE T2.w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'antic' )

question: List down the revision page id of titles where "fresc" appears.
original_query: SELECT T3.revision FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'fresc'

question: What is the word id of the catalan language that was repeated no more than 10 times in the said language?
original_query: SELECT wid FROM langs_words WHERE occurrences <= 10

question: Which word has the most appearances in the Wikipedia page revision ID No. 28278070? Give the word ID.
original_query: SELECT pid FROM pages_words WHERE pid = ( SELECT pid FROM pages WHERE revision = 28278070 ) ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of the words that have been repeated under 180 times in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.occurrences < 180 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.lid) FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T1.lang = 'ca'

question: Which word has the most occurrences within the same page of wikipedia about Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT T1.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T2.occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM pages_words )

question: What is the total number of words in page containing pair of word id "100" and "317"?
original_query: SELECT words FROM langs WHERE lid = ( SELECT lid FROM biwords WHERE w1st = 100 AND w2nd = 317 )

question: How many biword pairs contain the word "base" as the second word?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(w1st) FROM biwords WHERE w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'base' )

question: Which Wikipedia page number does the Catalan language's name, Acampada, appear on?
original_query: SELECT page FROM pages WHERE title = 'Acampada'

question: What is the average occurrence of the word "grec" on each Wikipedia page that has this word?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.occurrences) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.wid) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'grec'

question: What is the average words of the 10 fewest words title?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN words >= 10 THEN words ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN words >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM pages

question: How many times does the biwords "que gregorio" appear in the language?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'que' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'gregorio' )

question: What is the title of the Catalan language Wikipedia page that has the highest number of different words?
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE words = ( SELECT MAX(words) FROM pages )

question: What is the locale of the language of the page titled "Asclepi"?
original_query: SELECT T2.locale FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN langs AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T1.title = 'Asclepi'

question: State the name of the pair of word that have id of 20 and 50?
original_query: SELECT T1.word, T3.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.w1st = 20 AND T2.w2nd = 50

question: What are the words that were paired with "John", list down 10 of them.
original_query: SELECT w2nd FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'john' ) LIMIT 10

question: List out the title of the word have id less than 20.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T2.wid < 20

question: What is the word pair that occured the highest amount of times in Addicio? Indicate how many times such word pair occured.
original_query: SELECT T3.w1st, T3.w2nd, T3.occurrences FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid INNER JOIN biwords AS T3 ON T2.wid = T3.w1st OR T2.wid = T3.w2nd WHERE T1.title = 'Addicio' ORDER BY T3.occurrences DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Wikipedia pages with over 4000 different words are there on the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(lid) FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 AND words > 4000

question: How many times does the Catalan word "nombre" repeat itself?
original_query: SELECT T1.occurrences FROM langs_words AS T1 INNER JOIN words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T2.word = 'nombre'

question: In the Catalan language, which biwords pair appeared the most in this language/page?
original_query: SELECT w1st, w2nd FROM biwords WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM biwords )

question: What is the wikipedia page id of Arqueozoologia?
original_query: SELECT page FROM pages WHERE title = 'Arqueozoologia'

question: How many words have repetitions greater than 2000 and lower than 5000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(wid) FROM langs_words WHERE occurrences BETWEEN '2000' AND '5000'

question: Please list the Catalan words with an occurrence of over 200000.
original_query: SELECT word FROM words WHERE occurrences > 200000

question: Which word has the time of occurrences as 340691?
original_query: SELECT word FROM words WHERE occurrences = 340691

question: Indicate the title of all the pages in which the word comunitat appears.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'comunitat'

question: How many word appeared 8 times? State the language id of the page.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.wid), T1.lid FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T2.occurrences = 8

question: How many Wikipedia pages on Catalan are there with the word "nombre" appearing for more than 5 times?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.pid) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'nombre' AND T2.occurrences > 5

question: List out the total pages of the words that has repeated times more than 3000.
original_query: SELECT T1.pages FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T2.occurrences > 3000 GROUP BY T1.pages

question: How many times does the word "riu" appears in the biwords pair?
