original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.wid) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T1.word = 'riu'

question: What are the occurance of word "del" in title "Any anomalÃ­stic"?
original_query: SELECT T2.occurrences FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'del' AND T3.title = 'Any anomalÃ­stic'

question: List the page id of wikipedia about Catalan language which have the appearance of the word 'decimal'?
original_query: SELECT T2.pid FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'decimal'

question: What is the title of corpus with most words?
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE words = ( SELECT MAX(words) FROM pages )

question: How many episodes are there in the 9th season of Law and Order? Calculate the average number of casts per season of the said series.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.season = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.season = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.category = 'Cast' AND T2.series = 'Law and Order'

question: Who are the actors with a height of over 1.80m in an episode that won an award?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.result = 'Winner' AND T2.height_meters > 1.80

question: How many awards did the "Agony" win?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.award) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Agony' AND T2.result = 'Winner'

question: Who is the person who appeared the most in the series? Calculate in percentage how many times he or she appeared.
original_query: SELECT T2.person_id, CAST(COUNT(T2.person_id) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) AS num FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id ) AS per FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id GROUP BY T2.person_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many winners have been awarded a Television award by the "American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(award_id) FROM Award WHERE result = 'Winner' AND award = 'Television' AND organization = 'American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts'

question: How many episodes have not won any Law & Order series awards?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(award_id) FROM Award WHERE Result = 'Nominee'

question: What is the average ranking episodes that are nominated for an award?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.rating) / COUNT(T1.episode) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id

question: How many people gave the most enjoyed episode a 10-star rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10

question: Who was the nominee playing the role of Katrina Ludlow in the Law & Order series?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.result = 'Nominee' AND T1.role = 'Katrina Ludlow' AND T1.series = 'Law and Order'

question: Among the American casts, how many were uncredited on episode ID tt0629228?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.episode_id = 'tt0629228' AND T1.category = 'Cast' AND T1.credited = 'false' AND T2.birth_country = 'USA'

question: How many people, who were born in Canada, won an award in 1999?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.year = 1999 AND T1.birth_country = 'Canada'

question: What was the role of Jason Kuschner in episode 9?
original_query: SELECT T1.role FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id INNER JOIN Episode AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T3.episode = 9 AND T2.name = 'Jason Kuschner'

question: How many awards has Rene Balcer been nominated for?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.award_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.name = 'Rene Balcer'

question: How many votes did the episode titled "Cherished" get in total?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.votes) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Cherished'

question: Who was nominated for award no.313? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.award_id = 313

question: In which episodes was Anthony Azzara not credited?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.credited = 'false' AND T3.name = 'Anthony Azzara'

question: Describe what happened in the episode of award no.296.
original_query: SELECT T1.summary FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.award_id = 296

question: How many people have won at least 3 awards?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.result = 'Winner' GROUP BY T1.person_id HAVING COUNT(T2.award_id) >= 3

question: Where is the place of birth of the actor with the number nm0007064 who has not been credited for playing the role of a "Narrator"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.birth_place FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_id = 'nm0007064' AND T2.role = 'Narrator' AND T2.credited = 'false'

question: Which episode number has the second highest positive viewer comments and has been awarded "Best Television Episode"?
original_query: SELECT T2.episode_id FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.award = 'Best Television Episode' AND T1.result = 'Winner' ORDER BY T2.rating DESC LIMIT 2

question: How many times was episode 20 of the Law and Order series nominated for the Primetime Emmy Awards in 1999?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.award_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.year = 1999 AND T2.result = 'Nominee' AND T1.episode = 20 AND T2.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND T1.series = 'Law and Order'

question: Which episode was nominated for the award for "Outstanding Costume Design for a Series"?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.award = 'Outstanding Costume Design for a Series'

question: In which organization did Constantine Makris win the most awards?
original_query: SELECT T2.organization FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.name = 'Constantine Makris' AND T2.result = 'Winner' GROUP BY T2.organization ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many 6-star votes did episode 12 get? Please include the air date and rating.
original_query: SELECT T2.air_date, T2.rating FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.stars = 6 AND T2.episode = 12

question: Calculate the average number of cast members that appeared in the credit from the 185th to the 193rd episode.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.episode_id) AS REAL) / (193 - 185 + 1) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.category = 'Cast' AND T1.credited = 'true' AND T2.number_in_series BETWEEN 185 AND 193

question: How many people did not enjoy the finale episode?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.episode = 24 AND T2.stars = 1

question: Which episodes of the Law & Order have been nominated for the Primetime Emmy Awards?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT episode_id FROM Award WHERE award_category = 'Primetime Emmy'

question: Display the number of 9-star votes the episode Sideshow received.
original_query: SELECT T2.votes FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 9 AND T1.title = 'Sideshow'

question: What is the average rating for each episode in season 9?
original_query: SELECT SUM(rating) / COUNT(episode_id) FROM Episode WHERE season = 9

question: Please list the titles of all the episodes in which Park Dietz was credited.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.credited = 'true' AND T3.name = 'Park Dietz'

question: For how many times was Park Dietz credited?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.person_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.credited = 'true' AND T3.name = 'Park Dietz'

question: What is the full place of birth of Rene Chenevert Balcer?
original_query: SELECT birth_place, birth_region FROM Person WHERE birth_name = 'Rene Chenevert Balcer'

question: What are the keywords of the "Shield" episode?
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Shield'

question: What roles have not been credited at the end of the episodes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT role FROM Credit WHERE credited = 'false'

question: Who is the narrator of the "Flight" episode?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Flight' AND T2.role = 'Narrator'

question: Who is the stunt coordinator in episode 3?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.episode = 3 AND T2.role = 'stunt coordinator'

question: What is the episode rating with the most award won?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.result = 'Winner' GROUP BY T1.episode_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times is the number of keywords in "Refuge: Part 1" episode than "Shield" episode?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'Refuge: Part 1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'Shield' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id

question: Who was credited as "technical advisor" in the episode titled "Cherished"?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Cherished' AND T2.credited = 'true' AND T2.role = 'technical advisor'

question: How many 10-star votes were given to the episode titled "Cherished"?
original_query: SELECT T2.votes FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Cherished' AND T2.stars = 10

question: What percentage of people have worked on the True North episode as additional crew?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.role = 'Additional Crew' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL ) * 100 / COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'True North'

question: In what year did the episodes titled DWB get an award?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.year FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.title = 'DWB' AND T1.result = 'Winner'

question: What is the title of the episode that has the highest number of crews in the Art Department?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.category = 'Art Department' GROUP BY T2.episode_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.category) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which episode has the two keywords "nun" and "priest"?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.keyword IN ('nun', 'priest')

question: What is the title of the episode with the most nominations?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.result = 'Nominee' GROUP BY T2.episode_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.result) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many votes did the episode titled Juvenile get?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.votes) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Juvenile'

question: What is the name of the actors born in the USA?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE birth_country = 'USA'

question: What are the names of the person that were not credited at the end of episode tt0629391?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.credited = 'false' AND T1.episode_id = 'tt0629391'

question: How many stars did the episodes in which Donna Villella worked?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.person_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T3.name = 'Donna Villella'

question: What is the difference of 10 stars votes between the first episode and the last episode?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.episode = 24 THEN T1.votes ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.episode = 1 THEN T1.votes ELSE 0 END) FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.stars = 10

question: How many people from Canada are nominated for an award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.birth_country = 'Canada'

question: Write down the title, summary, and air date of the episode that garnered 72 10-star votes.
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T2.summary, T2.air_date FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.stars = 10 AND T1.votes = 72

question: What is the average star rating of the episodes Jim Bracchitta has worked on?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T3.stars) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.episode_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN Vote AS T3 ON T2.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T3.stars = 1 AND T1.name = 'Jim Bracchitta'

question: How many keywords are there for season 9, episode 23 of law_and_order?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.keyword) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.season = 9 AND T1.episode = 23

question: Who played the role of a teleplay in the episode that won "Best Television Episode"?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.result = 'Winner' AND T1.award = 'Best Television Episode'

question: What is the episode that has mafia keyword?
original_query: SELECT T1.episode FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.Keyword = 'mafia'

question: List the titles and air dates of episodes that were produced by Billy Fox.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.air_date FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.category = 'Produced by' AND T2.role = 'producer' AND T3.name = 'Billy Fox'

question: Which current legislator has served for more terms, Sherrod Brown or Maria Cantwell?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T1.official_full_name = 'Maria Cantwell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN T1.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'Maria Cantwell' ELSE 'Sherrod Brown' END FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide

question: Find the difference between the number of female senators and representatives born between 1930 to 1970.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.type = 'sen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.type = 'rep' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F' AND strftime('%Y', T1.birthday_bio) BETWEEN '1930' AND '1970'

question: What is the username of the current official Facebook presence of current legislator Todd Young?
original_query: SELECT T1.facebook FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.official_full_name = 'Todd Young'

question: What is the full official name of the current legislator that has served for the most number of terms?
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide GROUP BY T1.official_full_name, T2.bioguide ORDER BY COUNT(T2.bioguide) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For how many terms have the oldest current legislator served?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.bioguide) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.birthday_bio = ( SELECT MIN(birthday_bio) FROM current )

question: What is the middle name of the legislator whose birthday was on 8/24/1956?
original_query: SELECT middle_name FROM current WHERE birthday_bio = '1956-08-24'

question: Based on the number of current legislators, calculate the percentage of legislators that served in 21st-Century.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.start) BETWEEN '2000' AND '2017' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.bioguide_id) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide

question: Among the legislators who have served in the U.S. House, provide the party and the state of the legislators who were born in 1738.
original_query: SELECT T1.party, T1.state FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.house_history_id IS NOT NULL AND T2.birthday_bio LIKE '%1738%'

question: How many female representatives are there in Michigan?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.bioguide_id) FROM ( SELECT T1.bioguide_id FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.type = 'rep' AND T2.state = 'MI' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F' GROUP BY T1.bioguide_id ) T

question: Which historical female legislator that have their term ended on the 3rd of March 1791?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.end = '1791-03-03' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: Among legislators who have an Instagram account, list down their full names and nicknames who have a Thomas ID of less than 1000.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name, T1.nickname_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T2.instagram IS NOT NULL AND T1.thomas_id < 1000

question: List all the representatives in 1789 along with the districts and state.
original_query: SELECT T2.district, T2.state FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.start LIKE '1789%'

question: Provide the google entity ID of the senators in New York.
original_query: SELECT T1.google_entity_id_id FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.type = 'sen' AND T2.state = 'NY'

question: Give the religion of the legislator with RSS url of http://www.corker.senate.gov/public/index.cfm/rss/feed.
original_query: SELECT T1.religion_bio FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.rss_url = 'http://www.corker.senate.gov/public/index.cfm/rss/feed' GROUP BY T1.religion_bio

question: Among all the current female legislators, how many of them have attended in Senate roll call votes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(lis_id) FROM current WHERE gender_bio = 'F' AND lis_id IS NOT NULL

question: What is the Twitter ID of Emanuel Cleaver?
original_query: SELECT T1.twitter_id FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.first_name = 'Emanuel' AND T2.last_name = 'Cleaver'

question: Calculate the percentage of the total number of current female legislators and past female legislators. State which one has the highest value.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN current.gender_bio = 'F' THEN current.bioguide_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN historical.gender_bio = 'F' THEN historical.bioguide_id ELSE NULL END) FROM historical ) FROM current

question: Among the female legislators, what is the percentage of the senators in Maine?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.type = 'sen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.type) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.state = 'ME' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: What is the ratio between famous current legislators and famous historical legislators?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN wikipedia_id IS NOT NULL THEN bioguide_id ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN wikipedia_id IS NOT NULL THEN bioguide_id ELSE 0 END) FROM historical ) FROM current

question: Give the type and start date of the term of the legislator born on November 26, 1727.
original_query: SELECT T2.type, T2.start FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.birthday_bio = '1727-11-26'

question: How many female legislators become representatives for California in 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.start) = '2015' AND T2.state = 'CA' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: Give the state and type of term of the legislator with the google entity ID of kg:/m/02pyzk.
original_query: SELECT T2.state, T2.type FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.google_entity_id_id = 'kg:/m/02pyzk'

question: What is the current official Twitter handle of Roger F. Wicker?
original_query: SELECT T2.twitter FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Roger F. Wicker'

question: List all the Jewish current legislators that had served in Florida.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.religion_bio = 'Jewish' AND T2.state = 'FL' GROUP BY T1.first_name, T1.last_name

question: What is the district number that Chris Van Hollen serving?
original_query: SELECT T2.district FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Chris Van Hollen' AND T2.district IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T2.district

question: What is the party and state of the legislator that has an open secrets ID of N00003689 and thomas ID of 186?
original_query: SELECT T2.party, T2.state FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.opensecrets_id = 'N00003689' AND T1.thomas_id = 186 GROUP BY T2.party, T2.state

question: Calculate the percentage of famous_legislatorss.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN wikipedia_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(bioguide_id) FROM historical

question: List the official full names and genders of legislators who have Collins as their last name.
original_query: SELECT official_full_name, gender_bio FROM current WHERE last_name = 'Collins'

question: Give the religion of the legislator whose YouTube name is MaxineWaters.
original_query: SELECT T2.religion_bio FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T1.youtube = 'MaxineWaters'

question: How many females were members of the past legislators?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM historical WHERE gender_bio = 'F'

question: Write the full names of junior ranked Republicans.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Republican' AND T2.state_rank = 'junior' GROUP BY T1.official_full_name

question: What is the first name of the legislator whose address at 1005 Longworth HOB; Washington DC 20515-1408?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.address = '1005 Longworth HOB Washington DC 20515-1408' GROUP BY T1.first_name

question: Calculate the average number of current male legislators who chose Democrat from 2000 until 2021.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.bioguide_id) AS REAL) / 22 FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'M' AND CAST(T2.start AS DATE) >= 2000 AND CAST(T2.END AS DATE) <= 2021 AND T2.party = 'Democrat'

question: List out the first name of legislators who are senior Senator.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.state_rank = 'senior' GROUP BY T1.first_name

question: How many official social media does Mark Warner have?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T1.facebook IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END + CASE WHEN T1.instagram IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END + CASE WHEN T1.twitter IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END + CASE WHEN T1.youtube IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS COUNTSOCIAL FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Mark' AND T2.last_name = 'Warner'

question: What is the google entity ID of current legislator Sherrod Brown?
original_query: SELECT google_entity_id_id FROM current WHERE official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown'

question: How many Federalist representatives are there whose first names are Benjamin?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.bioguide_id) FROM ( SELECT T1.bioguide_id FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'Benjamin' AND T2.party = 'Federalist' AND T2.type = 'rep' GROUP BY T1.bioguide_id ) AS T

question: Please list the official full names of all the current legislators who do not have an account on C-SPAN's video website.
original_query: SELECT official_full_name FROM current WHERE cspan_id IS NULL OR cspan_id = ''

question: How many of the legislators are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE gender_bio = 'M'

question: List the full name of legislators whose born in 1960.
original_query: SELECT official_full_name FROM current WHERE birthday_bio LIKE '1960%'

question: What is the total number of senators New Jersey have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(type) FROM `historical-terms` WHERE state = 'NJ' AND type = 'rep'

question: List the full name of all current female senators.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.type = 'sen' AND T2.gender_bio = 'F' GROUP BY T2.ballotpedia_id

question: State the number of female legislators in the list.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE gender_bio = 'F'

question: How many legislators have an Instagram account?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `social-media` WHERE instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram <> ''

question: Give the full name of legislators who have accounts on OpenSecrets.org.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE opensecrets_id IS NOT NULL AND opensecrets_id <> ''

question: What are the Facebook, Twitter and YouTube usernames of Adam Kinzinger?
original_query: SELECT T2.facebook FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Adam Kinzinger'

question: What is the party of the oldest legislator?
original_query: SELECT T1.party FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide ORDER BY T2.birthday_bio LIMIT 1

question: List the full names, Twitter IDs, and YouTube IDs of legislators who have Richard as their first name.
original_query: SELECT T2.official_full_name, T1.twitter_id, T1.youtube_id FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Richard'

question: What is the religion with the most occurrrence of the current legislators?
original_query: SELECT religion_bio FROM current GROUP BY religion_bio ORDER BY COUNT(religion_bio) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many current legislators do not have an account on ballotpedia.org ?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE ballotpedia_id = '' OR ballotpedia_id IS NULL

question: How many districts did John Conyers, Jr. serve in total?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.district) FROM ( SELECT T2.district FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'John Conyers, Jr.' GROUP BY T2.district ) T3

question: Compare the number of legislators who started the term in 1875 and 2005.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN `current-terms`.start LIKE '2005%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN start LIKE '1875%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `historical-terms` ) FROM `current-terms`

question: State all the district that Benjamin Contee has served before.
original_query: SELECT T2.district FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'Benjamin' AND T1.last_name = 'Contee'

question: How many historical legislators were born in 1973?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM historical WHERE CAST(birthday_bio AS date) = 1973

question: Give the Wikipedia IDs of historical legislators who are Readjuster Democrats.
original_query: SELECT T2.wikipedia_id FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.party = 'Readjuster Democrat'

question: How many current legislators were born after the year 1960?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide_id) FROM current WHERE birthday_bio >= '1961-01-01'

question: Which current legislator is older, Sherrod Brown or Maria Cantwell?
original_query: SELECT official_full_name FROM current WHERE official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown' OR official_full_name = 'Maria Cantwell' ORDER BY birthday_bio LIMIT 1

question: List the official full names of 10 legislators who have a YouTube account but no Instagram account.
original_query: SELECT T2.official_full_name FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T1.facebook IS NOT NULL AND (T1.instagram IS NULL OR T1.instagram = '') LIMIT 10

question: How many of the legislators are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(gender_bio) FROM current WHERE gender_bio = 'F'

question: Calculate the percentage of legislators who are Senator and were born in 1964.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.class IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.birthday_bio LIKE '%1964%'

question: List the IDs and full names of legislators from the Liberal Republican party.
original_query: SELECT T2.bioguide_id, T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.party = 'Liberal Republican'

question: Among all the female current legislators, how many of them have served for more than 4 terms?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CID) FROM ( SELECT T1.bioguide_id AS CID FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F' GROUP BY T2.bioguide HAVING COUNT(T2.bioguide) > 4 )

question: To which current legislator does twitter ID234128524 belong? Please give his or her full official name.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T2.twitter_id = 234128524

question: What is the contact form of the legislator named Rick Crawford?
original_query: SELECT T2.contact_form FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Rick Crawford'

question: List the full names, religions, and parties of legislators who have served in Maine.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name, T2.relation, T2.party FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.state = 'ME' GROUP BY T1.official_full_name, T2.relation, T2.party

question: How many times did Richard Durbin become a legislator in district 20?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.district = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'Richard' AND T1.last_name = 'Durbin'

question: Please list the official full names of all the current legislators who have served in the U.S. House.
original_query: SELECT official_full_name FROM current WHERE house_history_id IS NOT NULL

question: What is the average number of terms for a current female legislator?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bioguide) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.bioguide_id) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: What is the total number of legislators with "John" as their first name?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE first_name = 'John'

question: List all the junior senators in 1997.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.start LIKE '1997%' AND T2.state_rank = 'junior'

question: Who is the Pro-Administration senator that runs from March 4, 1789 to December 31, 1791?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Pro-Administration' AND T2.start = '1789-03-04' AND T2.end = '1791-12-31'

question: How many current legislators have both accounts on both VoteView.com and maplight.org?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE icpsr_id IS NOT NULL AND maplight_id IS NOT NULL

question: Please list the current official YouTube usernames of all the current female legislators.
original_query: SELECT T2.youtube FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: For which state did current legislator Sherrod Brown serve during his term that started on 1993/1/5?
original_query: SELECT T1.state FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.start = '1993-01-05' AND T2.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown'

question: List the full names of Republican legislators who have a nickname.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Republican' AND T1.nickname_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.official_full_name

question: Among all the current female legislators, how many of them have not been registered in Federal Election Commission data?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE (fec_id IS NULL OR fec_id = '') AND gender_bio = 'F'

question: What is the current official Youtube username of Chris Van Hollen?
original_query: SELECT T2.youtube FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Chris Van Hollen'

question: Give the full name of the legislators with an independent party.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Independent' GROUP BY T1.official_full_name

question: What type of political party Sherrod Brown has in 2005?
original_query: SELECT T1.party FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.first_name = 'Sherrod' AND T2.last_name = 'Brown' AND T1.start LIKE '%2005%'

question: What is the birthday of Amy Klobuchar?
original_query: SELECT birthday_bio FROM current WHERE first_name = 'Amy' AND last_name = 'Klobuchar'

question: List the full names of 10 legislators who only have a Facebook account.
original_query: SELECT T2.official_full_name FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE (T1.youtube IS NULL OR T1.youtube = '') AND (T1.instagram IS NULL OR T1.instagram = '') AND (T1.twitter IS NULL OR T1.twitter = '') AND T1.facebook IS NOT NULL AND T1.facebook != ''

question: Give the YouTube ID of the channel 'RepWassermanSchultz.'
original_query: SELECT youtube_id FROM `social-media` WHERE youtube = 'RepWassermanSchultz'

question: What is the gender of the legislator whose address at 317 Russell Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510?
original_query: SELECT T1.gender_bio FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.address = '317 Russell Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510'

question: Provide the type and end date of the term of the legislator named John Vining.
original_query: SELECT T2.type, T2.end FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'John' AND T1.last_name = 'Vining'

question: Which state did Veronica Grace Boland represent and which party is she affiliated?
original_query: SELECT T2.state, T2.party FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name OR T1.middle_name OR T1.last_name = 'VeronicaGraceBoland'

question: Among the Independent senators that started their term in 2011 and onwards, what are the official full names of the senators that caucused with the Democrat?
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Independent' AND strftime('%Y', T2.start) >= '2011' AND T2.type = 'sen' AND T2.caucus = 'Democrat'

question: When was the last serving date of Matt Salmon?
original_query: SELECT T1.END FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.official_full_name = 'Matt Salmon'

question: Calculate the percentage of legislators who are not Senator and were born before 1975.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.class IS NULL THEN T1.bioguide_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.bioguide_id) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE CAST(T1.birthday_bio AS DATE) <= 1975

question: Among respondents who participated in the survey in 2016, what percentage had a mental health disorder in the past?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.SurveyID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.QuestionID = 32 AND T1.SurveyID = 2016

question: In 2019, how many users in the United States have a family history of mental illness?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T2.questionid FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.SurveyID = 2019 AND T2.questionid = 6 AND T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' ) AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.SurveyID = 2019 AND T2.questionid = 3 AND T1.AnswerText LIKE 'United States'

question: How many users lived in Canada according to 2018's survey?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2018 AND T1.questiontext = 'What country do you live in?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Canada'

question: How many female users were surveyed in the mental health survey for 2017 in the state of Nebraska?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T2.UserID FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID INNER JOIN Survey AS T3 ON T2.SurveyID = T3.SurveyID WHERE T3.Description = 'mental health survey for 2017' AND T1.questionid = 2 AND T2.AnswerText = 'Female' UNION SELECT T2.UserID FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID INNER JOIN Survey AS T3 ON T2.SurveyID = T3.SurveyID WHERE T1.questionid = 4 AND T2.AnswerText = 'Nebraska' AND T3.Description = 'mental health survey for 2017' )

question: List the top three popular responses to the question of the survey in 2017 with the question ID no.85.
original_query: SELECT AnswerText FROM Answer WHERE QuestionID = 85 AND SurveyID = 2017 GROUP BY AnswerText ORDER BY COUNT(AnswerText) DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many users answered the question No.20?
original_query: SELECT MAX(UserID) - MIN(UserID) + 1 FROM Answer WHERE QuestionID = 20

question: What is the average age of the survey respondents in the United States?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.AnswerText) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T1.UserID FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 3 AND T1.AnswerText = 'United States' ) AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID INNER JOIN Question AS T3 ON T1.QuestionID = T3.questionid WHERE T3.questionid = 1

question: What is the oldest age of the users in 2014's survey?
original_query: SELECT T2.AnswerText FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T1.questiontext = 'What is your age?' AND T2.SurveyID = 2014 ORDER BY T2.AnswerText DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many respondents younger than 25 years old did participate in the survey in 2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.QuestionID = 1 AND T1.SurveyID = 2016 AND T1.AnswerText <= 25

question: Please list all the answers to the question "Any additional notes or comments" that are not null in 2014's survey.
original_query: SELECT T2.AnswerText FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T1.questiontext = 'Any additional notes or comments' AND T2.SurveyID = 2014 AND T2.AnswerText <> -1

question: State the number of questions that were asked in the "mental health survey for 2018".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.QuestionID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2018'

question: How many questions were asked in the questionary for the mental health survey?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(questiontext) FROM Question

question: Which country have the least number of users being surveyed? Indicate the name of the country. If there are multiple countries having the same number of users, indicate all of their names.
original_query: SELECT T1.AnswerText FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 3 GROUP BY T1.AnswerText ORDER BY COUNT(T1.UserID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of respondents per survey between 2014 and 2019?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(SurveyID) AS REAL) / 5 FROM Answer WHERE SurveyID BETWEEN 2014 AND 2019

question: What was the most common answer for the question "What country do you work in?"?
original_query: SELECT T1.AnswerText FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext = 'What country do you work in?' GROUP BY T1.AnswerText ORDER BY COUNT(T1.AnswerText) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Betweeen 2016 to 2019, which year recorded the highest number of people with mental illness?
original_query: SELECT T1.SurveyID FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.SurveyID BETWEEN 2016 AND 2019 AND T2.questionid = 34 AND T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' GROUP BY T1.SurveyID ORDER BY COUNT(T1.UserID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For which question did the user No.2183 gave the answer "Mood Disorder (Depression, Bipolar Disorder, etc)"?
original_query: SELECT T1.AnswerText FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 2183 AND T1.AnswerText = 'Mood Disorder (Depression, Bipolar Disorder, etc)'

question: How many users believed that their productivity is ever affected by a mental health issue overall?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 54 AND T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes'

question: How many people wrote comments for the question "Any additional notes or comments."?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'Any additional notes or comments' AND T1.AnswerText IS NOT NULL

question: What answer did user No. 2681 give to the question "Do you currently have a mental health disorder?"?
original_query: SELECT T1.AnswerText FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext = 'Do you currently have a mental health disorder?' AND T1.UserID = 2681

question: Tell the question ID for "Would you bring up a physical health issue with a potential employer in an interview?".
original_query: SELECT questionid FROM Question WHERE questiontext LIKE 'Would you bring up a physical health issue with a potential employer in an interview?'

question: How many questions did user No.5 answer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(QuestionID) FROM Answer WHERE UserID = 5

question: What is the percentage of the the users who would bring up a mental health issue with a potential employer in an interview?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 12

question: Please list all the common questions in 2014's survey and 2016's survey.
original_query: SELECT T1.questiontext FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID IN (2014, 2016) GROUP BY T1.questiontext

question: How many users, between the age 27 to 35, were surveyed in 2018?
original_query: SELECT T1.UserID FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.SurveyID = 2018 AND T2.questionid = 1 AND T1.AnswerText BETWEEN '27' AND '35'

question: What is the average page number of the menus that have the dish "Clear green turtle"?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.page_number) FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Clear green turtle'

question: Calculate the total price of items for menu with ID 12882.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.price) FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id WHERE T1.menu_id = 12882

question: Among the menus in which the dish "Clear green turtle" had appeared, how many of them did not support taking out or booking in advance?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T4.name = 'Clear green turtle' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T3.call_number IS NULL

question: How many dishes are there on the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id

question: What is the average number of dishes per menu page of menu ID12882?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(dish_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(T3.page_count) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id WHERE T2.menu_id = 12882

question: Among the dishes on menu page ID 7610, list the names and highest prices of the dishes in menu items that were created on 23rd May 2011.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T2.price FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T2.created_at LIKE '2011-05-23%' ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the ID of the menu with the most number of dishes?
original_query: SELECT id FROM Menu ORDER BY dish_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the menu pages on which the dish "Paysanne Soup" had appeared, how many of them had a stable price for the dish?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Paysanne Soup' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.highest_price IS NULL

question: Tally the dishes that have appeared on the menu for more than 100 years.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.last_appeared - T1.first_appeared > 100

question: Please list the IDs of all the menus in which the dish "Clear green turtle" had appeared.
original_query: SELECT T1.menu_id FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Clear green turtle'

question: Write down the top ten menus with the highest dish count.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Menu GROUP BY name ORDER BY dish_count DESC LIMIT 10

question: Write down the image ID, full height, and full width of the menu that were used in the "100TH ANNIVERSARY OF BIRTH OF DANIEL WEBSTER" event.
original_query: SELECT T1.image_id, T1.full_height, T1.full_width FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T2.event = '100TH ANNIVERSARY OF BIRTH OF DANIEL WEBSTER'

question: Calculate the image area of the page menu for the dish named "Baked Stuffed Mullet & Sauce Pomard". Please include the page number and image ID.
original_query: SELECT T1.full_height * T1.full_width, T1.page_number, T1.image_id FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Baked Stuffed Mullet & Sauce Pomard'

question: How many percent of Bluefish dishes are located at the center of the menu page?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.xpos BETWEEN 0.25 AND 0.75 AND T2.ypos BETWEEN 0.25 AND 0.75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.id) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name LIKE '%BLuefish%'

question: Among the dishes, how many of them are for free?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Dish WHERE lowest_price = 0

question: How many pages are there in the "Emil Kuehn" menu?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Emil Kuehn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id

question: Among the menus that did not support taking out or booking in advance, how many of them were created before 1950?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE call_number IS NULL AND strftime('%Y', date) < '1950'

question: List the positions of the dish "breaded veal cutlet with peas" on every menu where it appeared.
original_query: SELECT T2.xpos, T2.ypos FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'breaded veal cutlet with peas'

question: For how many times had the dish "Chicken gumbo" appeared on a menu page?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Chicken gumbo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id

question: List the dishes that appeared at the left upper corner of the CHAS.BRADLEY'S OYSTER & DINING ROOM"s sponsored menu.
original_query: SELECT T4.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T3.sponsor = 'CHAS.BRADLEY''S OYSTER & DINING ROOM' AND T1.xpos < 0.25 AND T1.ypos < 0.25

question: List down the image IDs for menu located at Manhattan Hotel.
original_query: SELECT T1.image_id FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T2.location = 'Manhattan Hotel'

question: Which menu page of "Ritz Carlton" has the biggest height?
original_query: SELECT T1.page_number FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T2.name = 'Ritz Carlton' ORDER BY T1.full_height DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the dish that appeared on the upper left corner on menu page no. 1389?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T2.menu_page_id = 1389 AND T2.xpos < 0.25 AND T2.ypos < 0.25

question: How many menus include puree of split peas aux croutons?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Puree of split peas aux croutons' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id

question: Among the menu pages of "Ritz Carlton", how many of them have a width of over 1000?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Ritz Carlton' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T2.full_width > 1000

question: What is the position coordinate on the page menu of the "Small Hominy" dish and how long did it appear?
original_query: SELECT T2.xpos, T2.ypos, T1.last_appeared - T1.first_appeared FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Small Hominy'

question: State the full height and width for menu called "El Fuerte Del Palmar".
original_query: SELECT T1.full_height, T1.full_width FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T2.name = 'El Fuerte Del Palmar'

question: What is the average price of the dishes on the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.price) / COUNT(T1.price) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace'

question: What is the average number of dishes per menu in the Souper de Luxe menus? Identify what is the name of the dish that appeared the most in all of its menus.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*), T1.dish_id FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T3.name = 'Souper de Luxe' GROUP BY T3.id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.dish_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: On 1887-07-21, what was the event that lead to the creation of menu id 21380?
original_query: SELECT event FROM Menu WHERE date = '1887-07-21' AND id = 21380

question: How much is the price of menu with image ID 4000009194?
original_query: SELECT T3.price FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.menu_page_id WHERE T2.image_id = 4000009194

question: List down the locations of menu sponsored by Norddeutscher Lloyd Bremen.
original_query: SELECT location FROM Menu WHERE sponsor = 'Norddeutscher Lloyd Bremen'

question: How many dishes are there in total in the menus with the name "Waldorf Astoria"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.name = 'Waldorf Astoria' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id

question: Please describe the menu sponsored by Noviomagus physically.
original_query: SELECT physical_description FROM Menu WHERE sponsor = 'Noviomagus'

question: List the top five dishes, by descending order, in terms of highest price.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Dish ORDER BY highest_price DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many dishes appear in the right upper corner of the menu page?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T1.dish_id = T2.id WHERE T1.xpos > 0.75 AND T1.ypos < 0.25

question: Among the menu pages on which the dish "Chicken gumbo" had appeared, what is the menu ID of the one with the biggest width?
original_query: SELECT T1.id FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Chicken gumbo' ORDER BY T1.full_width DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the menu page ids of all the menu that includes mashed potatoes.
original_query: SELECT T2.menu_page_id FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Mashed potatoes'

question: What are the names of the dishes with a stable price that were created in April of 2011?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE SUBSTR(T2.created_at, 1, 4) = '2011' AND SUBSTR(T2.created_at, 7, 1) = '4' AND T1.highest_price IS NULL

question: Which dish has the longest history?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Dish ORDER BY last_appeared - Dish.first_appeared DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the name of dishes that were positioned on the left upper corner.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T2.xpos < 0.25 AND T2.ypos < 0.25

question: Under what events was the menu page's full width less than 2000 mm?
original_query: SELECT T1.event FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T2.full_width = 2000

question: State the name of menu with the longest full height.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id ORDER BY T1.full_height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the menus with over 10 pages, how many of them have over 20 dishes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE page_count > 10 AND dish_count > 20

question: How many dishes appeared on a menu more than once?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Dish WHERE times_appeared > menus_appeared

question: How many dishes have appeared on the menu in less than 5 years?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.last_appeared - T1.first_appeared < 5

question: How many menus sponsored by Krogs Fiske Restaurant were created in April 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE date LIKE '2015-04%' AND sponsor = 'Krogs Fiskerestaurant'

question: What is the page count for menu with page ID of 130?
original_query: SELECT T1.page_count FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T2.id = 130

question: List the dishes included on page number 30 with the least in full height.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T1.page_number = 30 ORDER BY T1.full_height DESC, T1.full_height ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many menus with the name "Waldorf Astoria" have 4 pages?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE name = 'Waldorf Astoria' AND page_count = 4

question: Name the dishes that were on the menu page ID 174.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T1.menu_page_id = 174

question: Among the dishes, how many of them were created between 2011-03-31 at 20:24:46 UTC and 2011-04-15 at 23:09:51 UTC.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.created_at BETWEEN '2011-03-31 20:24:46 UTC' AND '2011-04-15 23:09:51 UTC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id

question: What is the occasion for menu with ID 12463?
original_query: SELECT occasion FROM Menu WHERE id = 12463

question: What is the GDP of the European Continent?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T4.GDP) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN economy AS T4 ON T4.Country = T1.Code WHERE T3.Name = 'Europe'

question: List all rivers and province it is located that is greater than 1000 in length.
original_query: SELECT T1.Province, T2.Name FROM geo_river AS T1 INNER JOIN river AS T2 ON T1.River = T2.Name WHERE T2.Length > 1000

question: What is the greatest length of the border between 2 independent countries?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T3.Length) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN borders AS T3 ON T3.Country1 = T2.Country WHERE T2.Independence IS NOT NULL

question: How many times longer is the longest border in the United States than the shortest?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.Length) / MIN(T2.Length) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country2 WHERE T1.Name = 'United States'

question: What is the area of Egypt as a percentage of Asia?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent WHERE T3.Name = 'Asia' AND T1.Name = 'Egypt'

question: List all the name and height of all mountains in Alaska
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Height FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T2.Province = 'Alaska'

question: What is the proportion of English-speaking citizens in the countries that rely on the United States compared to the total number of citizens in those countries?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage * T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN politics AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T3.Dependent = 'USA' AND T2.Name = 'English'

question: What is the maximal elevation of the summit of the shortest mountain that can be found in the island of Madagaskar? Indicate what type of mountain it is.
original_query: SELECT T3.Height, T3.Type FROM island AS T1 INNER JOIN mountainOnIsland AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Island INNER JOIN mountain AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T1.Name = 'Madagaskar' ORDER BY T3.Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all the seas with which the deepest sea merges.
original_query: SELECT T2.Sea2 FROM sea AS T1 INNER JOIN mergesWith AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Sea1 WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM sea ORDER BY Depth DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: State the country and its population with population growth greater than 2% but infant mortality rate less than 5%.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Population_Growth > 2 AND T2.Infant_Mortality < 5

question: On which island does South Yorkshire situated? State it's longtitude and latitude.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Longitude, T3.Latitude FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN locatedOn AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T1.Province = 'South Yorkshire'

question: Please list the capital cities of the countries with an inflation rate under 2.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Inflation < 2

question: Among the independent countries, how many of them has a GDP per capita of over 5000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Independence IS NOT NULL AND T3.GDP > 5000

question: What is the population density of the Petropavl's home country?
original_query: SELECT CAST(T1.Population AS REAL) / T1.Area FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Petropavl'

question: In which city is the sea whose depth is 4232 meters less than that of the Bay of Bengal?
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM sea AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Sea INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.City WHERE ( SELECT Depth FROM sea WHERE Name LIKE '%Bengal%' ) - T1.Depth = 4235

question: What is the total number of cities that Japan have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Province = T2.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'Japan'

question: What is the height of the mountain on which river 'Lech' is located? Please also provide its longitude and latitude.
original_query: SELECT T1.Height, T1.Latitude, T1.Longitude FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN located AS T4 ON T4.Province = T3.Name WHERE T4.River = 'Lech'

question: How many countries on the European Continent has an infant mortality rate per thousand of over 100?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN population AS T4 ON T4.Country = T1.Code WHERE T3.Name = 'Europe' AND T4.Infant_Mortality < 100

question: How many rivers belong to more than one country? Name the provinces where we can find them.
original_query: SELECT River, GROUP_CONCAT(Province) FROM geo_river GROUP BY River HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Country) > 1

question: For island area less than 200, list the island name and city it belongs to.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Name, T1.Name FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN locatedOn AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T3.Area < 200

question: How many Jewish residents are there in Moldova?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage * T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Moldova' AND T2.Name = 'Jewish'

question: In which province is the highest volcano mountain located in?
original_query: SELECT T1.Province FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN mountain AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T3.Type = 'volcano' ORDER BY T3.Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many cities in France have a population of more than 100,000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T2.Country = T1.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'France' AND T2.Population > 100000

question: Provide a list of all organisations with headquarters in London?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM organization WHERE City = 'London'

question: Which two countries have the longest border in the world? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T2.Country1, T2.Country2 FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 ORDER BY T2.Length DESC LIMIT 1

question: What province did the river Klaeaelv travel through and how long is the river?
original_query: SELECT T1.Province FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN river AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.River WHERE T3.Name = 'Klaraelv'

question: How many volcanic mountains are there in countries whose population is no more than 5000000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN mountain AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T3.Type = 'volcanic' AND T1.Population <= 5000000

question: List all the organisations that where its name contains 'United Nation'. State its full name and its headquarter city.
original_query: SELECT Name, City FROM organization WHERE Name LIKE '%United Nation%'

question: What form of governance does the least prosperous nation in the world have?
original_query: SELECT T3.Government FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN politics AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.GDP IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.GDP ASC LIMIT 1

question: For all the countries that is smaller than 100 square kilometres, which one has the most GDP?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Area < 100 ORDER BY T2.GDP DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the peak height of the highest volcanic type of mountain? Give it's name.
original_query: SELECT Height, Name FROM mountain WHERE Type = 'volcanic' ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the percentage of country which gained independence as republic after 1970.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Government = 'republic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Country) FROM politics WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Independence) > '1970'

question: Which country is Mountain Cerro Chirripo located in? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Mountain = 'Cerro Chirripo'

question: Which country has the most languages spoken?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the countries with more than 3% population growth rate, state the country name in full along with its GDP.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T3.GDP FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Population_Growth > 3

question: What's the name of the second biggest desert?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM desert ORDER BY Area DESC LIMIT 1, 1

question: Among the countries with a population of under 1000000, how many of them have over 2 languages?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Population < 1000000 GROUP BY T2.Country HAVING COUNT(T1.Name) > 2

question: Please list the countries that share the shortest border.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 ORDER BY T2.Length ASC LIMIT 1

question: How much more space does Asia have than Europe?
original_query: SELECT MAX(Area) - MIN(Area) FROM continent WHERE Name = 'Asia' OR Name = 'Europe'

question: Which city in Japan has the most people in the country?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Japan' ORDER BY T2.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the height of mountain Dhaulagiri located and in which province is it located?
original_query: SELECT T1.Height, T2.Province FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T1.Name = 'Dhaulagiri'

question: Which river with its mouth in the Donau River and a length greater than 500 km is located in Slovenia?
original_query: SELECT T2.River FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_river AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Slovenia' AND T2.River IN ( SELECT NAME FROM river WHERE Length > 500 AND River = 'Donau' )

question: What is the average percentage of agriculture of GDP in countries on the African Continent?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T4.Agriculture) FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Africa'

question: What is the smallest border's length, and what form of government do the two nations bordering it have?
original_query: SELECT T1.Government, T3.Government FROM politics AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country1 INNER JOIN politics AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country2 ORDER BY T2.Length ASC LIMIT 1

question: What's the percentage of people in Cayman Islands speak English?
original_query: SELECT T1.Percentage FROM language AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'Cayman Islands' AND T1.Name = 'English'

question: Which two Asian countries share a border that is 1,782 kilometers long?
original_query: SELECT T4.Country1, T4.Country2 FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN borders AS T4 ON T4.Country1 = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Asia' AND T4.Length = 1782

question: List all countries with 'Category III' membership in 'IFAD' organization. Please also provide the capital of the country.
original_query: SELECT Name, Capital FROM country WHERE Code IN ( SELECT Country FROM isMember WHERE type = 'Category III' AND Organization = 'IFAD' )

question: What percent of the non volcanic islands in the Lesser Antilles group of islands have an area of no more than 300 square kilometers?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Area <= 300 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM island WHERE Islands = 'Lesser Antilles' AND (Type != 'volcanic' OR Type IS NULL)

question: For each organisations with headquarters in the USA, provide the its full name and the city where the headquarter is located at.
original_query: SELECT Name, City FROM organization WHERE Country = 'USA'

question: Name all countries in which have border with Bulgaria.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country2 WHERE T1.Name = 'Bulgaria'

question: Which two countries have the border in length of 803 km? Give the full names of the countries.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T3.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country2 WHERE T2.Length = 803

question: Among the countries whose agriculture takes up more than 40% of its GDP, how many of them have less than 2 mountains?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.Country) FROM ( SELECT T1.Country FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Industry < 40 GROUP BY T1.Country HAVING COUNT(T1.Country) < 2 ) AS T3

question: Which mountain does the river source Blue Nile located? State the height of the mountain.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Height FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN geo_source AS T4 ON T4.Province = T3.Name WHERE T4.River = 'Blue Nile'

question: Which are the 2 rivers located at Belgrade city? Which river is longer and how by much?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Length FROM river AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.River INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.City WHERE T3.Name = 'Belgrade'

question: Which nation has the lowest proportion of people who speak an African language? Please state the nation's full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'African' ORDER BY T2.Percentage ASC LIMIT 1

question: State the area and population of the country where Asia Pacific Economic Cooperation headquarter is located.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Population FROM organization AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Asia Pacific Economic Cooperation'

question:
Which federal republic country in Europe has the most provinces, and what proportion of GDP is devoted to services?
Calculate the population density as well.
original_query: SELECT T1.Country, T2.Service , SUM(T1.Population) / SUM(T1.Area) FROM province AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Country IN ( SELECT Country FROM encompasses WHERE Continent = 'Europe' ) GROUP BY T1.Country, T2.Service ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many people are there in Fareham's mother country?
original_query: SELECT T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Province = T2.Name WHERE T3.Name = 'Fareham'

question: What is the difference in population between the two nations where the tallest peak is located?
original_query: SELECT * FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T4.Code = T3.Country WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Please list the names of the countries with an inflation rate that's 30% above the average.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Name, T2.Inflation HAVING T2.Inflation > AVG(T2.Inflation) * 1.3

question: State the name of the lake in Albania province and in which city does it located at.
original_query: SELECT Lake, City FROM located WHERE Province = 'Albania' AND Lake IS NOT NULL

question: List the full name its capital of all the countries with parliamentary democracy government.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Government = 'parliamentary democracy'

question: List the infant mortality of country with the least Amerindian.
original_query: SELECT T1.Infant_Mortality FROM population AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Amerindian' ORDER BY T2.Percentage ASC LIMIT 1

question: List all deserts that are not between latitudes 30 and 40.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM desert WHERE Latitude < 30 OR Latitude > 40

question: Which country has the 5th highest infant mortality rate?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM population AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code ORDER BY T1.Infant_Mortality DESC LIMIT 4, 1

question: Which city has most population other than its capital in Bangladesh?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Province = T2.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'Bangladesh' AND T3.Name <> T1.Capital ORDER BY T3.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which religion has the largest population in Martinique?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN religion AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Martinique' ORDER BY T1.population DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country was the source of Pjandsh River? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.River = 'Pjandsh'

question: How many deserts are not located in a single country? Name them.
original_query: SELECT Desert FROM geo_desert GROUP BY Desert HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Country) > 1

question: In countries where there is more than one ethnic group, name the ethnic group with the greatest presence in each country and the country to which it corresponds.
original_query: SELECT Country, Name FROM ethnicGroup AS T1 WHERE Percentage < 100 AND Percentage = ( SELECT MAX(Percentage) FROM ethnicGroup AS T2 WHERE T1.Country = T2.Country )

question: In which province is city Glenrothes located? What is the capital of the province?
original_query: SELECT T2.Province, T1.Capital FROM province AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Province AND T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Glenrothes'

question: What is the population of the country with the highest infant mortality rate?
original_query: SELECT T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Infant_Mortality DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please name any three sovereign nations that have been governed by the republic since 1991.
original_query: SELECT country FROM politics WHERE government = 'republic' AND STRFTIME('%Y', independence) >= '1991' AND country IN ( SELECT country FROM country ) ORDER BY independence LIMIT 3
