question: For all the users who gave "A Shot in the Dark" a rating, how many percent of them is a paying subscriber?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.user_has_payment_method = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN lists_users AS T3 ON T1.user_id = T3.user_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Shot in the Dark'

question: How many critics of the movie "Imitation of Life" got more than 1 like?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'Imitation of Life' AND T1.critic_likes > 1

question: What is the user ID of the user, who was a subscriber when he created the list, who created a list for 10 consecutive years? If there are multiple users, indicate each of their user IDs.
original_query: SELECT user_id FROM lists_users WHERE user_subscriber = 1 GROUP BY user_id HAVING MAX(SUBSTR(list_creation_date_utc, 1, 4)) - MIN(SUBSTR(list_creation_date_utc, 1, 4)) >= 10

question: For all list titles with at least 200 movies in the list, what is their average number of followers?
original_query: SELECT AVG(list_followers) FROM lists WHERE list_movie_number > 200

question: What is the name of the longest movie title? When was it released?
original_query: SELECT movie_title, movie_release_year FROM movies ORDER BY LENGTH(movie_popularity) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all movie title rated in April 2020 from user who was a trialist.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.user_trialist = 1 AND T2.rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2020-04%'

question: Who was the director of the movie "Tokyo Eyes"？
original_query: SELECT director_name FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'Tokyo Eyes'

question: Please list the names of the movies that received more than 20 likes?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.critic_likes > 20

question: What is the percentage of users gave "5" to the movie "Go Go Tales"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.rating_score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'Go Go Tales'

question: Which film rated by user 59988436 that received 21 comments?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.user_id = 59988436 AND T1.critic_comments = 21

question: What was the title of the first list created by a user 85981819? And please provide the user_avatar_image_url.
original_query: SELECT T2.list_title, T1.user_avatar_image_url FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.user_id = 85981819 ORDER BY T2.list_creation_timestamp_utc LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the movie that was rated recently by user 57756708?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.user_id = 57756708 ORDER BY T1.rating_timestamp_utc DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide list titles created by user who are eligible for trial when he created the list.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.list_title FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.user_eligible_for_trial = 1

question: How many movie lists with over 100 movies had user 85981819 created when he or she was a paying subscriber?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.user_id = 85981819 AND T1.list_movie_number > 100 AND T2.user_has_payment_method = 1

question: What's the percentage of the users who have rated "1" on the movie "When Will I Be Loved"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.rating_score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'When Will I Be Loved'

question: State the most popular movie? When was it released and who is the director for the movie?
original_query: SELECT movie_title, movie_release_year, director_name FROM movies ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which movie got the most critic comments? Give the name of the movie.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id GROUP BY T2.movie_title ORDER BY COUNT(T1.critic_comments) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which of the film released in 2008 scored the highest?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_release_year = 2008 ORDER BY T1.rating_score DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which movie is more popular, "The General" or "Il grido"?
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'The General' OR movie_title = 'Il grido' ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many likes did the critic of the movie "Apocalypse Now" received after giving the movie a rating score of 5?
original_query: SELECT T2.critic_likes FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.user_trialist = 0 AND T2.rating_score = 5 AND T1.movie_title = 'Apocalypse Now'

question: Give the percentage of subscribers who rated who rated the movie "G.I. Jane".
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.user_subscriber = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN lists_users AS T3 ON T1.user_id = T3.user_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'G.I. Jane'

question: How many movie lists were created by user 83373278 when he or she was a subscriber?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lists_users WHERE user_id = 83373278 AND user_subscriber = 1

question: How many users were trialists when they rated the movie "A Way of Life"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'When Will I Be Loved' AND T1.user_trialist = 1

question: What are the top 5 most popular movies of the 21st century? Indicate how many users gave it a rating score of 5.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.movie_id, SUM(T1.rating_score = 5) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T2.movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which year had the most released films?
original_query: SELECT movie_release_year FROM movies GROUP BY movie_release_year ORDER BY COUNT(movie_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many more movie lists were created by the user who created the movie list "250 Favourite Films"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(list_id) FROM lists_users WHERE user_id = ( SELECT user_id FROM lists WHERE list_title = '250 Favourite Films' )

question: Which of the films directed by Álex de la Iclesia is the most popular among Mubi users?
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies WHERE director_name = 'Åke Sandgren' ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many paying subscribers gave a rating to the movie "One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN ratings_users AS T3 ON T1.user_id = T3.user_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'One Flew Over the Cuckoo''s Nest' AND T3.user_has_payment_method = 1

question: When was the movie Cops released?
original_query: SELECT movie_release_year FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'Cops'

question: Among the users who are trailists when rating the movie "When Will I Be Loved", how many of them have rated "1" on the movie?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'When Will I Be Loved' AND T1.rating_score = 1 AND T1.user_trialist = 1

question: Was user 39115684 a trialist when he or she rated the movie "A Way of Life"?
original_query: SELECT T1.user_trialist FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Way of Life' AND T1.user_id = 39115684

question: What is the average number of number of movies added to the lists of user 8516503? Indicate how many movies did he/she give a rating score of 5.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.list_movie_number) , SUM(CASE WHEN T1.rating_score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id INNER JOIN lists AS T3 ON T2.user_id = T3.user_id WHERE T1.user_id = 8516503

question: How many users gave "Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl" movie a rating score of 4?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_title = 'Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl' AND T2.rating_score = 4

question: List all the titles created by user who was a subsriber when he created the list and have less than 50 movies in the list.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.list_title FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_movie_number < 50 AND T1.user_subscriber = 1

question: Between 1970 to 1980, how many movies with a popularity of more than 11,000 were released?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_id) FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year BETWEEN '1970' AND '1980' AND movie_popularity > 11000

question: What is the average number of followers of the lists created by the user who rated the movie "Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl" on 3/27/2011 at 2:06:34 AM?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T4.list_followers) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.list_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id INNER JOIN lists AS T4 ON T2.list_id = T4.list_id WHERE T3.movie_title LIKE 'Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl' AND T1.rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2011-03-27 02:06:34'

question: What are the movie popularity of the movies released in 2021 that were directed by Steven Spielberg? List the names of the movies and their corresponding popularity.
original_query: SELECT movie_title, movie_popularity FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 2021 AND director_name = 'Steven Spielberg'

question: What are the top 10 oldest movies and what are the average rating score for each movie? Indicate the name of the director and when the movies were released.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_id, AVG(T1.rating_score), T2.director_name, T2.movie_release_year FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.rating_timestamp_utc ASC LIMIT 10

question: For the lists that got more than 3000 followers, how many did the users who created those lists are paying subscribers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_followers > 3000 AND T1.user_has_payment_method = 1

question: What is the percentage of list created by user who was a subscriber when he created the list?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN user_subscriber = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(list_id) FROM lists_users

question: How many movies directed by Felipe Cazals was realeased on 1976?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_id) FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 1976 AND director_name LIKE 'Felipe Cazals'

question: Which of the films released in 2006 was the most popular among Mubi users?
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 2006 ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the movie with the most ratings.
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies GROUP BY movie_title ORDER BY COUNT(movie_title) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many movies were added to the list with the most number of movies? Indicate whether the user was a paying subscriber or not when he created the list.
original_query: SELECT T1.list_movie_number, T2.user_has_payment_method FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id ORDER BY T1.list_movie_number DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many movies have a popularity of more than 400 but less than 500? Indicate the name of the movies and the highest rating score each movie has received.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title, MAX(T2.rating_score) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_popularity BETWEEN 400 AND 500 GROUP BY T1.movie_title

question: How many films did Åke Sandgren direct?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_title) FROM movies WHERE director_name = 'Åke Sandgren'

question: Who is the director that made the most movies? Give the director's id.
original_query: SELECT director_id FROM movies GROUP BY director_id ORDER BY COUNT(movie_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name all lists created by a user who was a subcriber when created the list.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.list_id FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.user_subscriber = 1

question: How many users have more than 100 followers in the list created by users in 2009?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_followers > 100 AND T1.list_creation_date_utc LIKE '2009%'

question: What is the average score of the movie "The Fall of Berlin" in 2019?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.rating_score) / COUNT(T1.rating_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2019%' AND T2.movie_title LIKE 'The Fall of Berlin'

question: What is the average number of movies added to the lists of user 8516503? Give the user profile image URL on Mubi.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.list_movie_number), T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T2.user_id = 8516503

question: Who are cast members in an English movie which has a running time equal to 2? Please list their IDs.
original_query: SELECT T2.actorid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.runningtime = 2 AND T1.isEnglish = 'T'

question: Among the films directed by directors who direct the best, how many of them have an average rating of over 3.5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT T2.movieid FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid INNER JOIN u2base AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.d_quality = 5 GROUP BY T2.movieid HAVING AVG(T3.rating) > 3.5 ) AS T1

question: What is the favourite movie genre for audiences of age 18?
original_query: SELECT T1.genre FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.userid = T3.userid WHERE T3.age = 18 GROUP BY T1.genre ORDER BY COUNT(T1.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the ID of movies with running time of 3 and average revenue of 1?
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN directors AS T3 ON T2.directorid = T3.directorid WHERE T1.runningtime = 3 AND T3.avg_revenue = 1

question: How many latest released dramas and action movies?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.year = 4 AND T1.genre IN ('Action', 'drama')

question: How many different actors have played a role in the highest rating movie?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.actorid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.rating = 5

question: For the male users no older than 18, how many times have they given the highest rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating = 5 AND T2.age < 18 AND T2.u_gender = 'M'

question: Please list all horror films that have a rating of 1.
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.rating = 1 AND T2.genre = 'Horror'

question: Please list down ID of movies acted by top 5 actors based on actor rating.
original_query: SELECT T2.movieid FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid GROUP BY T2.actorid ORDER BY AVG(T1.a_quality) DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many horror movies were made by the worst directors?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN directors AS T3 ON T1.directorid = T3.directorid WHERE T1.genre = 'horror' AND T3.d_quality = 0

question: How many of the movies rated 5 are rated by a user between the ages of 25 and 35?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating = 5 AND T2.age BETWEEN 25 AND 35

question: Which directors with the best quality directed the most films?
original_query: SELECT T1.directorid FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.d_quality = 5 GROUP BY T1.directorid ORDER BY COUNT(T2.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the genre of the movies that are the newest and is in English.
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.year = 4 AND T1.isEnglish = 'T'

question: List the different director IDs of the movies whose user rating is more than 4.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.directorid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.rating > 4

question: For the movies in English that are the oldest, how many of them have the lowest rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.movieid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.year = 1 AND T2.rating = 1 AND T1.isEnglish = 'T'

question: Please list different IDs of movies that are the newest and have gotten the lowest rating.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.year = 4 AND T1.rating = 1

question: Please list the genre of the movies that are directed by the directors with the highest level of average revenue.
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.avg_revenue = 4

question: List the id of male users who gave ratings of less than 3 to French movies with running time of 2.
original_query: SELECT T1.userid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T1.userid = T3.userid WHERE T2.country = 'France' AND T2.runningtime = 2 AND T1.rating < 3 AND T3.u_gender = 'M'

question: Among divergent movies that got the highest rating, how many of them are from the UK?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'UK' AND T1.rating = 5

question: What is the ID of actors that acted in the movies most viewed by audience with occupation 5?
original_query: SELECT T3.actorid FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.occupation = 5 GROUP BY T2.movieid ORDER BY COUNT(T1.userid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list down the ID of actors and directors in action movies.
original_query: SELECT T2.actorid, T1.directorid FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.genre = 'Action'

question: What is the average occupation of users whose ratings are not more than 2 ?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.occupation) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating < 2

question: List the IDs of all the directors who worked on French films.
original_query: SELECT T2.directorid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'France'

question: Among the movies from France, how many of them are drama?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'France' AND T1.genre = 'drama'

question: List the ids and ratings of each actors played in the movie with the id 1722327?
original_query: SELECT T1.actorid, T1.a_quality FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid WHERE T2.movieid = 1722327

question: Which genre contains the greatest number of non-English films?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.isEnglish = 'F' GROUP BY T2.genre ORDER BY COUNT(T1.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many French movies got the highest ranking?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movieid) FROM movies WHERE country = 'France' AND movieid IN ( SELECT movieid FROM u2base WHERE rating = ( SELECT MAX(rating) FROM u2base ) )

question: What is the total average movie directed by the directors who's quality and revenue is 4?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.d_quality = 4 AND T1.avg_revenue = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.movieid) FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid

question: List the cast and the director of the movie with the id 1949144.
original_query: SELECT T1.actorid, T2.directorid FROM movies2actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.movieid = 1949144

question: What are the genres of all the English-language foreign films having a runtime of two hours or less? List each one.
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.runningtime <= 2 AND T1.isEnglish = 'T' AND T1.country = 'other'

question: How many female actors have been played a role in any of French or USA movies?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.actorid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country IN ('France', 'USA')

question: How many unique directors with an average earnings of 2 and a quality of 3 have not made comedy films? List them.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.directorid FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.d_quality = 3 AND T1.avg_revenue = 2 AND T2.genre != 'Comedy'

question: What's the ratio of gender in actors to actress in all the UK movies?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.a_gender = 'M', 1, 0)) AS REAL) / SUM(IIF(T3.a_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid WHERE T1.country = 'UK'

question: List the movie that has been rated most by 25 years old users.
original_query: SELECT T2.movieid FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.age = 25 GROUP BY T2.movieid ORDER BY COUNT(T1.userid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many users have rated 1 each for the UK's second newest movies with a running time of 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.userid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'UK' AND T1.runningtime = 2 AND T2.rating = 1 AND T1.year = 2

question: For different directors who direct well, how many of them have directed an action film?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.directorid) FROM movies2directors AS T2 INNER JOIN directors AS T3 ON T2.directorid = T3.directorid WHERE T2.genre = 'Action' AND T3.d_quality = 4

question: Please list the actor IDs whose movies have the newest published date.
original_query: SELECT T1.actorid FROM movies2actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.year = 4

question: What is the proportion of action movies directors who are called 'box office success paradox'?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.avg_revenue > T2.d_quality, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.genre = 'Action'

question: How many of the worst actors are men and how many of the worst actors are women? Indicate your answer in ratio form.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(a_gender = 'M', 1, 0)) AS REAL) / SUM(IIF(a_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) FROM actors WHERE a_quality = 0

question: Which movies have received the greatest ratings from female users whose occupations fall within the category of 3?
original_query: SELECT T2.movieid FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.u_gender = 'F' AND T1.occupation = 3 AND T2.rating = 5

question: How many American movies have cast number more than 1?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.actorid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'USA' AND T2.cast_num > 1

question: Please calculate negative critical reception of American movies
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.rating = 1, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'USA'

question: Among the action movies from the USA, how many of them are not in English?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'USA' AND T1.isEnglish = 'F' AND T2.genre = 'Action'

question: Please list movie IDs which has the oldest publication date and the cast numbers are zero.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.year = 1 AND T2.cast_num = 0

question: How many separate 35 year-old uesers have rated the movie from UK?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.userid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.userid = T3.userid WHERE T1.country = 'UK' AND T3.age = 35

question: Movies with rating 3 are viewed by audiences in which distinct age group?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.age FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating = 3

question: What non-English American film/s has received the lowest user ratings? Mention the movie's I.D.
original_query: SELECT T2.movieid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.isEnglish = 'F' AND T1.country = 'USA' ORDER BY T2.rating LIMIT 1

question: Among the best actors, how many of them got a rating of 5 to the movies they starred?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actorid) FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid INNER JOIN u2base AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.a_quality = 5 AND T3.rating = 5

question: What is the highest average rating for action movies made in the USA?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T3 ON T1.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'USA' AND T3.genre = 'Action' GROUP BY T1.movieid ORDER BY AVG(T2.rating) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most common keyword among all the movies released in 2006?
original_query: SELECT T3.keyword_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T1.release_date LIKE '2006%' GROUP BY T3.keyword_name ORDER BY COUNT(T3.keyword_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the movies in the Somali language.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Somali'

question: Please list the titles of all the movie produced by production company "Universal Pictures".
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Universal Pictures'

question: Which production company produced the movie that made the most money at the box office?
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id GROUP BY T1.company_id ORDER BY SUM(T3.revenue) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the original language of the "Four Rooms" movie?
original_query: SELECT T3.language_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id INNER JOIN language_role AS T4 ON T2.language_role_id = T4.role_id WHERE T4.language_role = 'Original' AND T1.title = 'Four Rooms'

question: List the movies released in 1945.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', release_date) AS INT) = 1945

question: Among the movie in which Dariusz Wolski works as the director of photography, what is the percentage of those movie whose vote average is over 5.0?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.vote_average > 5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.vote_average) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski' AND T2.job = 'Director of Photography'

question: What is the gender of the character 'USAF Master Sgt. Epps?'
original_query: SELECT T2.gender FROM movie_cast AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.gender_id WHERE T1.character_name = 'USAF Master Sgt. Epps'

question: Write down the release date of the movies produced by Twentieth Century Fox Film Corporation.
original_query: SELECT T3.release_date FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Twentieth Century Fox Film Corporation'

question: How many movies were directed by Michael Bay?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Michael Bay' AND T2.job = 'Director'

question: Provide the production companies of the movie that has over 35% average running time per movie in 2016.
original_query: SELECT T.company_name FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT T3.company_name, T1.runtime FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_company AS T3 ON T3.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.release_date LIKE '2016%' ) T WHERE T.runtime * 100 > (0.35 * ( SELECT AVG(T1.runtime) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_company AS T3 ON T3.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.release_date LIKE '2016%' ) + ( SELECT AVG(T1.runtime) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_company AS T3 ON T3.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.release_date LIKE '2016%' )) * 100

question: What is the ID of the production company which produced the movie "Gladiator"?
original_query: SELECT T2.company_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'Gladiator'

question: Provide the genre ID of the movie with the title of "The Dark Knight".
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'The Dark Knight'

question: Give the names of the female cast in Movie No. 1865.
original_query: SELECT T2.person_name FROM movie_cast AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.gender_id WHERE T1.movie_id = 1865 AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: The movie 'Gojira ni-sen mireniamu' is from which country?
original_query: SELECT T3.COUNTry_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE T1.title = 'Gojira ni-sen mireniamu'

question: Who is the person associated with the crew id 1325273?
original_query: SELECT person_name FROM person WHERE person_id = 1325273

question: What are the genres of Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow?
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow'

question: Give the number of movies with "saving the world" as the keyword.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.keyword_id = T2.keyword_id WHERE keyword_name = 'saving the world'

question: What is the third least common genre?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_name FROM movie_genres AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.genre_id GROUP BY T2.genre_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.movie_id) LIMIT 2, 1

question: List the title of movies in Latin released between 1/01/1990 and 12/31/1995.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Latin' AND T1.release_date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'

question: When was the first movie released?
original_query: SELECT MIN(release_date) FROM movie WHERE movie_status = 'Released'

question: List the character names in the "Open Water" movie.
original_query: SELECT T2.character_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'Open Water'

question: List the job titles of Sally Menke in the crew.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.job FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Sally Menke'

question: How many crew members worked as producer in the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.person_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' AND T2.job = 'Producer'

question: How many female crews are in the movie "Mr. Smith Goes to Washington"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.gender) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T2.gender_id = T3.gender_id WHERE T1.title = 'Mr. Smith Goes to Washington' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: Provide the overview for the movie "The Pacifier".
original_query: SELECT overview FROM movie WHERE title = 'The Pacifier'

question: Please list the names of all the producers in the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End".
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' AND T2.job = 'Producer'

question: List the genres of Forrest Gump movie.
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.title = 'Forrest Gump'

question: How many main actors are there in the movie Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.cast_order) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T3.gender_id = T2.gender_id WHERE T3.gender = 'Male' OR T3.gender = 'Female' AND T1.title = 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World''s End' AND T2.cast_order = ( SELECT MIN(T2.cast_order) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T3.gender_id = T2.gender_id WHERE T3.gender = 'Male' OR T3.gender = 'Female' AND T1.title = 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World''s End' )

question: Write the titles of horror films with a vote average of more than 7.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre_name = 'Horror' AND vote_average > 7

question: Work out the difference in revenues made between the English and Latin movies.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.language_name = 'English' THEN T1.revenue ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T3.language_name = 'Latin' THEN T1.revenue ELSE 0 END) AS DIFFERENCE FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id

question: Calculate the average income made by movies using the keyword "paris". List the title of the movies.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.revenue), T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T3.keyword_name = 'paris'

question: Provide the homepage of the Bahasa Indonesia movies.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.homepage FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Bahasa indonesia'

question: List 10 crews alongside their jobs who worked on the movie 'Mad Max: Fury Road.'
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Mad Max: Fury Road' LIMIT 10

question: Write me the titles of the movies starring Jim Carrey.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Jim Carrey'

question: What is the title of the movie that was made with the most money and resources?
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the latest released movie produced by production company "Universal Pictures"?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Universal Pictures' ORDER BY T3.release_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down five movie titles that were released before 2000.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', release_date) AS INT) < 2000 LIMIT 5

question: Give the genre and popularity of movies whose revenue is at least 120,000,000 between 2012 and 2015.
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name, T1.popularity FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.revenue > 120000000 AND T1.release_date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'

question: How many movies were produced by "Eddie Murphy Productions"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie_company AS T1 INNER JOIN production_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T2.company_name = 'Eddie Murphy Productions'

question: Provide the most used keyword in the movies.
original_query: SELECT T1.keyword_name FROM keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.keyword_id = T2.keyword_id GROUP BY T1.keyword_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.keyword_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the language ID of the movie "Walk the Line"?
original_query: SELECT T2.language_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'Walk the Line'

question: What is Walt Disney Pictures' most popular movie?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Walt Disney Pictures' ORDER BY T3.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which movie did the company 'Radiant Film GmbH' work on?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Radiant Film GmbH'

question: List the person IDs of the second film editors in Movie No. 12.
original_query: SELECT person_id FROM movie_crew WHERE movie_id = 12 AND job = 'Second Film Editor'

question: How many female characters are there in the movie "Spider-Man 3"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T2.gender_id = T3.gender_id WHERE T1.title = 'Spider-Man 3' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: Provide the release date and language of the most popular movie.
original_query: SELECT T1.release_date, T3.language_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id ORDER BY T1.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find out the language ID of the movie with the highest popularity.
original_query: SELECT T2.language_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the first crime movie ever released?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre_name = 'Crime' ORDER BY T1.release_date LIMIT 1

question: How many animators does Movie No. 129 have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_id) FROM movie_crew WHERE movie_id = 129 AND job = 'Animation'

question: How many producers does the movie "The Amityville Horror" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'The Amityville Horror' AND T2.job = 'Producer'

question: What is the average revenue of the movie in which Dariusz Wolski works as the director of photography?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.revenue) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski' AND T2.job = 'Director of Photography'

question: What is the percentage of male characters in the movie "Bride Wars"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.gender) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T2.gender_id = T3.gender_id WHERE T1.title = 'Bride Wars'

question: For movies with the keyword of "civil war", calculate the average revenue generated by these movies.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.revenue) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T3.keyword_name = 'civil war'

question: What is the iso code of "Kyrgyz Republic"?
original_query: SELECT COUNTry_iso_code FROM COUNTry WHERE COUNTry_name = 'Kyrgyz Republic'

question: How many production companies does the movie "Four Rooms" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CNAME) FROM ( SELECT T1.company_name AS CNAME FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T3.title = 'Four Rooms' )

question: Calculate the revenues made by Fantasy Films and Live Entertainment.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.revenue) FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name IN ('Fantasy Films', 'Live Entertainment')

question: Which movies have the participation of actor Harrison Ford?

question: List down the movies produced by Lucasfilm.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Lucasfilm'

question: How many movies have "vi" as their language code?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie_languages AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T2.language_code = 'vi'

question: List the film with the highest budget in each genre.
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name, MAX(T1.budget) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id GROUP BY T3.genre_name

question: Provide the genre of a movie title with a tagline of "A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away…".
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T3.genre_id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.tagline = 'A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away...'

question: When was the release date of the latest movie in which Dariusz Wolski worked as a crew member?
original_query: SELECT T1.release_date FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski' ORDER BY T1.release_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the original language of the movie with the tagline "An offer you can't refuse."?

question: How many movies released in 1995 did Quentin Tarantino appear in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Quentin Tarantino' AND CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.release_date) AS INT) = 1995

question: Write down five rumoured movie titles within the genre of Drama.

question: List all companies who worked in the movie 'Ultramarines: A Warhammer 40,000 Movie.'
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T3.title = 'Ultramarines: A Warhammer 40,000 Movie'

question: Which movie has the keyword 'extremis?'
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T3.keyword_name = 'extremis'

question: List 10 movie titles that were produced in France.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE T3.COUNTry_name = 'France' LIMIT 10

question: How many movies did Universal Studios release?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Universal Studios'

question: What is the name of the director of photography of the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End"?
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' AND T2.job = 'Director of Photography'

question: How many Indian movies between 1/2/1990 and 12/30/2003 have revenue of more than 75,000,000 and popularity of no less than 20?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.revenue > 75000000 AND T1.popularity >= 20 AND T1.release_date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '2003-12-31'

question: List the director's name of the movies released between 1/01/1916 and 12/31/1925.
original_query: SELECT T2.person_name FROM movie_cast AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T4 ON T1.movie_id = T4.movie_id WHERE T4.job = 'Director' AND T3.release_date BETWEEN '1916-01-01' AND '1925-12-31'

question: Name the horror movies with positive ratings greater than 7.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre_name = 'Horror' AND T1.vote_average > 7

question: How many adventure movies are there that were released in 2000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre_name = 'Adventure' AND CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.release_date) AS INT) = 2000

question: What is the ratio between male and female cast members of the movie 'Iron Man?' Count how many have unspecified genders.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS RATIO , COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Unspecified' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS UNGENDERS FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T2.gender_id = T3.gender_id WHERE T1.title = 'Iron Man'

question: List all the keywords with "christmas" in them.
original_query: SELECT keyword_name FROM keyword WHERE keyword_name LIKE '%christmas%'

question: What are the top 5 most popular movie directors?
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T2.job = 'Director' ORDER BY T1.popularity DESC LIMIT 5

question: For the movie "Reign of Fire", which department was Marcia Ross in?
original_query: SELECT T4.department_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id INNER JOIN department AS T4 ON T2.department_id = T4.department_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Marcia Ross' AND T1.title = 'Reign of Fire'

question: Indicates the title of all podcasts in the fiction category.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'fiction'

question: Write all the review titles and the contents belonging to the podcast 'More Stupider: A 90-Day Fiance Podcast' with a review rating of 1.
original_query: SELECT title, content FROM reviews WHERE podcast_id = ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'More Stupider: A 90-Day Fiance Podcast' ) AND rating = 1

question: List all the podcasts reviewed by a reviewer who has a review titled "Inspired & On Fire!".
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'Inspired & On Fire!'

question: What dates were the Don't Lie To Your Life Coach podcast reviews created?
original_query: SELECT created_at FROM reviews WHERE podcast_id = ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'Don''t Lie To Your Life Coach' )

question: Name all the podcast title and its category with average rating of more than 3.0.
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id GROUP BY T3.podcast_id HAVING AVG(T3.rating) > 3

question: Name all the categories for podcast titled 'I Heart My Life Show'.
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'I Heart My Life Show'

question: Provide the itunes id and url for podcast titled 'Brown Suga Diaries'.
original_query: SELECT itunes_id, itunes_url FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'Brown Suga Diaries'

question: What is the average rating for the "crime-junkie" podcast?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Crime Junkie'

question: What is the rating and category of the podcast entitled Sitcomadon?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.rating, T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'Sitcomadon'

question: Please list the titles of all the podcasts under the category "arts-performing-arts".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'arts-performing-arts'

question: Calculate the average rating of the true crime category.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'true-crime'

question: What is the category for the "Moist Boys" podcast?
original_query: SELECT category FROM categories WHERE podcast_id IN ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'Moist Boys' )

question: How many people rated 5 for the podcast which title contains the word 'spoiler' under the 'art' category '?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.podcast_id) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id WHERE T2.title LIKE '%spoilers%' AND T1.category = 'arts' AND T3.rating = 5

question: What percentage of podcasts are "technology" podcasts? List all of them.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.category = 'technology' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.title) OR '%' "percentage" FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id

question: What is the average rating for the podcast that is most reviewed?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id GROUP BY T1.podcast_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.content) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which category is the podcast "Scaling Global" under?
original_query: SELECT category FROM categories WHERE podcast_id IN ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'Scaling Global' )

question: How many reviews does 'LifeAfter/The Message' have which were rated below 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.rating) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'LifeAfter/The Message' AND T2.rating <= 3

question: What is the content of the review under the title "really interesting!" and is created on 2018-04-24 at 12:05:16?
original_query: SELECT content FROM reviews WHERE title = 'really interesting!' AND created_at = '2018-04-24T12:05:16-07:00'

question: For all reviews with the worst rating, state the podcast title as well as the review title and content.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title, T2.title, T2.content FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.rating = 1

question: What is the average rating of all the podcasts in category art?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'arts'

question: Provide the names of podcasts in the art category in 2018.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'arts' AND T2.created_at LIKE '2018-%'

question: Calculate the percentage of podcasts in the fiction-science-fiction category.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'fiction-science-fiction' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(podcast_id) OR '%' "percentage" FROM categories

question: Indicate the id of the reviewer whose itunes id is 1516665400.
original_query: SELECT T2.author_id FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.itunes_id = 1516665400

question: Which titles have the content "love" but the category is art produced between 2018 and 2019.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE (T2.created_at LIKE '2018-%' AND T1.category = 'arts' AND T2.content LIKE '%love%') OR (T2.created_at LIKE '2019-%' AND T1.category = 'arts' AND T2.content LIKE '%love%')

question: Which category has the most reviews?
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id GROUP BY T1.category ORDER BY COUNT(T2.podcast_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of the podcast that are categorized in four or more categories?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.podcast_id) FROM ( SELECT podcast_id FROM categories GROUP BY podcast_id HAVING COUNT(category) >= 4 ) AS T1

question: What is the name of the podcast in which a commentor left a comment with the title 'Long time listener, calling it quits?' Include the URL of the podcast as well.
original_query: SELECT podcast_id, itunes_url FROM podcasts WHERE podcast_id = ( SELECT podcast_id FROM reviews WHERE title = 'Long time listener, calling it quits' )

question: How many podcast reviews with a rating of 3 were created during the first quarter of 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(podcast_id) FROM reviews WHERE rating = 3 AND created_at BETWEEN '2015-01-01T00:00:00-07:00' AND '2015-03-31T23:59:59-07:00'

question: Which category does the podcast titled 'SciFi Tech Talk' belong to?
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'SciFi Tech Talk'

question: Find the author, rating and review creation date of review for podcast title 'In The Thick'.
original_query: SELECT T2.author_id, T2.rating, T2.created_at FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'In The Thick' GROUP BY T2.author_id, T2.rating, T2.created_at

question: List all content reviewed for podcast with the best rating under the 'fiction' category. State the podcast title.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id WHERE T3.rating = 5 AND T1.category = 'fiction'

question: List all podcast with its itunes url for all title containing the word 'Dream'.
original_query: SELECT itunes_url FROM podcasts WHERE title LIKE '%Dream%' GROUP BY itunes_url

question: Of the arts-books and arts-design categories, which one has more podcasts and what is the numerical difference between them?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT category FROM categories WHERE category = 'arts-books' OR category = 'arts-design' GROUP BY category ORDER BY COUNT(podcast_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) "has more podcasts" , ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'arts-books' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'arts-design' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM categories ) "differenct BETWEEN arts-books and arts-design"

question: Among the reviews for the podcast "Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally", how many of them are made in the year 2019?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.created_at) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally' AND T2.created_at LIKE '2019-%'

question: What is the release title of the single under the "funk" tag that was released the oldest?
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag LIKE 'funk' AND T1.releaseType = 'single' ORDER BY T1.groupYear LIMIT 1

question: Please list all tags of kurtis blow from 2000 to 2010.
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupYear BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 AND T1.artist LIKE 'kurtis blow'

question: Which artist has id "16"? Provide her or his tag genre.
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.id = 16

question: From 1980 to 2000, which artist had the most disco releases?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 2000 AND T2.tag LIKE 'disco' GROUP BY T1.artist ORDER BY COUNT(T2.tag) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the name of artists who released at least two bootlegs in 2016.
original_query: SELECT artist FROM torrents WHERE groupYear = 2016 AND releaseType LIKE 'bootleg' GROUP BY artist HAVING COUNT(releaseType) > 2

question: Provide the name of artists who had no more than 100 downloads and are tagged "funk" in 1980.
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'funk' AND T1.groupYear = 1980 AND T1.totalSnatched <= 100

question: How many tags does the release "city funk" have？
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.tag) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupName = 'city funk'

question: What is the release title of the single that was released by Ron Hunt in 1979 that was downloaded 239 times?
original_query: SELECT groupName FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE 'ron hunt & ronnie g & the sm crew' AND groupYear = 1979 AND releaseType LIKE 'single' AND totalSnatched = 239

question: From 1979 to 1982, what was the percentage of united.states albums out of total albums were released?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.tag LIKE 'united.states' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.releaseType) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupYear BETWEEN 1979 AND 1982 AND T1.releaseType LIKE 'album'

question: Please list all release titles whose tag is jazz in 2005.
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupYear = 2005 AND T2.tag LIKE 'jazz'

question: List the name of artists who have released albums and mixtape from 1980 to 1985 in "dance" genre.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.artist) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'dance' AND T1.groupYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985 AND T1.releaseType LIKE 'album' OR T1.releaseType LIKE 'mixtape'

question: In 1980, how many singles were released by sugar daddy?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(releaseType) FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE 'sugar daddy' AND releaseType LIKE 'Single' AND groupYear = 1980

question: Among the releases with the tag "1980s", which one of them is the most downloaded? Please give its title.
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = '1980s' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name all the release titles of the "ep's" under the alternative tag.
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag LIKE 'alternative' AND T1.releaseType = 'ep'

question: How many times was the album released by blowfly in 1980 downloaded?
original_query: SELECT totalSnatched FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE 'blowfly' AND groupYear = 1980

question: Which album title and tag that millie jackson released in 1980?
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName, T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupYear = 1980 AND T1.artist LIKE 'millie jackson' AND T1.releaseType LIKE 'album'

question: How many christmas albums were released in 2004?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'christmas' AND T1.groupYear = 2004 AND T1.releaseType LIKE 'album'

question: How many times has the release "city funk" been downloaded?
original_query: SELECT totalSnatched FROM torrents WHERE groupName LIKE 'city funk'

question: What is the tag of the album with the highest amount of downloads?
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'album' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which artist has released the most singles with the tag "soul"?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'soul' AND T1.releaseType = 'single' GROUP BY T1.artist ORDER BY COUNT(T1.releaseType) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the title of the top three releases with the highest number of downloads.
original_query: SELECT groupName FROM torrents ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 3

question: Provide the name of the artist who released his or her Single-Table in 2012 with the highest number of downloads. Name the Single-Table title as well.
original_query: SELECT artist, groupName FROM torrents WHERE groupYear = 2012 AND releaseType LIKE 'Single' ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which cities hosted at least 3 Olympic games?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.id HAVING COUNT(T1.games_id) >= 3

question: Who is the youngest person who participated in the Olympics?
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id ORDER BY T2.age LIMIT 1

question: Please list all game names that were held in Los Angeles.
original_query: SELECT T3.games_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'Los Angeles'

question: Which sport did John Aalberg participate in?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.sport_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T4 ON T3.competitor_id = T4.id INNER JOIN person AS T5 ON T4.person_id = T5.id WHERE T5.full_name = 'John Aalberg'

question: Which region do most of the athletes are from?
original_query: SELECT T2.region_name FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN noc_region AS T2 ON T1.region_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.region_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Men's 200 Metres Freestyle events did Ian James Thorpe compete in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.event_id = T4.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Ian James Thorpe' AND T4.event_name LIKE 'Swimming Men%s 200 metres Freestyle'

question: How many athletes took part in the Olympic games held in Barcelona?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM games_competitor AS T1 INNER JOIN games_city AS T2 ON T1.games_id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T2.city_id = T3.id WHERE T3.city_name = 'Barcelona'

question: What are the names of the events under Art Competitions?
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Art Competitions'

question: Please list the names of all the Olympic games that John Aalberg has taken part in.
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'John Aalberg'

question: What is the percentage of athletes from Vanuatu who are taller than 175?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.height > 175 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Vanuatu'

question: List the name of competitors from Argentina.
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Argentina'

question: How many kinds of events belong to the sport of cycling?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.event_name) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Cycling'

question: In Barcelona, how many Olympic games were held?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.games_id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'Barcelona'

question: When John Aalberg took part in the 1994 Winter Olympic Game, how old was he?
original_query: SELECT T2.age FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'John Aalberg' AND T1.games_name = '1994 Winter'

question: For Peter Kohnke, show the name of his/her region.
original_query: SELECT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Peter Kohnke'

question: What is the percentage of people whose age greater than 24 and participate in winter season?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.age > 24 AND T1.season = 'Winter' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.games_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id

question: How many gold medals were given to the winners in the Ice Hockey Men's Ice Hockey event?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.competitor_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.event_id WHERE T1.event_name LIKE 'Ice Hockey Men%s Ice Hockey' AND T2.medal_id = 1

question: State the number of athletes in the 1984 Summer Olympic Games who were more than 50 years old.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '1984 Summer' AND T2.age > 50

question: Give the id of the event "Shooting Mixed Skeet".
original_query: SELECT id FROM event WHERE event_name = 'Shooting Mixed Skeet'

question: Which sport does the event "Shooting Women's Trap" belong to?
original_query: SELECT T1.sport_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T2.event_name LIKE 'Shooting Women%s Trap'

question: Which city was the host of 1936 Winter Olympic Games?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '1936 Winter'

question: What is the name of the Olympic game with the most competitors held in Barcelona?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN games_city AS T3 ON T2.games_id = T3.games_id INNER JOIN city AS T4 ON T3.city_id = T4.id WHERE T4.city_name = 'Barcelona' GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In which city was the game held where the oldest competitor participated?
original_query: SELECT T4.city_name FROM games_competitor AS T1 INNER JOIN games AS T2 ON T1.games_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games_city AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.games_id INNER JOIN city AS T4 ON T3.city_id = T4.id ORDER BY T1.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: What age of the competitors is the most numerous?
original_query: SELECT age FROM games_competitor GROUP BY age ORDER BY COUNT(person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Summer games were held in Stockholm?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'Stockholm' AND T3.season = 'Summer'

question: Which game has Jessica Carolina Aguilera Aguilera participated in? Give the id of the game.
original_query: SELECT T2.games_id FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Jessica Carolina Aguilera Aguilera'

question: Calculate the percentage of women who have participated in Equestrianism Mixed Three-Day Event, Individual.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.event_id = T4.id WHERE T4.event_name = 'Equestrianism Mixed Three-Day Event, Individual'

question: How many persons participated in the Sapporo Olympics?

question: What is the name of the youngest competitor?

question: What is the average age of the people who participated in the winter season?

question: Which city were the Olympic games held in 1992?

question: How many different football events are there?

question: At which age did A Lamusi participate in 2012 Summer?

question: List the names of the games held in Paris.

question: Please list the names of all the Olympic competitors from Finland.

question: Among the Olympic games held in Los Angeles, what is the name of the Olympic game that has the most number of competitors?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN games_city AS T3 ON T2.games_id = T3.games_id INNER JOIN city AS T4 ON T3.city_id = T4.id WHERE T4.city_name = 'Los Angeles' GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the game name that was held in Beijing in 2008?
original_query: SELECT T3.games_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'Beijing' AND T3.games_year = 2008

question: How many athletes in the database are from Guatemala?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN noc_region AS T2 ON T1.region_id = T2.id WHERE T2.region_name = 'Guatemala'

question: What were the cities in which John Aalberg competed?

question: In what year and season did Sohail Abbas compete?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_year, T1.season FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Sohail Abbas'

question: Tell the host city of the 1968 Winter Olympic Games.
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '1968 Winter'

question: Show the name of the sport with the most events.
original_query: SELECT T1.sport_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id GROUP BY T1.sport_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.event_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many competitors were there who participated in 2000 Summer with age 31?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '2000 Summer' AND T2.age = 31

question: How many male competitors were there who participated in 1948 Summer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '1948 Summer' AND T3.gender = 'M'

question: How many athletes over the age of 59 competed in the 2016 Summer Olympics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '2016 Summer' AND T2.age > 59

question: How many gold medals does Henk Jan Zwolle have?

question: Which region has the most athletes?
original_query: SELECT T2.region_name FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN noc_region AS T2 ON T1.region_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.region_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of champions at the age of over 30?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.age > 30 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.competitor_id = T2.id WHERE T1.medal_id = 1

question: List out the name of the game that the people participated in games id 13.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T2.games_id = 13

question: Provide the age of the tallest competitor.
original_query: SELECT T2.age FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id ORDER BY T1.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the name of the competitor id 90991.
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.id = 90991

question: Please list all competitors' names who participated in 1936 Summer.
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '1936 Summer'

question: Calculate the percentage of bronze medals won by men's basketball players.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T4.medal_name = 'Bronze' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.competitor_id = T2.id INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T1.event_id = T3.id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T1.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T3.event_name LIKE 'Basketball Men%s Basketball'

question: In which city the 2004 Summer was held?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '2004 Summer'

question: Compute the average height of competitors whose age ranges from 22 to 28.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.height) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.age BETWEEN 22 AND 28

question: Tell the number of swimming related events.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.event_name) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Swimming'

question: What is the name of all the sports Chin Eei Hui has competed in?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.sport_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T4 ON T3.competitor_id = T4.id INNER JOIN person AS T5 ON T4.person_id = T5.id WHERE T5.full_name = 'Chin Eei Hui'

question: What is the name of the oldest person who participated in the Olympic Games?
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id ORDER BY T2.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is Vijay Singh Chauhan's region name?
original_query: SELECT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Vijay Singh Chauhan'

question: What is the average age of the athletes from the United States of America who competed in the 2016 Summer Olympics?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.age) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person_region AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T4 ON T3.region_id = T4.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2016 Summer' AND T4.region_name = 'USA'

question: What is the average height of the male Olympic competitors from Finland?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.height) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Finland' AND T3.gender = 'M'
