question: List the nominee, keywords and episode ID of the title "The Good, the Sad and the Drugly".
original_query: SELECT T3.person, T1.keyword, T1.episode_id FROM Keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Award AS T3 ON T2.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T2.title = 'The Good, the Sad and the Drugly' AND T3.result = 'Nominee';

question: List all of the information about the music department's casts and crews.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT person, name, birthdate, birth_name, birth_place , birth_region, birth_country, height_meters, nickname FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.category = 'Music Department';

question: What is the credited cast for the episode "In the Name of the Grandfather"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.person FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'In the Name of the Grandfather' AND T2.category = 'Cast' AND T2.credited = 'true';

question: Among the episodes which have star score greater than 5, how many episodes have air date in 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.air_date) = '2008' AND T2.stars > 5;

question: How many 7-star votes in star score did the episode Lost Verizon have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Lost Verizon' AND T2.stars = 7;

question: In the crew, who was born in 1962 in California?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE SUBSTR(birthdate, 1, 4) = '1962' AND birth_region = 'California';

question: What are the keywords of the episode which has title as Dangerous Curves?
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Dangerous Curves';

question: What is the voting numbers and percentage of the best rating scale of the episode which had keyword of "arab stereotype"?
original_query: SELECT T2.votes, T2.percent FROM Keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.keyword = 'arab stereotype' AND T2.stars = 10;

question: Write the title and all the keywords of the episode that was aired on 3/22/2009.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.air_date = '2009-03-22';

question: How many overs were there in the first innings of match ID "335996"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Over_Id) FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Match_Id = 335996 AND Innings_No = 1

question: What is the outcome type of match ID 392195?
original_query: SELECT T2.Outcome_Type FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Outcome AS T2 ON T1.Outcome_type = T2.Outcome_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = '392195'

question: How many players were born before 10/16/1975, and have a bowling skill of less than 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player WHERE DOB < '1975-10-16' AND Bowling_skill < 3

question: Who is the youngest player to have won the Purple Cap?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Season AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Purple_Cap ORDER BY T2.Season_Year - SUBSTR(T1.DOB, 1, 4) LIMIT 1

question: What is the role of K Goel in the match ID 335992?
original_query: SELECT T3.Role_Desc FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T3.Role_Id = T2.Role_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 335992 AND T1.Player_Name = 'K Goel'

question: How many Indian cities are there in the database?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'India' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Id

question: List the cities located in U.A.E.
original_query: SELECT T1.City_Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T2.Country_Id = T1.Country_id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'U.A.E'

question: In the database, how many times is the number of Indian cities to the South African cities?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'India' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'South Africa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Id

question: Who is the winning team in a match held on April 26, 2009 with a winning margin of 6 points?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner WHERE T2.Win_Margin = 6 AND T2.Match_Date = '2009-04-26'

question: Among the players from South Africa, provide the players' names who were born in 1984.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'South Africa' AND T1.DOB LIKE '1984%'

question: Among the players, what percentage are both captain and keeper?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Role_Desc = 'CaptainKeeper' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / TOTAL(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Rolee AS T2 ON T1.Role_Id = T2.Role_Id

question: What is the average number of extra runs made as noballs?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Extra_Runs) FROM Extra_Runs AS T1 INNER JOIN Extra_Type AS T2 ON T1.Extra_Type_Id = T2.Extra_Id WHERE T2.Extra_Name = 'noballs'

question: Which teams did SC Ganguly join in season year 2008?
original_query: SELECT T5.Team_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T2.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T5 ON T3.Team_Id = T5.Team_Id WHERE T4.Season_Year = 2008 AND T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly' GROUP BY T5.Team_Name

question: Calculate the total winning match for Deccan Chargers.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Match_Winner) FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Match_Winner WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Deccan Chargers'

question: How many matches are there in April, 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM Match WHERE Match_date LIKE '2008-04%'

question: Among the matches in 2013, what is the percentage of winning of the team "Mumbai Indians"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Match_Winner = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Match_Winner) FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Match_Winner WHERE T2.Match_Date LIKE '2013%'

question: How many players bat with their left hands?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Batting_hand = 'Left-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id

question: What is the role of W Jaffer in season year 2012?
original_query: SELECT T4.Role_Desc FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T4 ON T2.Role_Id = T4.Role_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T5 ON T3.Season_Id = T5.Season_Id WHERE T1.Player_name = 'W Jaffer' AND T5.Season_Year = 2012

question: Who was the captain-keeper of Rising Pune Supergiants?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T2.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T4 ON T2.Role_Id = T4.Role_Id WHERE T3.Team_Name = 'Rising Pune Supergiants' AND T4.Role_Desc = 'CaptainKeeper' GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: What are the names of players in team 1?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T2.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id WHERE T3.Team_Id = 1 GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: How many players played as a captain in season year 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Match_Id = T2.Match_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T1.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T3.Role_Desc = 'Captain' AND T2.Match_Date LIKE '2008%'

question: State the name of the city with the most venues.
original_query: SELECT T1.City_Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id GROUP BY T1.City_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Venue_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many of the players are from Sri Lanka?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_ID WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'Sri Lanka'

question: Who among the players won both "Man of the Series" and "Orange Cap" in the same season?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Season AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Orange_Cap

question: Provide the names and birthdates of players who have left-arm fast skills.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name, T1.DOB FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T2.Bowling_Id = T1.Bowling_skill WHERE T2.Bowling_skill = 'Left-arm fast'

question: How many times has SR Watson been named 'Man of the Match'?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Player_Name = 'SR Watson' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Match = T2.Player_Id

question: Provide the point of the winning margin in a match between Mumbai Indians and Royal Challengers Bangalore on May 28, 2008.
original_query: SELECT T1.Win_Margin FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_1 INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T3.Team_Id = T1.Team_2 WHERE (T2.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND T3.Team_Name = 'Royal Challengers Bangalore' AND T1.Match_Date = '2008-05-28') OR (T2.Team_Name = 'Royal Challengers Bangalore' AND T3.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND T1.Match_Date = '2008-05-28')

question: List the name and country of the players who got more than average catches in ascending order of the number of catches.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name, T4.Country_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Wicket_Taken AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Fielders INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T3 ON T2.Kind_Out = T3.Out_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T4 ON T1.Country_Name = T4.Country_Id GROUP BY T1.Player_Name ORDER BY COUNT(T3.Out_Name) ASC

question: How many players got out in the first inning of match ID "548335"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Match_Id = 548335 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Wicket_Taken WHERE Innings_No = 1

question: How many players are Indians?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_ID WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'India'

question: Give the match's venue and winning team for the match ID 392194.
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name, T3.Team_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.venue_id = T2.venue_id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T2.match_winner = T3.Team_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 392194

question: Among the matches of Delhi Daredevils in 2009, what is the percentage of their matches won by wickets?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Win_Type = 'wickets' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.Win_Type) FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Match_Winner INNER JOIN Win_By AS T3 ON T2.Win_Type = T3.Win_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Delhi Daredevils'

question: What are the average extra runs given in the second innings of every match?
original_query: SELECT AVG(Innings_No) FROM Extra_Runs WHERE Innings_No = 2

question: How many times does M Chinnaswamy Stadium host games than Maharashtra Cricket Association Stadium?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Venue_Name = 'M Chinnaswamy Stadium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Venue_Name = 'Maharashtra Cricket Association Stadium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id

question: Provide the losing team's name in the match ID 336039.
original_query: SELECT Team_Name FROM Team WHERE Team_Id = ( SELECT CASE WHEN Team_1 = Match_Winner THEN Team_2 ELSE Team_1 END FROM Match WHERE match_id = 336039 )

question: What is the percentage of matches that are won by runs?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.win_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Win_Type) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id

question: In which country do most players have the 'slow left-arm chinaman' bowling style?
original_query: SELECT T3.Country_Name FROM Bowling_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_Id = T2.Bowling_skill INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T1.Bowling_skill = 'Slow left-arm chinaman'

question: For how many times has SC Ganguly played as team captain in a match?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Role_Desc = 'Captain' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: What are the names of players who had been man of the match more than 5 times in season year 2008?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(T2.Man_of_the_Match) > 5 THEN T1.Player_Name ELSE 0 END FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T2.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id WHERE T4.Season_Year = 2008

question: What is the bowling skill of SC Ganguly?
original_query: SELECT T1.Bowling_Skill FROM Bowling_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Bowling_skill = T1.Bowling_Id WHERE T2.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: Write down the name of players whose bowling skill is Legbreak.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Bowling_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_Id = T2.Bowling_skill WHERE T1.Bowling_skill = 'Legbreak'

question: Who got the Man of the Series Award in 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T2.Man_of_the_Match = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T3 ON T3.Season_Id = T2.Season_Id WHERE T3.Season_Year = 2010 GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: List down all of the winning teams' IDs that played in St George's Park.
original_query: SELECT T2.Match_Winner FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Venue_Name LIKE 'St George%'

question: Calculate the average players out in the first innings per match. How many of them were out by the leg before wicket?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Player_Out) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.Match_Id), SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Out_Name = 'lbw' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T1.Kind_Out = T2.Out_Id WHERE T1.Innings_No = 2

question: How many times did K Goel played as a player only?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Match_Id) FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T1.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T2.Player_Name = 'K Goel' AND T3.Role_Id = 3

question: Calculate the win rate of the team "Chennai Super Kings".
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Match_Winner = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Match_Id) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_1 INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T3.Team_Id = T1.Team_2 WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Chennai Super Kings' OR T3.Team_Name = 'Chennai Super Kings'

question: How many of the matches are Superover?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Outcome_Type = 'Superover' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Outcome AS T2 ON T2.Outcome_Id = T1.Outcome_type

question: In how many games in which the batting team was the Delhi Daredevils were no runs scored?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Runs_Scored) FROM Batsman_Scored AS T1 INNER JOIN Ball_by_Ball AS T2 ON T1.Match_Id = T2.Match_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T4 ON T3.Team_1 = T4.Team_Id WHERE T2.Team_Batting = 1 OR T2.Team_Batting = 2 AND T4.Team_Name = 'Delhi Daredevils'

question: List down the DOB of players who received the "man of the match" award.
original_query: SELECT T2.DOB FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Man_of_the_Match

question: When and for what role did the youngest player appear in his first match?
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Date, T4.Role_Desc FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Match_Id = T2.Match_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T2.Player_Id = T3.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T4 ON T2.Role_Id = T4.Role_Id ORDER BY T3.DOB DESC LIMIT 1

question: How old is SC Ganguly in 2008?
original_query: SELECT 2008 - strftime('%Y', DOB) FROM Player WHERE Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: Among the South African players, how many were born before 4/11/1980?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOB < '1980-4-11' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'South Africa'

question: How many players were born in the 90s?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Id) AS cnt FROM Player WHERE DOB BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1999-12-31'

question: What is the second team's name in the match with the lowest winning margin?
original_query: SELECT T1.team_name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_2 ORDER BY T2.win_margin LIMIT 1

question: Among the matches held in Mumbai, how many percent of them were held in Wankhede Stadium?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Venue_Name = 'Wankhede Stadium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.Match_Id) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.City_Id = T1.City_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T3.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T1.City_Name = 'Mumbai'

question: List the names of the first andthe second teams that played a match with the point of the winning margin lower than the 30% of the average winning margin of the matches held in 2011.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.Win_Margin < ( SELECT AVG(Win_Margin) * 0.3 FROM Match WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2011%' ) THEN T2.Team_Name END, CASE WHEN T1.Win_Margin < ( SELECT AVG(Win_Margin) * 0.3 FROM Match WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2011%' ) THEN T3.Team_Name END FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_1 INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T3.Team_Id = T1.Team_2 WHERE T1.Match_Date LIKE '2011%'

question: Which team has the highest number of losses of all time?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(Team_1) AS a, Team_1 FROM Match WHERE Team_1 <> Match_Winner GROUP BY Team_1 UNION SELECT COUNT(Team_2) AS a, Team_2 FROM Match WHERE Team_2 <> Match_Winner GROUP BY Team_2 ORDER BY a DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_1

question: What is the name of the player who has been chosen the most times for 'Man of the Series'?
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_Name FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T2.Man_of_the_Match = T3.Player_Id GROUP BY T3.Player_Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Man_of_the_Series) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the teams that played in a match with the point of winning margin of 38 on April 30, 2009?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_1 WHERE T2.win_margin = 38 AND match_date = '2009-04-30'

question: Write down the player names and IDs of the English umpires.
original_query: SELECT T1.Umpire_Name, T1.Umpire_Id FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Umpire_Country = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'England'

question: Count the matches that were won by wickets in all season.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Match_Id) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id WHERE T2.Win_type = 'wickets'

question: List the first team's name in the match with the highest winning margin.
original_query: SELECT T2.Team_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_1 ORDER BY T1.Win_Margin DESC LIMIT 1

question: In the match ID 419135, who won by runs?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner INNER JOIN Win_By AS T3 ON T2.win_type = T3.win_id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 419135

question: Give the name of venue for the game with a win margin of 138 points.
original_query: SELECT T2.Venue_Name FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Win_Margin = 138

question: List the player's ID of the top five players, by descending order, in terms of bowling skill.
original_query: SELECT Player_Id FROM Player ORDER BY Bowling_skill DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which venue did Kolkata Knight Riders play most of their matches as a Team 1?
original_query: SELECT T3.Venue_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T3 ON T2.Venue_Id = T3.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Kolkata Knight Riders' GROUP BY T3.Venue_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T3.Venue_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the country where St. George's Park is located.
original_query: SELECT T3.Country_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T2.City_Id = T1.City_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T3.Country_Id = T2.Country_id WHERE T1.Venue_Name = 'St George''s Park'

question: List the id of the player who won the Orange Cap for 2 consecutive seasons.
original_query: SELECT Orange_Cap FROM Season GROUP BY Orange_Cap HAVING COUNT(Season_Year) > 1

question: Who is the youngest player and which city did he/she come from?
original_query: SELECT T3.City_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id INNER JOIN City AS T3 ON T2.Country_Id = T3.Country_Id ORDER BY T1.DOB LIMIT 1

question: How many matches are there in 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2008%'

question: List the names and countries of the players from Gujarat Lions who played in the match held on 11th April 2016.
original_query: SELECT T4.Player_Name, T5.Country_Name FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T3.Match_Id = T1.Match_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T4 ON T4.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T5 ON T5.Country_Id = T4.Country_Name WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Gujarat Lions' AND T3.Match_Date = '2016-04-11'

question: Which city hosted the least number of no-result matches?
original_query: SELECT T4.City_Name FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id INNER JOIN Venue AS T3 ON T1.Venue_Id = T3.Venue_Id INNER JOIN City AS T4 ON T3.City_Id = T4.City_Id WHERE T2.Win_Type = 'NO Result' GROUP BY T4.City_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Win_Type) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many players are from Australia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'Australia' THEN T1.Player_Id ELSE NULL END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id

question: Among all the players born after the year 1985, what is the percentage of the players who use the right hand as their batting hand?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Batting_Hand = 'Right-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.DOB, 1, 4) > 1985

question: Among the matches of Delhi Daredevils in 2014, how many won matches are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Match_Winner) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_1 OR T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_2 WHERE T2.team_name = 'Delhi Daredevils' AND T1.Match_Date LIKE '2014%'

question: Which country is umpire TH Wijewardene from?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country_Name FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T2.Country_Id = T1.Umpire_Country WHERE T1.Umpire_Name = 'TH Wijewardene'

question: Give the date of birth of the 2014 Orange Cap winner.
original_query: SELECT T2.DOB FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Player_Id WHERE T1.Season_Year = 2014 AND T1.Orange_Cap IS NOT NULL

question: Please list the IDs of all the matches in the year 2008.
original_query: SELECT Match_Id FROM `Match` WHERE SUBSTR(Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2008'

question: How many percent of the toss-winners decided to bowl first on the pitch from 2010 to 2016?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Toss_Name = 'field' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Toss_Id) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Toss_Decision AS T2 ON T2.Toss_Id = T1.Toss_Decide WHERE T1.Match_Date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2016-12-31'

question: Between match nos. 335989 and 337000, how many times did a batsman score more than 3 runs during over no. 1, ball no. 1, and inning no. 1 of the matches?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Runs_Scored > 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Batsman_Scored WHERE 335989 < Match_Id < 337000 AND Innings_No = 1 AND Over_Id = 1 AND Ball_Id = 1

question: Is SuperSport Park located at Centurion?
original_query: SELECT T2.City_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id WHERE T1.Venue_Name LIKE 'St George%'

question: What year was R Dravid born and the role he played?
original_query: SELECT T1.DOB, T3.Role_Desc FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'R Dravid' GROUP BY T1.DOB, T3.Role_Desc

question: What is the id of the team with the highest number of matches won?
original_query: SELECT Match_Id FROM `Match` ORDER BY Match_Winner DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the team that won the first ever match?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Match_Winner WHERE T2.Season_Id = 1 ORDER BY T2.Match_Date LIMIT 1

question: What is the nationality of the 7th season Purple Cap winner?
original_query: SELECT T3.Country_Name FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T1.Season_Id = 7 AND T1.Purple_Cap IS NOT NULL

question: Who is the oldest player?
original_query: SELECT Player_Name FROM Player ORDER BY DOB ASC LIMIT 1

question: Of the wickets taken in the third overs, how many are without the involvement of fielders?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Fielders = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Wicket_Taken WHERE Over_Id = 3

question: When did Chennai Super Kings play its first match?
original_query: SELECT Match_Date FROM `Match` WHERE team_1 = ( SELECT Team_Id FROM Team WHERE Team_Name = 'Chennai Super Kings' ) OR Team_2 = ( SELECT Team_Id FROM Team WHERE Team_Name = 'Chennai Super Kings' ) ORDER BY Match_Date ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many players with left-hand batting style are from India?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Batting_hand = 'Left-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt FROM Batting_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Batting_Id = T2.Batting_hand INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T3.Country_Name = 'India'

question: Of the matches that were won by runs by team 1, what percentage have team 1 won the toss and decided to field?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Team_1 = T1.Match_Winner = T1.Toss_Winner THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / TOTAL(T1.Team_1) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id INNER JOIN Toss_Decision AS T3 ON T1.Toss_Decide = T3.Toss_Id WHERE T3.Toss_Name = 'field' AND T2.Win_Type = 'runs'

question: What is the name of the team that won the most number of matches in season 1?
original_query: SELECT Team_Name FROM Team WHERE Team_Id = ( SELECT Match_Winner FROM `Match` WHERE season_Id = 1 GROUP BY Match_Winner ORDER BY COUNT(Match_Winner) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which is the country of the city named "Rajkot"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Id WHERE city_name = 'Rajkot'

question: Give me the match ID and date of the matches that were held in Kingsmead for three consecutive days.
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id, T1.Match_Date FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T2.Venue_Name = 'Kingsmead'

question: List all the names of the winning team's players in the first match of season 1.
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_Name FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Match_Winner = T2.Team_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T2.Player_Id = T3.Player_Id WHERE T1.Season_Id = 1 ORDER BY T1.Match_Date LIMIT 1

question: Provide the winning team's name in the match with the point of winning margin of 7 on May 7, 2009.
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Match_Winner WHERE T2.Match_Date = '2009-05-07' AND T2.Win_Margin = 7

question: Please list the names of the players who use the right hand as their batting hand and are from Australia.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Country_Name = T1.Country_id INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T3 ON T2.Batting_hand = T3.Batting_Id WHERE T1.Country_Name = 'Australia' AND T3.Batting_Hand = 'Right-hand bat'

question: List the name of all New Zealand umpires.
original_query: SELECT T1.Umpire_Name FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Umpire_Country = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'New Zealand'

question: From 2011 to 2012, how many Australian players became the "Man of the Match"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Match_Date BETWEEN '2011%' AND '2012%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T3.Country_Id = T2.Country_Name WHERE T3.Country_Name = 'Australia'

question: How many matches were held at the venue named "Newlands"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Venue_Name = 'Newlands' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.Venue_Id = T1.Venue_Id

question: What is the bowling skill used by most players?
original_query: SELECT T1.Bowling_Skill FROM Bowling_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Bowling_skill = T1.Bowling_Id GROUP BY T1.Bowling_Skill ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Bowling_Skill) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of all the umpires from England.
original_query: SELECT T1.Umpire_Name FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T2.Country_Id = T1.Umpire_Country WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'England'

question: How many players are older than Gurkeerat Singh player?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DOB < '1990-06-29' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player WHERE Player_Name != 'Gurkeerat Singh'

question: Calculate the win rate of the toss-winners in 2012.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Toss_Winner = Match_Winner THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Match_Date LIKE '2012%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match`

question: Which country does Ranchi city belong to?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country_Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Id WHERE T1.City_Name = 'Ranchi'

question: How many seasons did Pune Warriors participate in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.Season_Year) FROM ( SELECT T4.Season_Year FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T1.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T2.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Pune Warriors' GROUP BY T4.Season_Year ) T

question: What is the average winning margin of all the matches SC Ganguly has played in?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T3.Win_Margin) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: Identify by their ID all the overs in which the player with ID 7 was on strike.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Over_Id FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Striker = 7

question: How many cities are located in South Africa?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'South Africa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T2.Country_Id = T1.Country_id

question: Among the matches held in 2015, who is the winning team in the match ID 829768?
original_query: SELECT T2.Team_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Match_Winner WHERE T1.Match_Date LIKE '2015%' AND T1.Match_Id = 829768

question: Among the players whose bowling skill is "Legbreak", when was the oldest one of them born?
original_query: SELECT MIN(T1.DOB) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_skill = T2.Bowling_Id WHERE T2.Bowling_Skill = 'Legbreak'

question: Which season has the fewest number of matches?
original_query: SELECT Season_Id FROM `Match` GROUP BY Season_Id ORDER BY COUNT(Match_Id) LIMIT 1

question: What is the average winning margin of the matches held in Newlands?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.win_margin) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.venue_id = T2.venue_id WHERE T2.venue_name = 'Newlands'

question: Calculate the percentage of left hand batting style players among all players.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Batting_hand = 'Left-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id

question: List the name of the players born between 1970 and 1990 in descending order of age.
original_query: SELECT Player_Name FROM Player WHERE DOB BETWEEN '1970-01-01' AND '1990-12-31' ORDER BY DOB DESC

question: How many matches did team Mumbai Indians win in 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.Match_Id) FROM ( SELECT T2.Match_Id FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T1.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND T2.Match_Date LIKE '2008%' GROUP BY T2.Match_Id ) T

question: List the name of England players.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_ID WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'England'

question: What is the total number of won matches of the team named "Pune Warriors"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Team_Name = 'Pune Warriors' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Match_Winner

question: Tally the match IDs in which V Kohli is the "Man of the Match".
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Match = T2.Player_Id WHERE T2.Player_Name = 'V Kohli'

question: What is the name of the team that won match ID 336000?
original_query: SELECT T2.Team_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Match_Winner WHERE T1.Match_Id = 336000

question: How many matches were there in May, 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE SUBSTR(Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2008' AND SUBSTR(Match_Date, 7, 1) = '5'

question: Among the matches played by Royal Challengers Bangalore, what is the match ID of the match with the highest winning margin?
original_query: SELECT T2.match_id FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner WHERE T1.team_name = 'Royal Challengers Bangalore' AND T2.match_date LIKE '2012%' ORDER BY T2.win_margin DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the match IDs which were held on 18th April 2015.
original_query: SELECT Match_Id FROM Match WHERE Match_Date LIKE '%2015-04-18%'

question: What is the ratio of players with batting hands of left and right?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Batting_hand = 'Left-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Batting_hand = 'Right-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id

question: What is the city name of country ID 3?
original_query: SELECT City_Name FROM City WHERE Country_ID = 3

question: How old is Ishan Kishan in 2022?
original_query: SELECT 2022 - SUBSTR(DOB, 1, 4) FROM Player WHERE Player_Name = 'Ishan Kishan'

question: Compute the run rate at the end of 16 overs of the match ID 335999. Please include the name of the "Man of_the Match".
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Toss_Name = 'bat' THEN T3.Runs_Scored ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Toss_Name = 'field' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Toss_Decision AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Toss_Id = T2.Toss_Decide INNER JOIN Batsman_Scored AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 335987 AND T2.Match_Date = '2008-04-18' GROUP BY T3.Over_Id HAVING COUNT(T1.Toss_Name = 'field') = 16

question: List down the name of teams that won the toss of the coin from matches with ID from 336010 to 336020.
original_query: SELECT T2.Team_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Toss_Winner WHERE T1.Match_Id BETWEEN 336010 AND 336020

question: Among the matches, what percentage have a winning margin above 100?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Win_Margin > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / TOTAL(Match_Id) FROM `Match`

question: From which city was the tweet with the most number of retweets posted?
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID ORDER BY T1.RetweetCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: From which city were more tweets posted, Bangkok or Chiang Mai?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Bangkok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bNum , SUM(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Chiang Mai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cNum FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.City IN ('Bangkok', 'Chiang Mai')

question: What is the gender of the user who posted a tweet with ID tw-682714583044243456?
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-682714583044243456'

question: What is the percentage of male Twitter users from Florida?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Gender = 'Male' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.TweetID) AS percentage FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID INNER JOIN user AS T3 ON T3.UserID = T1.UserID WHERE T2.State = 'Florida'

question: What gender of users retweet more than 30 times?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.RetweetCount > 30

question: Among all the tweets posted from Buenos Aires, how many of them were posted on Thursdays?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.City = 'Buenos Aires' AND T1.Weekday = 'Thursday'

question: What is the average number of tweets posted by the users in a city in Argentina?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Buenos Aires' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.TweetID) AS avg FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Argentina'

question: How many reshared tweets are there in Texas?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.State = 'Texas' AND T1.IsReshare = 'TRUE'

question: Calculate the total number of male tweet IDs.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: State the number of states in the United Kingdom.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(State) AS State_number FROM location WHERE Country = 'United Kingdom'

question: Among all the tweets sent by male users in Argentina, what is the text of the one with the most number of likes?
original_query: SELECT T2.text FROM user AS T1 INNER JOIN twitter AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID INNER JOIN location AS T3 ON T2.LocationID = T3.LocationID WHERE T3.Country = 'Argentina' AND T1.Gender = 'Male' ORDER BY T2.Likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the tweets that are reshared, how many of them are posted by a user in Buenos Aires?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.City = 'Buenos Aires' AND T1.IsReshare = 'TRUE'

question: What is the total number of tweets sent by male users on Mondays?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T1.Weekday = 'Monday'

question: How many tweets have been posted on Wednesday?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Wednesday'

question: Please list the texts of all the tweets in French posted by male users.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T1.Lang = 'fr'

question: Users in which city of Argentina post the most tweets?
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Argentina' GROUP BY T2.City ORDER BY COUNT(T1.TweetID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the texts of all the tweets that are not in English.
original_query: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE Lang != 'en'

question: Please give the user ID of the user who has posted the most tweets.
original_query: SELECT UserID FROM twitter GROUP BY UserID ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many tweets have the male users posted in total?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: Users in which country has posted more numbers of positive tweets, Argentina or Australia?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.Country IN ('Argentina', 'Australia') AND T1.Sentiment > 0 GROUP BY T2.Country ORDER BY COUNT(T1.TweetID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the text of the tweet that got the most `likes`?
original_query: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE Likes = ( SELECT MAX( Likes) FROM twitter )

question: How many female users reshared their tweets?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Female' AND T1.IsReshare = 'TRUE'

question: Among the tweets posted from Santa Fe state in Argentina, how many of them were posted on 31st?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T1.Day = 31 AND T2.State = 'Santa' AND T2.Country = 'Argentina'

question: Please list all the cities from where tweets with neutral sentiments were posted.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.City FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE Sentiment = 0

question: Please list the texts of all the tweets that are reshared.
original_query: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE IsReshare = 'TRUE'

question: Give the number of users who do not show their genders.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(UserID) AS user_number FROM user WHERE Gender = 'Unknown'

question: How many tweets are in English?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) AS tweet_number FROM twitter WHERE Lang = 'en'

question: State the number of positive tweets from Ha Noi.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.Sentiment > 0 AND T2.State = 'Ha Noi'

question: What is the gender of the user who has posted the tweet that is seen by the most number of unique users?
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID ORDER BY T1.Reach DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the gender of the user who tweeted `tw-715909161071091712`?
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-715909161071091712'

question: List down the text of tweets posted by unknown gender users.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Unknown'

question: Show the text of the tweet with the highest klout from Connecticut.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.State = 'Connecticut' ORDER BY T1.Klout DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many tweets in total were posted by a user in Argentina?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Argentina' LIMIT 1

question: Count the total number of tweet IDs in `en`.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Lang = 'en'

question: What is the average number of likes for a tweet posted by a male user on Mondays?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Likes) / COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T1.Weekday = 'Monday'

question: Among all the tweets posted on Mondays, how many of them are reshared?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Monday' AND IsReshare = 'TRUE'

question: Among all the users that have posted a tweet with over 1000 likes, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Likes > 10 AND T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: How many unique users have seen tweet with text `Happy New Year to all those AWS instances of ours!`?
original_query: SELECT Reach FROM twitter WHERE text = 'Happy New Year to all those AWS instances of ours!'

question: List down all of the texts posted on Twitter on Thursday.
original_query: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Thursday'

question: Find out the yearly income of geographic ID when the customer is female and occupation as sales.
original_query: SELECT T2.INHABITANTS_K * T2.INCOME_K * 12 FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T1.OCCUPATION = 'Sales'

question: What is the number of inhabitants and income of geographic identifier 239?
original_query: SELECT INHABITANTS_K FROM Demog WHERE GEOID = 239

question: How many customers are from the place with the highest average income per month?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID ORDER BY T2.INCOME_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which customer come from a place with more inhabitants, customer no.0 or customer no.1?
original_query: SELECT T1.ID FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.ID = 0 OR T1.ID = 1 ORDER BY INHABITANTS_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: In male customers ages from 30 to 50, how many of them has an income ranges from 2000 to 2300?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T1.age >= 30 AND T1.age <= 50 AND T2.INCOME_K >= 2000 AND T2.INCOME_K <= 2300

question: How many female customers have an education level of over 11?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM > 11 AND SEX = 'Female'

question: What is the average education level of customers from the place with the highest average income per month?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.EDUCATIONNUM) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID ORDER BY T2.INCOME_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: Point out the greater one between the number of actual responding and not responding to mailing.
original_query: SELECT RESPONSE FROM Mailings1_2 GROUP BY RESPONSE ORDER BY COUNT(RESPONSE) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the number of customers who did not respond in February of 2007.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(REFID) custmoer_number FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE RESPONSE = 'false' AND REF_DATE BETWEEN '2007-02-01' AND '2007-02-28'

question: What is the number of inhabitants of male customers ages from 20 to 30 years old who are farming or fishing?
original_query: SELECT T2.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.OCCUPATION = 'Farming-fishing' AND T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T1.age >= 20 AND T1.age <= 30

question: List down the number of inhabitants of customers with a widowed marital status and false response .
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Widowed' AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: Of customers who provide other services, how many are from places where inhabitants are more than 20000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.GEOID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.OCCUPATION = 'Other-service' AND T2.INHABITANTS_K > 20

question: Of the first 60,000 customers who sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department, how many of them are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: List down the customer's reference ID with true response.
original_query: SELECT REFID FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE RESPONSE = 'true'

question: List down the geographic identifier with an income that ranges from 2100 to 2500.
original_query: SELECT GEOID FROM Demog WHERE INCOME_K >= 2100 AND INCOME_K <= 2500

question: List the educationnum and response of customers within the age of 20 to 30 that has the highest number of inhabitants among the group.
original_query: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONNUM, T2.RESPONSE FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.age >= 20 AND T1.age <= 30 ORDER BY T3.INHABITANTS_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the divorced male customers, give the income and response of those who has an level of education of 6 and above.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.INCOME_K, T2.RESPONSE FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.EDUCATIONNUM > 6 AND T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Divorced'

question: List the level of education and income of customers ages from 30 to 55 with a true response.
original_query: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONNUM, T3.INCOME_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.age >= 30 AND T1.age <= 55 AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: List the marital status of customers within the age of 40 to 60 that has the highest income among the group.
original_query: SELECT T1.MARITAL_STATUS FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.age >= 40 AND T1.age <= 60 ORDER BY T2.INCOME_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of elderly customers who are never married in the place with geographic ID 24?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'never married' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.GEOID = 24

question: Among the male customers with an level of education of 4 and below, list their income K.
original_query: SELECT INCOME_K FROM Demog WHERE GEOID IN ( SELECT GEOID FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM < 4 AND SEX = 'Male' )

question: Among the customers from a place with more than 20,000 and less than 30,000 inhabitants, how many of them are Machine-op-inspcts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.GEOID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.OCCUPATION = 'Machine-op-inspct' AND T2.INHABITANTS_K > 20 AND T2.INHABITANTS_K < 30

question: Among the customers over 30, how many of them are Machine-op-inspcts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE OCCUPATION = 'Machine-op-inspct' AND age > 30

question: How many of the customers are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE SEX = 'Male'

question: Please list the occupations of the customers over 40 and have sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.OCCUPATION FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.age > 40 AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: List the marital status and response of female customers with an level of education of 8 and above.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.MARITAL_STATUS, T2.RESPONSE FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.EDUCATIONNUM > 8 AND T1.SEX = 'Female'

question: What is the ratio of male and female among the age of teenager when the education is above 10?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Customers WHERE age BETWEEN 13 AND 19 AND EDUCATIONNUM > 10

question: Among the female customers with an level of education of 3 and below, list their income.
original_query: SELECT INCOME_K FROM Demog WHERE GEOID IN ( SELECT GEOID FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM < 3 AND SEX = 'Female' )

question: What is the total number of widowed customers with an age below 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE MARITAL_STATUS = 'Widowed' AND age < 50

question: What is the average age of first 60,000 customers who sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.age) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: How many customers have never married?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE MARITAL_STATUS = 'Never-married'

question: What is the occupation of customers within number of inhabitants ranges of 30 to 40?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.OCCUPATION FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T2.INHABITANTS_K >= 30 AND T2.INHABITANTS_K <= 40

question: What is the geographic ID and total income per year when the average income is above 3300 dollar.
original_query: SELECT GEOID, INHABITANTS_K * INCOME_K * 12 FROM Demog WHERE INCOME_K > 3300

question: Find the response status to customer whose geographic ID of 134.
original_query: SELECT T2.RESPONSE FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN mailings3 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.GEOID = 134

question: List the occupation and income of male customers with an level of education of 4 to 6.
original_query: SELECT T1.OCCUPATION, T2.INCOME_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.EDUCATIONNUM >= 4 AND T1.EDUCATIONNUM <= 6 AND T1.SEX = 'Male'

question: In customers with marital status of never married, what is the percentage of customers with income of 2500 and above?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.INCOME_K > 2500 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Never-married'

question: List the income and number of inhabitants of customers with an age greater than the 80% of average age of all customers?
original_query: SELECT T2.INCOME_K, T2.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID GROUP BY T2.INCOME_K, T2.INHABITANTS_K HAVING T1.age > 0.8 * AVG(T1.age)

question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
original_query: SELECT T1.type, SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'

question: How many of the members' hometowns are from Maryland state?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.member_id) FROM zip_code AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.zip_code = T2.zip WHERE T1.state = 'Maryland'

question: Which event has the highest budget amount?
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id ORDER BY T1.amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name and major of members who had to spend more than a hundred dollars on an expense?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T1.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T3.cost > 100

question: What are the zip codes that have post office boxes in the country of the country of San Juan Municipio whose state is Puerto Rico?
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM zip_code WHERE type = 'PO Box' AND county = 'San Juan Municipio' AND state = 'Puerto Rico'

question: How many students of the Student_Club have attended the event "Women's Soccer"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'

question: State the name of students from Georgetown, South Carolina.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.city = 'Georgetown' AND T2.state = 'South Carolina'

question: How many events did the member with the phone number "954-555-6240" attend?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.link_to_event) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.phone = '954-555-6240'

question: How much did the Student_Club members spend on advertisement in September Meeting?
original_query: SELECT T2.spent FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'September Meeting' AND T2.category = 'Advertisement' AND SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 6, 2) = '09'

question: What is the status of the event which bought "Post Cards, Posters" on 2019/8/20?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_status FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.budget_id = T2.link_to_budget WHERE T2.expense_description = 'Post Cards, Posters' AND T2.expense_date = '2019-08-20'

question: State the major name for the Vice President of the club.
original_query: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President'

question: State the name of major that Phillip Cullen has joined.
original_query: SELECT T1.major_name FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T2.first_name = 'Phillip' AND T2.last_name = 'Cullen'

question: When did the member, Casey Mason, received the income?
original_query: SELECT T2.date_received FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.first_name = 'Casey' AND T1.last_name = 'Mason'

question: State the name of major that Vice President has joined.
original_query: SELECT T1.major_name FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T2.position = 'Vice President'

question: Indicate the cost of posters for 'September Speaker' event.
original_query: SELECT T3.cost FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'September Speaker' AND T3.expense_description = 'Posters'

question: Mention the total expense used on 8/20/2019.
original_query: SELECT SUM(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense_date = '2019-08-20'

question: Where is Amy Firth's hometown?
original_query: SELECT T2.city, T2.county, T2.state FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Amy' AND T1.last_name = 'Firth'

question: What is the average amount paid by students in a position other than a member?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.cost) FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member as T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id WHERE T2.position != 'Member'

question: Calculate the difference in the percentage of members in New Jersey and Vermont.
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'New Jersey' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'Vermont' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) AS diff FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip

question: Calculate the amount budgeted for 'April Speaker' event. List all the budgeted categories for said event in an ascending order based on their amount budgeted.
original_query: SELECT T2.category, SUM(T2.amount) FROM event AS T1 JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'April Speaker' GROUP BY T2.category ORDER BY SUM(T2.amount) ASC

question: Calculate the percentage of zip codes that are PO boxes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'PO Box' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(zip_code) FROM zip_code

question: What kind of expenses incurred by members who have X-Large in size of tee shirt?
original_query: SELECT T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'

question: What are the expenses of the budget with the lowest remaining?
original_query: SELECT T2.expense_description FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.budget_id = T2.link_to_budget ORDER BY T1.remaining LIMIT 1

question: Please list the phone numbers of the students from the Student_Club that has attended the event "Women's Soccer".
original_query: SELECT T3.phone FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'

question: Who was the first one paid his/her dues? Tell the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T2.source = 'Dues' ORDER BY T2.date_received LIMIT 1

question: State what kind of expenses that Sacha Harrison incurred?
original_query: SELECT T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.first_name = 'Sacha' AND T1.last_name = 'Harrison'

question: Among the budgets for Advertising, list out top three which have the most budgeted amount?
original_query: SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE category = 'Advertisement' ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many times was the budget in Advertisement for "Yearly Kickoff" meeting more than "October Meeting"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.type = 'Meeting'

question: What is the name of the social event that was attended by the vice president of the Student_Club located at 900 E. Washington St.?
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM attendance AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T2.event_id = T1.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T3.position = 'Vice President' AND T2.location = '900 E. Washington St.' AND T2.type = 'Social'

question: State the category of events were held at MU 215.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.category FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.location = 'MU 215'

question: What is the event that has the highest attendance of the students from the Student_Club?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.link_to_event) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many members of the Student_Club have majored Environmental Engineering?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.major_name = 'Environmental Engineering'

question: Which budget allowed the most money for water, chips, and cookies?
original_query: SELECT T2.budget_id FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Water, chips, cookies' ORDER BY T1.cost DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the date Connor Hilton paid his/her dues.
original_query: SELECT T2.date_received FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.first_name = 'Connor' AND T1.last_name = 'Hilton' AND T2.source = 'Dues'

question: With the biggest budget for the "Food", what was the remaining of it?
original_query: SELECT remaining FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food' AND amount = ( SELECT MAX(amount) FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food' )

question: Please list the phone numbers of the members who majored in business at the College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences.
original_query: SELECT T1.phone FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T2.major_name = 'Business' AND T2.college = 'College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences'

question: Which members who were approved from 1/10/2019 to 11/19/2019? Please identify the member who attended the event and the link to their event.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.link_to_member, T3.link_to_event FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T2.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE date(SUBSTR(T1.expense_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-01-10' AND '2019-11-19' AND T1.approved = 'true'

question: What does the person with the phone number "809-555-3360" major in?
original_query: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.phone = '809-555-3360'

question: List the name of students that have attended more than 7 events.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member GROUP BY T2.link_to_member HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 7

question: List the last names of students under the Elementary Education major and include their phone numbers.
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name, T1.phone FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T2.major_name = 'Elementary Education'

question: What is the total amount of money spent for food?
original_query: SELECT SUM(spent) FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food'

question: For all the club members from "Business" major, how many of them wear medium size t-shirt?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.major_name = 'Business' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

question: Where is the hometown of Garrett Gerke?
original_query: SELECT T2.city FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip WHERE T1.first_name = 'Garrett' AND T1.last_name = 'Gerke'

question: What category was budgeted for the 'January Speaker' event and how much was the amount budgeted for that category?
original_query: SELECT T2.category, T2.amount FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'January Speaker'

question: What is the last name and position of the student that bought pizza on 09/10/2019?
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name, T1.position FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T2.expense_date = '2019-09-10' AND T2.expense_description = 'Pizza'

question: In the College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences, how many majors are under the department of School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(major_id) FROM major WHERE department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education' AND college = 'College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences'

question: List the name of events with less than average parking cost.
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T2.category = 'Parking' AND T3.cost < (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)

question: What is the percentage of the events that went over budget?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN remaining < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(budget_id) FROM budget

question: List the names of closed event as "game" that was closed from 3/15/2019 to 3/20/2020.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT event_name FROM event WHERE type = 'Game' AND date(SUBSTR(event_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-03-15' AND '2020-03-20' AND status = 'Closed'

question: Among the students from the Student_Club who attended the event "Women's Soccer", how many of them want a T-shirt that's in medium size?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND T3.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

question: List the full name of all the members of the Student_Club who attended the "Laugh Out Loud" event.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T3.event_name = 'Laugh Out Loud'

question: How many income generated by Grant Gilmour?
original_query: SELECT T2.amount FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.first_name = 'Grant' AND T1.last_name = 'Gilmour'

question: What college offers the major that Tyler Hewitt took?
original_query: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Tyler' AND T1.last_name = 'Hewitt'

question: How many members of the Student_Club have major in 'Physics Teaching'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.member_id) FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T1.major_name = 'Physics Teaching'

question: Among all the closed events, which event has the highest spend-to-budget ratio?
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T2.status = 'Closed' ORDER BY T1.spent / T1.amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: What county did Sherri Ramsey grew up?
original_query: SELECT T2.county FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Sherri' AND T1.last_name = 'Ramsey'

question: What was the notes of the fundraising on 2019/9/14?
original_query: SELECT notes FROM income WHERE source = 'Fundraising' AND date_received = '2019-09-14'

question: List all the expenses incurred by the vice president.
original_query: SELECT T2.expense_id, T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President'

question: What department offers the major that Pierce and Guidi took?
original_query: SELECT T2.department FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.last_name = 'Pierce' OR T1.last_name = 'Guidi'

question: Which department was the President of the club in?
original_query: SELECT T2.department FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.position = 'President'

question: Which student has been entrusted to manage the budget for the Yearly Kickoff?
original_query: SELECT T4.first_name, T4.last_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget INNER JOIN member AS T4 ON T3.link_to_member = T4.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'

question: Calculate the total amount spent on speaker gifts and list the name of the event they were spent on.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.spent), T2.event_name FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T1.category = 'Speaker Gifts' GROUP BY T2.event_name

question: Which budget category does the expense 'Posters' fall to?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.category FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Posters'

question: What was the cost for the "Posters" on 2019/9/4?
original_query: SELECT cost FROM expense WHERE expense_description = 'Posters' AND expense_date = '2019-09-04'

question: List all the members of the "School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education" department.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education'

question: Please list the full names of the students in the Student_Club that come from the Art and Design Department.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.department = 'Art and Design Department'

question: List the last name of the members of the club that attended the women's soccer event.
original_query: SELECT T3.last_name FROM attendance AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T2.event_id = T1.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T2.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND T3.position = 'Member'

question: How many meeting events were held in 2020?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(event_id) FROM event WHERE type = 'Meeting' AND SUBSTR(event_date, 1, 4) = '2020'

question: Write the full names of students who received funds on the date of 9/9/2019 and include the amount received.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.first_name, T3.last_name, T4.amount FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN income AS T4 ON T4.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T4.date_received = '2019-09-09'

question: Provide the full name and email address of the Student_Club's Secretary.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name, email FROM member WHERE position = 'Secretary'

question: Was each expense in October Meeting on October 8, 2019 approved?
original_query: SELECT T3.approved FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND T1.event_date LIKE '2019-10-08%'

question: In the events with more than forty incomes, list the city and country in which the event is happening.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.city, T3.county FROM income AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN zip_code AS T3 ON T3.zip_code = T2.zip WHERE T1.amount > 40

question: Among the members with t-shirt size of medium, what is the percentage of the amount 50 received by the Student_Club?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.amount = 50 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.income_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Member' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

question: What is the average attendance of meetings in 2020?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.link_to_event) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.link_to_event) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' AND T1.type = 'Meeting'

question: How many students in the Student_Club are from the College of Engineering?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.college = 'College of Engineering'

question: Please indicate the college of the person whose first name is Katy with the link to the major "rec1N0upiVLy5esTO".
original_query: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.link_to_major = 'rec1N0upiVLy5esTO' AND T1.first_name = 'Katy'

question: List out the full name and total cost that member id "rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v" incurred?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, SUM(T2.cost) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'

question: Which college do most of the members go to?
original_query: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id GROUP BY T2.major_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.college) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many student have the position of president?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(member_id) FROM member WHERE position = 'President'

question: List 10 students that have no due payments and are not males.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T2.`name` NOT IN ( SELECT name FROM male ) AND T1.bool = 'neg'

question: How many disabled students have been absent for 3 months from school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.month = 3

question: How many unemployed and bankrupt students that have payment dues?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T3 ON T2.name = T3.name WHERE T3.bool = 'pos'

question: List out the number of disabled students who enlisted in marines.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.organ = 'marines'

question: How many disabled students are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM male AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: How many students enlisted in the fire-department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'fire_department'

question: How many students enlist in the air force organization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'air_force'

question: Student21 is enlisted in which organization and has the student been absent?
original_query: SELECT T2.month, T1.organ FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T1.name = 'student21'

question: What is the percentage of unemployed students who have been absent for 5 months from school?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.month > 5, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.month) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: What is the average absent month for a unemployed male students?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.month) AS avg FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name INNER JOIN male AS T3 ON T3.name = T2.name

question: Count the number of female students who belong to marines organization.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name LEFT JOIN male AS T3 ON T1.name = T3.name WHERE T2.organ = 'marines' AND T3.name IS NULL

question: How many students were absence for 4 month?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month = 4

question: Among the male students, list down the names of students with payment due.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM male AS T1 INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.bool = 'pos'

question: Name all students enlisted in the foreign legion.
original_query: SELECT name FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'foreign_legion'

question: Sum up the number of students enlisted in foreign legion, peace corps and army.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ IN ('army', 'peace_corps', 'foreign_legion')

question: List the names of disabled students enlisted in the navy.
