question: Who is the publisher of the game 2002 FIFA World Cup?
original_query: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM game_publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T1.game_id = T3.id WHERE T3.game_name = '2002 FIFA World Cup'

question: Indicate the name of all adventure games.
original_query: SELECT T2.game_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.genre_name = 'Adventure'

question: What is the genre of the game titled '999: Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors' ?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T1.game_name = '999: Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors'

question: Provide the ID of 1C Company.
original_query: SELECT T.id FROM publisher AS T WHERE T.publisher_name = '1C Company'

question: In which regions has the game 'Pengo' been sold?
original_query: SELECT T5.region_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.game_publisher_id INNER JOIN region_sales AS T4 ON T3.id = T4.game_platform_id INNER JOIN region AS T5 ON T4.region_id = T5.id WHERE T1.game_name = 'Pengo'

question: What is the genre of the game '2 Games in 1: Sonic Advance & ChuChu Rocket!'?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T1.game_name = '2 Games in 1: Sonic Advance & ChuChu Rocket!'

question: List down the platform IDs of the games with a region ID of 3.
original_query: SELECT T2.id FROM region_sales AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.game_platform_id = T2.id WHERE T1.region_id = 3

question: What percentage of games are sports?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.genre_name = 'Sports' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.id) FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id

question: List down the platform IDs of the games released in 2007.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T.platform_id FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year = 2007

question: State the name of the platforms for games released in 2000.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.platform_name FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN platform AS T2 ON T1.platform_id = T2.id WHERE T1.release_year = 2000

question: Provide the platform where the Panzer Tactics can be played.
original_query: SELECT T4.platform_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.game_publisher_id INNER JOIN platform AS T4 ON T3.platform_id = T4.id WHERE T1.game_name = 'Panzer Tactics'

question: Among the games published by Nintendo, what is the percentage of those in the genre of sports?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T4.genre_name = 'Sports' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100/ COUNT(T1.id) FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T1.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Nintendo'

question: Which genre has the most games? Show its id.
original_query: SELECT genre_id FROM ( SELECT T.genre_id, COUNT(T.id) FROM game AS T GROUP BY T.genre_id ORDER BY COUNT(T.id) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the genre of the game "Mario vs. Donkey Kong"?
original_query: SELECT T1.genre_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id WHERE T2.game_name = 'Mario vs. Donkey Kong'

question: What are the names of the games published by American Softworks?
original_query: SELECT T3.game_name FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T1.publisher_name = 'American Softworks'

question: How many FIFA games are there across all platforms?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T.game_name FROM game AS T WHERE T.game_name LIKE '%FIFA%' )

question: When was the game titled 3DS Classic Collection released?
original_query: SELECT T1.release_year FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T3.game_name = '3DS Classic Collection'

question: Name the publisher of the Chronicles of the Sword game.
original_query: SELECT T3.publisher_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T1.game_name = 'Chronicles of the Sword'

question: What is the id of the game "Resident Evil Archives: Resident Evil"?
original_query: SELECT T.genre_id FROM game AS T WHERE T.game_name = 'Resident Evil Archives: Resident Evil'

question: Which publisher has published the most number of Action games?
original_query: SELECT T.publisher_name FROM ( SELECT T4.publisher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.game_id INNER JOIN publisher AS T4 ON T3.publisher_id = T4.id WHERE T1.genre_name = 'Action' GROUP BY T4.publisher_name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: What are the names of the publishers who published the oldest games?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.publisher_name FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id ORDER BY T1.release_year LIMIT 1

question: List the platform ID of the game titled Airborne Troops: Countdown to D-Day.
original_query: SELECT T1.platform_id FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T3.game_name = 'Airborne Troops: Countdown to D-Day'

question: What is the genre ID of the game named 25 to Life?
original_query: SELECT T.genre_id FROM game AS T WHERE T.game_name = '25 to Life'

question: How many role-playing games are there?

question: List the name of all games published by 'Pioneer LDC'.
original_query: SELECT T3.game_name FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T1.publisher_name = 'Pioneer LDC'

question: Give the name of the publisher of the game ID 75.
original_query: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM game_publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.game_id = 75

question: List the game IDs that were released in 2017.
original_query: SELECT T.id FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year = 2017

question: What are the sales made by the games in Japan region?

question: How many games were released in 1981?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.id) FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year = 1981

question: Give the game name of the game ID 44.
original_query: SELECT T.game_name FROM game AS T WHERE T.id = 44

question: List the genre id of the game Pro Evolution Soccer 2012.
original_query: SELECT T.genre_id FROM game AS T WHERE T.game_name = 'Pro Evolution Soccer 2012'

question: List down the game ID of games with genre ID 2.
original_query: SELECT T.id FROM game AS T WHERE T.genre_id = 2

question: How many games were sold on the DS platform on average in the 4 different regions?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.num_sales) * 100000 / 4 FROM region_sales AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.game_platform_id = T2.id INNER JOIN platform AS T3 ON T2.platform_id = T3.id WHERE T3.platform_name = 'DS'

question: How many games are puzzle genre?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T2.genre_name = 'Puzzle'

question: Provide any five games and release year under the sports genre.
original_query: SELECT T3.game_name, T1.release_year FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T3.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T4.genre_name = 'Sports' LIMIT 5

question: Indicate, by region, which platform has sold the most games.
original_query: SELECT T.region_name FROM ( SELECT T1.platform_name, T4.region_name, SUM(T3.num_sales) FROM platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id INNER JOIN region_sales AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.game_platform_id INNER JOIN region AS T4 ON T3.region_id = T4.id GROUP BY T1.platform_name, T4.region_name ORDER BY SUM(T3.num_sales) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: What publishers have the word 'Entertainment' in their name?
original_query: SELECT T.publisher_name FROM publisher AS T WHERE T.publisher_name LIKE '%Entertainment%'

question: What is the genre of the game ID 119?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T1.id = 119

question: List down the names of platform where the games released in 2016 can be played on.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.platform_name FROM platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id WHERE T2.release_year = 2016

question: Which publisher has published the most games?
original_query: SELECT T.publisher_name FROM ( SELECT T2.publisher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) FROM game_publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.publisher_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: Which game has the longest name?
original_query: SELECT T.game_name FROM game AS T ORDER BY LENGTH(T.game_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the name of game produced by 505 Games in 2006.
original_query: SELECT T3.game_name FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T4 ON T2.publisher_id = T4.id WHERE T4.publisher_name = '505 Games' AND T1.release_year = 2006

question: Among games sold in Europe, list the platform ID of games with sales lesser than 30% of the average number of sales.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.platform_id FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T3 ON T2.game_platform_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Europe' AND T2.num_sales * 100 * 100000 < ( SELECT AVG(T2.num_sales * 100000) * 30 FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Europe' )

question: List down the names of the games in the racing genre.
original_query: SELECT T1.game_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T2.genre_name = 'Racing'

question: How many games do not have any sales in Europe?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM region_sales AS T1 INNER JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.region_id = T2.id WHERE T2.region_name = 'Europe' AND T1.num_sales = 0

question: List down the record ID of records released between 2000 to 2003.
original_query: SELECT T.id FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2003

question: Provide the release year of record ID 1 to 10.
original_query: SELECT T.release_year FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.id BETWEEN 1 AND 10

question: Which is the publisher for the game "Prism: Light the Way"?
original_query: SELECT T1.publisher_name FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T3.game_name = 'Prism: Light the Way'

question: What are the names of the games that were published by 505 Games?
original_query: SELECT T3.game_name FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id WHERE T1.publisher_name = '505 Games'

question: What is the total number of adventure games released in 2005?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.id) FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T3.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T4.genre_name = 'Adventure' AND T1.release_year = 2005

question: List down the name of strategy games.
original_query: SELECT T1.game_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T2.genre_name = 'Strategy'

question: What is the name of the publisher that has published the most puzzle games?
original_query: SELECT T.publisher_name FROM ( SELECT T3.publisher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T1.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T4.genre_name = 'Puzzle' GROUP BY T3.publisher_name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: Give the genre of the following game titled 'Airlock' , 'Airline Tycoon' , and 'Airblade', respectively.
original_query: SELECT T2.genre_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T1.game_name IN ('Airlock', 'Airline Tycoon', 'Airblade')

question: Provide the game publisher's name of the game with sales greater than 90% of the average sales in Japan.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T5.publisher_name FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T3 ON T2.game_platform_id = T3.id INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T4 ON T3.game_publisher_id = T4.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T5 ON T4.publisher_id = T5.id WHERE T2.num_sales * 10000000 > ( SELECT AVG(T2.num_sales) * 100000 * 90 FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Japan' )

question: Provide the genre name of the genre ID 3.
original_query: SELECT T.genre_name FROM genre AS T WHERE T.id = 3

question: What is the least common game genre?
original_query: SELECT T.game_name FROM ( SELECT T2.game_name, COUNT(T2.id) FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id GROUP BY T2.game_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.id) ASC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: Mention the genre of the 2Xtreme.
original_query: SELECT T2.id FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T1.game_name = '2Xtreme'

question: What is the name of the publisher that released the most video games in 2007?
original_query: SELECT T3.publisher_name FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T1.release_year = 2007 GROUP BY T3.publisher_name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T2.game_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the region name where games reached 300000 sales and above.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.region_name FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T2.num_sales * 100000 > 300000

question: How many Sports games did Nintendo publish?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T3.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T4.genre_name = 'Sports' AND T1.publisher_name = 'Nintendo'

question: What are the platform IDs of records released in 2006?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T.platform_id FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year = 2006

question: How many more sports games than simulation games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.genre_name = 'Sports' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.genre_name = 'Simulation' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END) FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id

question: In which region where a game had the lowest number of sales?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.region_name FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id ORDER BY T2.num_sales LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of the publishers of all the puzzle games.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.publisher_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.game_id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T2.publisher_id = T3.id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T1.genre_id = T4.id WHERE T4.genre_name = 'Puzzle'

question: Which publisher published the most games?
original_query: SELECT T.publisher_name FROM ( SELECT T2.publisher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.game_id) FROM game_publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.publisher_name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.game_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

question: Calculate the total number of sales in North America.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.num_sales) * 100000 AS nums FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T1.region_name = 'North America'

question: In which year was Panzer Tactics released on DS?
original_query: SELECT T4.release_year FROM game_publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game AS T3 ON T1.game_id = T3.id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T4 ON T1.id = T4.game_publisher_id INNER JOIN platform AS T5 ON T4.platform_id = T5.id WHERE T3.game_name = 'Panzer Tactics' AND T5.platform_name = 'DS'

question: How many games did BMG Interactive Entertainment release in 2012?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.game_id) FROM publisher AS T1 INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.publisher_id INNER JOIN game_platform AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.game_publisher_id WHERE T3.release_year = 2012

question: What platform is the game 3Xtreme available on?
original_query: SELECT T2.platform_name FROM game_platform AS T1 INNER JOIN platform AS T2 ON T1.platform_id = T2.id INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T3 ON T1.game_publisher_id = T3.id INNER JOIN game AS T4 ON T3.game_id = T4.id WHERE T4.game_name = '3Xtreme'

question: Show the id of game platform which makes the most sales in Japan.
original_query: SELECT T.game_platform_id FROM ( SELECT T2.game_platform_id, MAX(T2.num_sales) FROM region AS T1 INNER JOIN region_sales AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Japan' ) t

question: How many games were released in 2001?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.id) FROM game_platform AS T WHERE T.release_year = 2001

question: What is the diffrence between the number of games produced by Culture Brain that can be played on SNES and DS?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.platform_name = 'SNES' THEN T3.game_id ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.platform_name = 'DS' THEN T3.game_id ELSE NULL END) FROM platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T3 ON T2.game_publisher_id = T3.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T4 ON T3.publisher_id = T4.id WHERE T4.publisher_name = 'Culture Brain'

question: Calculate the percentage of games published by 'Brash Entertainment'?

question: What are the three largest numbers of games sold?
original_query: SELECT T.game_platform_id, SUM(T.num_sales) * 100000 FROM region_sales AS T GROUP BY game_platform_id ORDER BY SUM(T.num_sales) * 100000 DESC LIMIT 3

question: Provide the games that can be played on the SCD platform.

question: List down the name of games published by 3DO.

question: How many games include the word 'Box' in their name?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T.game_name FROM game AS T WHERE T.game_name LIKE '%Box%' )

question: How many games were published by Activision?

question: Show the number of games which were released on X360 in 2010.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.game_id) FROM platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id INNER JOIN game_publisher AS T3 ON T2.game_publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T1.platform_name = 'X360' AND T2.release_year = 2010

question: How many times did other regions make positive sales in DS platform?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) FROM platform AS T1 INNER JOIN game_platform AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id INNER JOIN region_sales AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.game_platform_id INNER JOIN region AS T4 ON T3.region_id = T4.id WHERE T1.platform_name = 'DS' AND T4.region_name = 'Other' AND T3.num_sales > 0

question: What is the total ordered quantity for products under the 'Touring' line?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.OrderQty) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductLine = 'T'

question: Where are the shelves where the down tube product was stored?
original_query: SELECT T2.Shelf FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'Down Tube'

question: Among all the products that are manufactured in-house, how many of them are salable?
original_query: SELECT SUM(FinishedGoodsFlag) FROM Product WHERE MakeFlag = 1

question: Please list the departments that David Bradley used to belong to.
original_query: SELECT T2.DepartmentID FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: Which vendor gives the best profit on net for product ID 342?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.ProductID = 342 ORDER BY T2.LastReceiptCost - T2.StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many male employees do not wish to receive e-mail promotion?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.EmailPromotion = 0 AND T1.Gender = 'M'

question: What is the postal code of the street address of the account that is latest updated?
original_query: SELECT PostalCode FROM Address ORDER BY ModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Has the product Chainring Bolts been on any of the sales?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(T1.Description) >= 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END FROM SpecialOffer AS T1 INNER JOIN SpecialOfferProduct AS T2 ON T1.SpecialOfferID = T2.SpecialOfferID INNER JOIN Product AS T3 ON T2.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T3.Name = 'Chainring Bolts'

question: How many employees do not have any suffix and what are their organization level?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.BusinessEntityID) FROM ( SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 USING (BusinessEntityID) WHERE T2.Suffix IS NULL GROUP BY T1.BusinessEntityID ) AS T3

question: What is the profit of a single product that received the highest rating from John Smith? List the product/s' names.
original_query: SELECT T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost, T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.ReviewerName = 'John Smith' ORDER BY T2.Rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which product ID do not have any work order ID?
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE ProductID NOT IN ( SELECT T1.ProductID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN WorkOrder AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID )

question: What are the company that Adventure Works deal with that have poor credit rating? Please provide their business number.
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM Vendor WHERE CreditRating = ( SELECT CreditRating FROM Vendor ORDER BY CreditRating DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Please list the titles of the documents that are pending approval.
original_query: SELECT Title FROM Document WHERE Status = 1

question: Based on the lastet payrate of each employee, calculate the average hourly payrate for each department.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Rate) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T1.RateChangeDate = ( SELECT MAX(T1.RateChangeDate) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.DepartmentID )

question: What is the job position currently occupied by Ken J SÃ¡nchez?
original_query: SELECT T1.JobTitle FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.FirstName = 'Ken' AND T2.MiddleName = 'J' AND T2.LastName = 'Sánchez'

question: How many letters are there in Catherine Ward's e-mail account passwords?
original_query: SELECT LENGTH(T2.PasswordHash) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Password AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Catherine' AND T1.LastName = 'Ward'

question: Which customer has the highest subtotal amount of sales orders whose assigned to the salesperson with the highest bonus?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM SalesOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPerson AS T2 ON T1.SalesPersonID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.SubTotal DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many male employees have the job position of sales person?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'M' AND T2.PersonType = 'SP'

question: What are the full names of the sales person whose bonuses are less than 1,000?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Bonus < 1000

question: How many products with the id "989" were sold in August 2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Quantity) FROM TransactionHistory WHERE TransactionDate LIKE '2013-08%' AND TransactionType = 'S' AND ProductID = 989

question: Please list the product names of all the products on the LL Road Frame Sale.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM SpecialOffer AS T1 INNER JOIN SpecialOfferProduct AS T2 ON T1.SpecialOfferID = T2.SpecialOfferID INNER JOIN Product AS T3 ON T2.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T1.Description = 'LL Road Frame Sale'

question: Where is the address 15873 located, in what city and state? Does that city belong to a province where the code exists?
original_query: SELECT T2.City, T1.Name, T1.IsOnlyStateProvinceFlag FROM StateProvince AS T1 INNER JOIN Address AS T2 ON T1.StateProvinceID = T2.StateProvinceID WHERE T2.AddressID = 15873

question: What is the difference in percentage between the product descriptions written in Arabic and Thai?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Name = 'Arabic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Name = 'Thai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Culture AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductModelProductDescriptionCulture AS T2 ON T1.CultureID = T2.CultureID

question: What are the sales reasons for order 43718?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM SalesOrderHeaderSalesReason AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesReason AS T2 ON T1.SalesReasonID = T2.SalesReasonID WHERE T1.SalesOrderID = 43718

question: List the first and last name of all unmarried male Production Supervisors.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' AND T1.Gender = 'M' AND T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Supervisor%'

question: What is the forename and birthdate of person number 18?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T2.BirthDate FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID = 18

question: Where can I get the demographic information about the Valley Bicycle Specialists store?
original_query: SELECT Demographics FROM Store WHERE Name = 'Valley Bicycle Specialists'

question: What is the percentage, by number of sales order units, for orders with quantities not greater than 3 and a discount of 0.2?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN OrderQty < 3 AND UnitPriceDiscount = 0.2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(SalesOrderID) FROM SalesOrderDetail

question: For all the products, list the product name and its corresponding start date for the current standard cost.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.StartDate FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.EndDate IS NULL

question: How many person have a projected yearly sales of no more than 50,000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM SalesPersonQuotaHistory WHERE SalesQuota < 500000

question: Among all the production technicians, how many have a below average pay rate for a production technician?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Technician%' AND T2.Rate < ( SELECT AVG(T2.Rate) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Technician%' )

question: How many products with the id "476" are stored in Metal Storage?
original_query: SELECT T2.Quantity FROM Location AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.ProductID = 476 AND T1.Name = 'Metal Storage'

question: For person id No.2054, is his/her vendor still active?
original_query: SELECT T1.ActiveFlag FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityContact AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonID = 2054

question: If a married employee has a western name style, what is the probability of him or her working as a store contact?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(IIF(T1.PersonType = 'SC', T1.PersonType, NULL)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.PersonType) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 WHERE T1.PersonType = 'SC' AND T1.NameStyle = 0 AND T2.MaritalStatus = 'M'

question: What is the profit on net of the products that have exactly 200 maximum order quantity? Indicate the name of the vendors to which these products were purchased from.
original_query: SELECT T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice, T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MaxOrderQty = 200

question: What is the full name of the second oldest person in the company at the time he was hired?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY STRFTIME('%Y', T1.HireDate) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) DESC LIMIT 1, 1

question: List all product names and its product line for all purchase order with order quantity of 5000 or more.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.ProductLine FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.OrderQty > 4999

question: What are the top 5 types of products with the highest selling price? ?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Product ORDER BY ListPrice DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the name of the territory assigned to the sales person with business id "277"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID = 277

question: List down the email address of female single employees.
original_query: SELECT T3.EmailAddress FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'F' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'S'

question: Please list the departments that are part of the Executive General and Administration group.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Department WHERE GroupName = 'Executive General and Administration'

question: What is the size of the photo of product id No.1?
original_query: SELECT T1.ThumbNailPhoto FROM ProductPhoto AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductProductPhoto AS T2 ON T1.ProductPhotoID = T2.ProductPhotoID WHERE T2.ProductID = 1

question: How many Vista cards expired before the year 2007?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CreditCardID) FROM CreditCard WHERE CardType = 'Vista' AND ExpYear < 2007

question: List down the product name, reviewer name, rating and comments for product under the road line.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.ReviewerName, T2.Rating, T2.Comments FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 USING (productID) WHERE T1.ProductLine = 'R'

question: What are the product assembly ID that come with unit measure code EA and BOM level of 2, at the same time have per assembly quantity of more than 10?
original_query: SELECT ProductAssemblyID FROM BillOfMaterials WHERE UnitMeasureCode = 'EA' AND BOMLevel = 2 AND PerAssemblyQty > 10

question: Please provide the IDs of any three AdventureWorks product subcategories.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT ProductCategoryID FROM ProductSubcategory LIMIT 3

question: What is business number 1580's net profit?
original_query: SELECT LastReceiptCost - StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor WHERE BusinessEntityID = 1580

question: List all the sales people in the Northwest US.
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID FROM SalesTerritory AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPerson AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Northwest' AND T1.CountryRegionCode = 'US'

question: How many customers gave a product the best possible rating? Please list their names.
original_query: SELECT ReviewerName FROM ProductReview WHERE Rating = 5

question: Name cellphone number's Type ID?
original_query: SELECT PhoneNumberTypeID FROM PhoneNumberType WHERE Name = 'Cell'

question: Who is the top sales person who achived highest percentage of projected sales quota in 2013?
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson WHERE BusinessEntityID IN ( SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPersonQuotaHistory WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', QuotaDate) = '2013' ) ORDER BY CAST(SalesLastYear AS REAL) / SalesQuota DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the product the work order "2540" was making?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM WorkOrder AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.WorkOrderID = 2540

question: How many of the non-sales employees are married?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'EM' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'M'

question: What is the average profit of all the products from the Clothing category?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost) / COUNT(T1.ProductID) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID INNER JOIN ProductCategory AS T3 ON T2.ProductCategoryID = T3.ProductCategoryID WHERE T3.Name = 'Clothing'

question: What percentage of AdventureWorks employees are men?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.BusinessentityID) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessentityID = T2.BusinessentityID WHERE T1.PersonType = 'EM'

question: What is the product cost end date with the highest weight in grams?
original_query: SELECT T2.EndDate FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.WeightUnitMeasureCode = 'G' ORDER BY T1.Weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: What profit will the company gain if they sell 10 items of the product that has the lightest weight?
original_query: SELECT 10 * (ListPrice - StandardCost) FROM Product WHERE Weight IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Weight LIMIT 1

question: What is the total amount due of all the purchases made by the company to the vendor that has the lowest selling price amount of a single product? Indicate the name of the vendor to which the purchases was made.
original_query: SELECT T1.UnitPrice, T3.Name FROM PurchaseOrderDetail AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader AS T2 ON T1.PurchaseOrderID = T2.PurchaseOrderID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T2.VendorID = T3.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.UnitPrice LIMIT 1

question: Please give the highest product cost of a purchase order.
original_query: SELECT ActualCost FROM TransactionHistory WHERE TransactionType = 'P' ORDER BY ActualCost DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many vendors does Adventure Works still work with but are not preferable?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM Vendor WHERE PreferredVendorStatus = 0 AND ActiveFlag = 1

question: List all active vendors who offer a purchasing web service.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Vendor WHERE ActiveFlag = 1

question: Which year is credit card No.9648's Expiration Year?
original_query: SELECT ExpYear FROM CreditCard WHERE CreditCardID = 9648

question: Please list any 3 vendors that are not recommended by Adventure Works.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Vendor WHERE PreferredVendorStatus = 0 LIMIT 3

question: What's the profit for the Freewheel?
original_query: SELECT T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'Freewheel'

question: How many types of tax did the sales happen in Quebec have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Name) FROM SalesTaxRate AS T1 INNER JOIN StateProvince AS T2 ON T1.StateProvinceID = T2.StateProvinceID WHERE T2.Name = 'Quebec'

question: Which territory has the greatest difference in sales from previous year to this year? Indicate the difference, as well as the name and country of the region.
original_query: SELECT SalesLastYear - SalesYTD, Name, CountryRegionCode FROM SalesTerritory ORDER BY SalesLastYear - SalesYTD DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of the sales person who has the the highest commission percent received per sale?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.CommissionPct DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the top 3 house-manufactured products with the highest average rating.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.MakeFlag = 1 GROUP BY T2.Name ORDER BY SUM(T1.Rating) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many customers are there in Canada?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.CustomerID) FROM SalesTerritory AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Canada'

question: Who made the purchase order with the greatest total due before freight? Indicate her employee ID and calculate for his/her age when he/she was hired.
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID, STRFTIME('%Y', T2.HireDate) - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.BirthDate) FROM PurchaseOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.TotalDue DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which product line has the most products that are salable?
original_query: SELECT ProductLine FROM Product WHERE FinishedGoodsFlag = 1 GROUP BY ProductLine ORDER BY COUNT(FinishedGoodsFlag) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of the Vice President of Production?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Vice President of Production'

question: What is the name of product purchased with transaction type P?
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE ProductID IN ( SELECT ProductID FROM TransactionHistory WHERE TransactionType = 'P' )

question: List, by ProductID, all products whose profit, relative to the standard price, is negative.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT ProductID FROM ProductVendor WHERE StandardPrice - LastReceiptCost < 0

question: Please list the e-mail addresses of all the employees who wish to receive e-mail promotions from Adventureworks and selected partners.
original_query: SELECT T2.EmailAddress FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.EmailPromotion = 2

question: How many products with a thumpnail photo?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) FROM ProductProductPhoto WHERE ProductPhotoID != 1

question: Among the active employees with over 10 hours of sick leave, what is the percentage of the employees with over 20 vacation hours?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.VacationHours > 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.SickLeaveHours > 10

question: Among the vendors with maximum orders betweeen 500 to 750, which vendor has the 10th highest profit on net?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MaxOrderQty BETWEEN 500 AND 750 ORDER BY T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 9, 1

question: What is the 12th business's first line address?
original_query: SELECT T1.AddressLine1 FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityAddress AS T2 ON T1.AddressID = T2.AddressID WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = 12

question: Please list three businesses with the lowest total sales from last year.
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson ORDER BY SalesLastYear LIMIT 3

question: Among the sales people who achieved projected sales quota 2013, is there any person from territory ID 1? If yes, state the business entity ID.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.TerritoryID = 1 AND STRFTIME('%Y', QuotaDate) = '2013'

question: Among the employees in the Manufacturing group in 2007, how many of them are store contacts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.PersonType = 'SC' AND T2.GroupName = 'Manufacturing' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.EndDate) >= '2007' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.StartDate) <= '2007'

question: What are the unit measure codes for product ID No.762?
original_query: SELECT T2.UnitMeasureCode FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN UnitMeasure AS T2 ON T1.SizeUnitMeasureCode = T2.UnitMeasureCode OR T1.WeightUnitMeasureCode = T2.UnitMeasureCode WHERE T1.ProductID = 762 GROUP BY T1.ProductID, T2.UnitMeasureCode

question: Calculate the profit of each products. List all products with more than $100 in profit.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM Product WHERE ListPrice - StandardCost > 100

question: Provide details of review from reviewer whose name begin with letter 'J'. State the product ID, rating and comments.
original_query: SELECT ProductID, Rating, Comments FROM ProductReview WHERE ReviewerName LIKE 'J%'

question: What proportion of sales orders are made from the United Kingdom?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Name = 'United Kingdom' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.SalesOrderID) FROM SalesOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID

question: Please list any three businesses with their IDs that are located in Dallas City.
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityAddress AS T2 ON T1.AddressID = T2.AddressID WHERE T1.City = 'Dallas' LIMIT 3

question: Which Production Technician has the highest pay rate?
original_query: SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Technician%' ORDER BY T2.Rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many of the approved documents are confidential?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DocumentNode) FROM Document WHERE Status = 2 AND DocumentSummary IS NULL

question: Among the low quality product, which product has the highest line total? List the product name and its line total?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.LineTotal FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE Class = 'L' ORDER BY OrderQty * UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please show the credit card number of David Bradley.
original_query: SELECT T3.CardNumber FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T2.CreditCardID = T3.CreditCardID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: List all the non-sales employees in ascending order of its business entitty ID.
original_query: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Person WHERE PersonType = 'EM' ORDER BY BusinessEntityID

question: Please give the personal information of the married employee who has the highest pay rate.
original_query: SELECT T2.Demographics FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MaritalStatus = 'M' ORDER BY T3.Rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the total per assembly quantity for unit measure code EA, IN and OZ respectively? What are the name of these 3 code?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.PerAssemblyQty), T2.Name FROM BillOfMaterials AS T1 INNER JOIN UnitMeasure AS T2 ON T1.UnitMeasureCode = T2.UnitMeasureCode WHERE T1.UnitMeasureCode IN ('EA', 'IN', 'OZ') GROUP BY T2.Name

question: Among the products with an average lead time of 60, which vendor has the highest profit on net? Indicate the credit rating of such vendor.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T2.CreditRating FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.AverageLeadTime = 60 ORDER BY T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the primary type of all single female employees hired between 1/1/2008 to 12/31/2008?
original_query: SELECT T2.PersonType FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'F' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', T1.HireDate) BETWEEN '2008-1-1' AND '2008-12-31' GROUP BY T2.PersonType ORDER BY COUNT(T2.PersonType) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the product that has the lowest rating?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Rating = ( SELECT Rating FROM ProductReview ORDER BY Rating ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: State the full name of accountants in the company.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Accountant'

question: List all the socks products.
original_query: SELECT T2.ProductID FROM ProductSubcategory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Socks'

question: How many vacation hours do the male employees have on average?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.VacationHours) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'M' AND T2.PersonType = 'EM'

question: Among the employees who have a pay rate of above 40, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Rate > 40

question: What is the average selling price of different vendors of the product Hex Nut 5?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.StandardPrice) / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'Hex Nut 5'

question: For the document Control Assistant who was born on 1975/12/25, how many private documents did he/she have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.BusinessEntityID) FROM Document AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.Owner = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.JobTitle = 'Document Control Assistant' AND T2.BirthDate = '1975-12-25' AND T1.DocumentSummary IS NULL

question: What type of employee is David Bradley?
original_query: SELECT PersonType FROM Person WHERE FirstName = 'David' AND LastName = 'Bradley'

question: Which seasonal discount had the highest discount percentage?
original_query: SELECT Description FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Type = 'Seasonal Discount' ORDER BY DiscountPct DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the store contact employees, how many of them have a Vista credit card?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.FirstName) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T2.CreditCardID = T3.CreditCardID WHERE T3.CardType = 'Vista' AND T1.PersonType = 'SC'

question: Which position does Suchitra hold?
original_query: SELECT T2.JobTitle FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Suchitra'

question: What percentage of people named Mary who wants Receive Email promotions of AdventureWorks and selected partners are store contacts?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN EmailPromotion = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN PersonType = 'SC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Person WHERE FirstName = 'Mary'

question: For the document Control Assistant who was hired on 2009/1/22, what is the percentage of private documents did he/she have?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DocumentSummary IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.DocumentSummary) FROM Document AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.Owner = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.JobTitle = 'Document Control Assistant' AND T2.HireDate = '2009-01-22'

question: Please list the credit card numbers of all the employees who have left the Finance Department.
original_query: SELECT T3.CardNumber FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T1.ModifiedDate = T3.ModifiedDate INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T4 ON T3.CreditCardID = T4.CreditCardID WHERE T2.Name = 'Finance' AND T1.EndDate IS NOT NULL

question: What are the full names of the 10 youngest married male production technicians?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Technician%' AND T1.Gender = 'M' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'M' ORDER BY T1.BirthDate DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the stocked quantity of products manufactured from location ID 40?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrderRouting AS T1 INNER JOIN BillOfMaterials AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.ProductAssemblyID INNER JOIN WorkOrder AS T3 ON T3.WorkOrderID = T1.WorkOrderID WHERE T1.LocationID = 40

question: What is the thumbnail photo file for the product with the id "979"?
original_query: SELECT T2.ThumbnailPhotoFileName FROM ProductProductPhoto AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductPhoto AS T2 ON T1.ProductPhotoID = T2.ProductPhotoID WHERE T1.ProductID = 979

question: What is the Crankarm product's net profit?
original_query: SELECT T2.LastReceiptCost - T2.StandardPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name LIKE '%Crankarm%'

question: What is the percentage of the total products ordered were not rejected by Drill size?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.VacationHours > 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.SickLeaveHours > 10

question: Please list the employees who have more than 20 vacations hours and wish to receive e-mail promotions.
original_query: SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.EmailPromotion = 1 AND T1.VacationHours > 20

question: What is the salary rate per hour that the company paid to the first 5 employees that they hired?
original_query: SELECT T1.Rate FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T2.HireDate ASC LIMIT 0, 5

question: Where is Business Entity ID No.4 located at? Give the address down to street.
original_query: SELECT AddressLine1, AddressLine2 FROM Address WHERE AddressID IN ( SELECT AddressID FROM BusinessEntityAddress WHERE BusinessEntityID = 4 )

question: What is the discount percentage of "LL Road Frame Sale"?
original_query: SELECT DiscountPct FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Description = 'LL Road Frame Sale'

question: Please list the email adresses of the reviewers who have given the lowest rating to the product HL Mountain Pedal.
original_query: SELECT T1.EmailAddress FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'HL Mountain Pedal' ORDER BY T1.Rating LIMIT 1

question: How many black-colored products are there that cannot be sold?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) FROM Product WHERE FinishedGoodsFlag = 0 AND Color = 'Black'

question: List all products with minimum order quantity of 100 and order them by product name in descending order.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.MinOrderQty = 100 ORDER BY T1.Name DESC

question: What product has the fewest online orders from one customer? List the product's class, line of business, and list price.
original_query: SELECT T2.Class, T2.ProductLine, T2.ListPrice FROM ShoppingCartItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T1.ProductID ORDER BY SUM(Quantity) LIMIT 1

question: How many types of credit cards are there and how many are vista?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CardNumber) FROM CreditCard WHERE CardType = 'vista'

question: How many products are out of stock?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) FROM ProductVendor WHERE OnOrderQty = 0

question: What is the total cost for all the orders placed on 5/29/2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(TotalDue) FROM PurchaseOrderHeader WHERE OrderDate LIKE '2013-05-29%'

question: What are the Department ids under the Sales and Marketing Group?
original_query: SELECT DepartmentID FROM Department WHERE GroupName = 'Sales and Marketing'

question: Please list the top 5 products with the most orders.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY SUM(T2.OrderQty) DESC LIMIT 0, 5

question: What percentage of the AdventureWorks data is in Thai?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Name = 'Thai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CultureID) FROM Culture AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductModelProductDescriptionCulture AS T2 ON T1.CultureID = T2.CultureID

question: What proportion of work order is in Subassembly?
original_query: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Name = 'Subassembly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T2.WorkOrderID) FROM Location AS T1 INNER JOIN WorkOrderRouting AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID

question: What is the person's business ID with a vista credit card number "11113366963373"?
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID FROM CreditCard AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.CreditCardID = T2.CreditCardID WHERE T1.CardNumber = 11113366963373

question: To which group does the department with the least amount of workers belong to? Indicate the name of the department as well.
original_query: SELECT T2.GroupName FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID GROUP BY T2.GroupName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average of the total ordered quantity of products purchased whose shipping method was Cargo Transport 5.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.ShipMethodID = 5, T3.OrderQty, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T3.ProductID) FROM ShipMethod AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader AS T2 ON T1.ShipMethodID = T2.ShipMethodID INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T3 ON T2.PurchaseOrderID = T3.PurchaseOrderID

question: For the older production technician who was hired in 2008/12/7, what's his/her birthday?
original_query: SELECT BirthDate FROM Employee WHERE HireDate = '2008-12-07'

question: Which currency pair's average exchange rate for the day is the highest?
original_query: SELECT FromCurrencyCode, ToCurrencyCode FROM CurrencyRate ORDER BY AverageRate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the employees in Adventure Works, calculate the percentage of them working as sales representatives.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN JobTitle = 'Sales Representative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee

question: What is the full name of the non-sales employee who made the most number of rejected purchase orders?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName FROM PurchaseOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'EM' AND T1.Status = 3 GROUP BY T2.FirstName, T2.LastName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.PurchaseOrderID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the product with the id "475"?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Product WHERE ProductID = 475

question: What is the total number of employees that worked in the Finance department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.BusinessEntityID) FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 USING (DepartmentID) WHERE T1.Name = 'Finance'

question: How long does it take for the business to receive the item it has purchased? Who is the vendor for business number 1496?
original_query: SELECT T1.AverageLeadTime, T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 USING (businessentityid) WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = 1496 GROUP BY T1.AverageLeadTime, T2.Name

question: What is the cost for the sports?
original_query: SELECT T2.StandardCost FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name LIKE '%Sport%'

question: How many work orders with quantities ranging from 100 to 250 have a reorder point of no more than 375?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM TransactionHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Quantity BETWEEN 100 AND 250 AND T2.ReorderPoint <= 375

question: What is the employee of company number 1's full name?
original_query: SELECT FirstName, MiddleName, LastName FROM Person WHERE BusinessEntityID = 1 AND PersonType = 'EM'

question: What is the price for the product with the id "912"?
original_query: SELECT ListPrice FROM ProductListPriceHistory WHERE ProductID = 912

question: What is the credit card number for Michelle E Cox?
original_query: SELECT T3.CreditCardID FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T2.CreditCardID = T3.CreditCardID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Michelle' AND T1.MiddleName = 'E' AND T1.LastName = 'Cox'

question: Among the Production Technicians who are single, how many of them are vendor contact?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle LIKE 'Production Technician%' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' AND T2.PersonType = 'VC'

question: How many accounts are in Bothell as opposed to Kenmore? What is the name of the State that comprises these two cities?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.city = 'Bothell', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.city = 'Kenmore', 1, 0)) , stateprovincecode FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN StateProvince AS T2 ON T1.stateprovinceid = T2.stateprovinceid GROUP BY stateprovincecode

question: If we discount the products that do not have any type of offer, how many different products have been sold in an amount greater than 2 units per order?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail AS T1 INNER JOIN SpecialOfferProduct AS T2 ON T1.SpecialOfferID = T2.SpecialOfferID INNER JOIN SpecialOffer AS T3 ON T2.SpecialOfferID = T3.SpecialOfferID WHERE T1.OrderQty > 2 AND T1.UnitPriceDiscount = 0

question: Is the phone number "114-555-0100" a work number or a home number?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM PersonPhone AS T1 INNER JOIN PhoneNumberType AS T2 ON T1.PhoneNumberTypeID = T2.PhoneNumberTypeID WHERE T1.PhoneNumber = '114-555-0100'

question: What is the number of the sub categories for bikes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ProductCategory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductCategoryID = T2.ProductCategoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Bikes'

question: Calculate the total quantity of purchased product that has been prepared by employee number 257 and is in pending shipment status.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.OrderQty) FROM PurchaseOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.PurchaseOrderID = T2.PurchaseOrderID WHERE T1.Status = 1

question: What is the company's second highest salary per hour for employees who are paid monthly?
original_query: SELECT Rate FROM EmployeePayHistory WHERE PayFrequency = 1 ORDER BY Rate DESC LIMIT 1, 1

question: Who is the sales person in charge of the territory with the id "9"? Provide their full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.TerritoryID = 9

question: What is the order reference number for the "Mountain End Caps" product?
original_query: SELECT T2.ReferenceOrderID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'Mountain End Caps'

question: Which sales person made the sale of 1635823.3967 last year? Give the Business Entity ID.
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson WHERE SalesLastYear = '1635823.3967'

question: List all products with the color yellow.
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color = 'Yellow'

question: Give the Mauritius Rupee's currency code.
original_query: SELECT CurrencyCode FROM Currency WHERE Name = 'Mauritius Rupee'

question: What is the first name of the male employee who has a western name style?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.NameStyle = 0 AND T1.Gender = 'M'

question: How many salespersons haven't met quota?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM SalesPerson WHERE Bonus = 0

question: List all staff in the Shipping and Receiving department who are hired in 2009.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T4 ON T3.DepartmentID = T4.DepartmentID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.HireDate) = '2009' AND T4.Name = 'Shipping and Receiving'

question: How much would be the total sales profit for shopping cart ID 20621 ?
original_query: SELECT SUM((T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost) * T2.Quantity) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ShoppingCartItem AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.ShoppingCartID = 20621

question: Which geographic area does the city with the second lowest tax rate belongs to? Indicate the name of the state or province as well.
original_query: SELECT T3.'Group', T2.Name FROM SalesTaxRate AS T1 INNER JOIN StateProvince AS T2 ON T1.StateProvinceID = T2.StateProvinceID INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T3 ON T2.TerritoryID = T3.TerritoryID ORDER BY T1.TaxRate LIMIT 1, 1

question: What is the biggest amount of reviews a salable product gets?
original_query: SELECT T1.Comments FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.FinishedGoodsFlag = 1 GROUP BY T1.Comments ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ProductReviewID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name all stores and its sales representative in France territory.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name, T4.FirstName, T4.LastName FROM SalesTerritory AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID INNER JOIN Store AS T3 ON T2.StoreID = T3.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T4 ON T2.PersonID = T4.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Name = 'France'

question: Between Northwest and Southeast of the United States, which territory one recorded the highest amount of sales last year?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM SalesTerritory WHERE CountryRegionCode = 'US' AND (Name = 'Northwest' OR Name = 'Southeast') ORDER BY SalesLastYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average age of employee in each department and state which department has the youngest employees.
original_query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) + 1 , T3.Name FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 USING (BusinessEntityID) INNER JOIN Department AS T3 USING (DepartmentID) ORDER BY T1.BirthDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many employees work for AdvertureWorks that is single?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessentityID) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.PersonType = 'EM' AND T2.MaritalStatus = 'S'

question: What bike subcategories are there?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM ProductSubcategory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductCategoryID = T2.ProductCategoryID WHERE T2.name = 'Bikes'

question: Which department, altogether, has the most personnel who work the evening shift?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Shift AS T2 ON T1.ShiftId = T2.ShiftId INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T1.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T2.Name = 'Night' GROUP BY T3.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the products that are purchased, how many of them have never received the highest rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ProductID) FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.MakeFlag = 0 AND T1.Rating != 5

question: For the on going assembly item Component ID No. 494, what's the Unit measure for it?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM BillOfMaterials AS T1 INNER JOIN UnitMeasure AS T2 ON T1.UnitMeasureCode = T2.UnitMeasureCode WHERE T1.ComponentID = 494 AND T1.EndDate IS NULL GROUP BY T2.name

question: What is the bussiness id for Mr. Hung-Fu Ting?
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM Person WHERE Title = 'Mr.' AND FirstName = 'Hung-Fu' AND LastName = 'Ting'

question: What is the organization level for Human Resources Manager?
original_query: SELECT OrganizationLevel FROM Employee WHERE JobTitle = 'Human Resources Manager'

question: What is the location id for Debur and Polish?
original_query: SELECT LocationID FROM Location WHERE Name = 'Debur and Polish'

question: How much is the total bonus received by sales person and what is the percentage of it against the projected yearly sales quota in 2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Bonus) , CAST(SUM(T1.Bonus) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.SalesQuota) FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.QuotaDate) = '2013'

question: Please list the unit measure code of the component that is of the greatest need in quantity to create the assembly.
original_query: SELECT UnitMeasureCode FROM BillOfMaterials ORDER BY PerAssemblyQty DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full address of business number 24?
original_query: SELECT T1.AddressLine1, T1.AddressLine2 FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityAddress AS T2 ON T1.AddressID = T2.AddressID WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = 24

question: As of 12/31/2011, how long has the employee assigned to all pending for approval papers been working in the company from the date he was hired?
original_query: SELECT 2011 - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.HireDate) FROM Document AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.Owner = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Status = 1

question: Among the employees who are married, how many of them have a western name style?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.NameStyle = 0 AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'M'

question: How many products are there if we add all those located in the Subassembly category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.LocationID) FROM Location AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T2 USING (LocationID) WHERE T1.Name = 'Subassembly'

question: How much more expensive in percentage is the product with the highest selling price from the product with the lowest selling price in the Clothing category?
original_query: SELECT (MAX(T1.ListPrice) - MIN(T1.ListPrice)) * 100 / MIN(T1.ListPrice) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID INNER JOIN ProductCategory AS T3 ON T2.ProductCategoryID = T3.ProductCategoryID WHERE T3.Name = 'Clothing'

question: How many employees with a pay rate of over 35 have more than 10 sick leave hours?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.SickLeaveHours > 10 AND T1.Rate > 35

question: What time does the company's night shift begin? Indicate the answer in regular form.
original_query: SELECT StartTime FROM Shift WHERE Name = 'Night'

question: Among all the employees who don't wish to receive promotion e-mails, how many of them belong to or once belonged to the Engineering Department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T1.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.Name = 'Engineering' AND T2.EmailPromotion = 0

question: How many active employees whose payrate is equal or below 30 per hour.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.Rate <= 30

question: How many products with the highest unit price were ordered?
original_query: SELECT OrderQty FROM PurchaseOrderDetail ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: Other than the Chief Executive Officer, who is the employee who has the highest payrate? State the rate.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Employee AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.JobTitle NOT LIKE 'Chief Executive Officer' ORDER BY T1.Rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the subcategory to which the gray product with the lowest safety stock level belongs?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM ProductSubcategory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 USING (ProductSubcategoryID) WHERE T2.Color = 'Grey' GROUP BY T1.Name

question: Which address type does "Fun Toys and Bikes" fall under?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM BusinessEntityAddress AS T1 INNER JOIN AddressType AS T2 ON T1.AddressTypeID = T2.AddressTypeID INNER JOIN Store AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.Name = 'Fun Toys and Bikes'

question: What is the weight in pounds of the style that is produced the most by the company? If there are multiple products sharing the same weight, indicate the name of each one of them and their corresponding weights.
original_query: SELECT Weight FROM Product WHERE WeightUnitMeasureCode = 'LB' GROUP BY Weight ORDER BY COUNT(Style) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the phone number of Gerald Patel's.
original_query: SELECT T2.PhoneNumber FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonPhone AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Gerald' AND T1.LastName = 'Patel'

question: What is the current payrate of Rob Walters? Calculate the percentage increment from his previous payrate.
original_query: SELECT T2.Rate , (MAX(T2.Rate) - MIN(T2.Rate)) * 100 / MAX(T2.Rate) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Rob' AND T1.LastName = 'Walters'

question: Please list the top 3 discounts with the highest discount percentage and fall under the reseller category.
original_query: SELECT Description, DiscountPct FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Category = 'Reseller' ORDER BY DiscountPct DESC LIMIT 0, 3

question: List all the names of products with the special offer "15".
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM SpecialOfferProduct AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.SpecialOfferID = 15

question: To which e-mail address should I write if I want to contact David Bradley?
original_query: SELECT T2.EmailAddress FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: What are the differences between the 288th salesperson's predicted annual sales and his or her actual sales thus far?
original_query: SELECT SalesYTD - SalesQuota FROM SalesPerson WHERE BusinessEntityID = 288

question: What is the highest amount of bonus earned by the sales person in Canada?
original_query: SELECT T2.Bonus FROM SalesTerritory AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPerson AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID WHERE T1.CountryRegionCode = 'CA' ORDER BY T2.SalesQuota DESC LIMIT 1

question: How is the Credit Rating for company whose rowguid is "33671A4E-DF2B-4879-807B-E3F930DD5C0C"?
original_query: SELECT T1.CreditRating FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntity AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.rowguid = '33671A4E-DF2B-4879-807B-E3F930DD5C0C'

question: When is the modified date of the phone number "1500 555-0143"?
original_query: SELECT ModifiedDate FROM PersonPhone WHERE PhoneNumber = '1 (11) 500 555-0143'

question: List the name of the rates that apply to the provinces that are in the territory that obtained the greatest increase in sales with respect to the previous year.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM SalesTerritory AS T1 INNER JOIN StateProvince AS T2 ON T1.CountryRegionCode = T2.CountryRegionCode INNER JOIN SalesTaxRate AS T3 ON T2.StateProvinceID = T3.StateProvinceID ORDER BY (T1.SalesYTD - T1.SalesLastYear) / T1.SalesLastYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the top three employees with the most unused sick leave along with their position titles.
original_query: SELECT JobTitle FROM Employee ORDER BY SickLeaveHours DESC LIMIT 3

question: Name the sales person for store Area Bike Accessories. Which territory is he / she in?
original_query: SELECT T4.Name FROM Store AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPerson AS T2 ON T1.SalesPersonID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T4 ON T2.TerritoryID = T4.TerritoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Area Bike Accessories'

question: What is the PreferredVendorStatus for the company which has the rowguid of "684F328D-C185-43B9-AF9A-37ACC680D2AF"?
original_query: SELECT T1.PreferredVendorStatus FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntity AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.rowguid = '684F328D-C185-43B9-AF9A-37ACC680D2AF'

question: Name all salaried employee who are hired in 2007 and later.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.HireDate) >= '2007' AND T2.SalariedFlag = 1

question: Among the active employees, how many of them have a courtesy title of "Mr"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.Title = 'Mr.'

question: Among the products from the mountain product line, how many of them are sold by over 2 vendors?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ProductLine = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY T1.ProductID HAVING COUNT(T1.Name) > 2

question: Please list the e-mails of the reviewers who have reviewed high class.
original_query: SELECT T1.EmailAddress FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Class = 'H'

question: What is the minimum inventory quantity of Chainring Bolts?
original_query: SELECT SafetyStockLevel FROM Product WHERE Name = 'Chainring Bolts'

question: Is there a work order where the planned cost is different from the actual cost?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN ActualCost = PlannedCost THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END FROM WorkOrderRouting

question: In which year will the David Bradley's credit card expire?
original_query: SELECT T3.ExpYear FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T2.CreditCardID = T3.CreditCardID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: Average cost of purchase orders made during the first six months of 2012.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(ActualCost) AS REAL) / COUNT(TransactionID) FROM TransactionHistoryArchive WHERE TransactionType = 'P' AND TransactionDate >= '2012-01-01' AND TransactionDate < '2012-07-01'

question: What is the shipping address for the sales order "43873"?
original_query: SELECT T1.ShipToAddressID FROM SalesOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN Address AS T2 ON T1.BillToAddressID = T2.AddressID WHERE T1.SalesOrderID = 43873 GROUP BY T1.ShipToAddressID

question: Among the sales people, who are hired prior to 2010?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'SP' AND SUBSTR(T1.HireDate, 0, 4) < 2010

question: Which three sales regions have generated the most revenue thus far?
original_query: SELECT TerritoryID FROM SalesTerritory ORDER BY SalesYTD DESC LIMIT 3

question: Among the employees who wish to receive e-mail promotion from AdventureWorks, how many percent of them are female?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.EmailPromotion = 1

question: What are the names of the vendors to which the company purchased its women's tights products?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T4.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T3 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T3.ProductSubcategoryID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T4 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T4.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MakeFlag = 0 AND T1.Style = 'W' AND T3.Name = 'Tights'

question: What is the pay frequency of the oldest employee?
original_query: SELECT T1.PayFrequency FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T2.BirthDate ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the website purchasing links of the vendors from whom the product Hex Nut 5 can be purchased.
original_query: SELECT T3.PurchasingWebServiceURL FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.Name = 'Hex Nut 5'

question: What is the highest profit on net for a product?
original_query: SELECT LastReceiptCost - StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor ORDER BY LastReceiptCost - StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the top 6 products that has the biggest size in centimeter and what are its reorder point?
original_query: SELECT Name, ReorderPoint FROM Product WHERE SizeUnitMeasureCode = 'CM' ORDER BY Size DESC LIMIT 6

question: How many people were there in the Engineering Department in the year 2009?
