original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.Name = 'Engineering' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.EndDate) > '2009' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.StartDate) < '2009'

question: How much is HL Grip Tape's profit ratio?
original_query: SELECT (T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice) / T1.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'HL Grip Tape'

question: Please list the total number of companies with a commission percentage of 0.018 or above, along with each company's assigned geographical location.
original_query: SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID, T2.'Group' FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T2 USING (territoryid) WHERE T1.CommissionPct >= 0.018

question: State the last name and job title of owner for document "Crank Arm and Tire Maintenance".
original_query: SELECT T1.LastName, T3.JobTitle FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Document AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.Owner INNER JOIN Employee AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.Title = 'Crank Arm and Tire Maintenance'

question: What is the total price of Sales Order ID 46625 with Volume Discount 11 to 14 and Product ID 716?
original_query: SELECT T2.UnitPrice * T2.OrderQty FROM SpecialOffer AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.SpecialOfferID = T2.SpecialOfferID WHERE T1.Description = 'Volume Discount 11 to 14' AND T1.SpecialOfferID = 2 AND T2.ProductID = 716 AND T2.SalesOrderID = 46625

question: Please list the products that are under the Clothing category that are manufactured in-house and salable.
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T1.MakeFlag = 1 THEN T1.Name END FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID INNER JOIN ProductCategory AS T3 ON T2.ProductCategoryID = T3.ProductCategoryID WHERE T2.ProductSubcategoryID = 3

question: Among the sales with a tax applied to retail transaction, how many of them are charged by multiple types of taxes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(SalesTaxRateID) FROM SalesTaxRate WHERE Name LIKE '%+%'

question: How many departments have David Bradley been in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.DepartmentID) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: List all the pay rates of all employees that were hired at 20 years of age.
original_query: SELECT T2.Rate FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.HireDate) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) = 20

question: List the first names of the people with more than 65 sick leave hours.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.SickLeaveHours > 65

question: Among the employees who have more than 10 hours of sick leave, how many of them wish to receive e-mail promotions?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.EmailPromotion = 1 AND T1.SickLeaveHours > 10

question: List all the scraped work orders for handling damage reason.
original_query: SELECT T2.WorkOrderID FROM ScrapReason AS T1 INNER JOIN WorkOrder AS T2 ON T1.ScrapReasonID = T2.ScrapReasonID WHERE T1.Name = 'Handling damage'

question: What is the highest possible discount rate for 'Excess Inventory'?
original_query: SELECT DiscountPct FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Type = 'Excess Inventory' ORDER BY DiscountPct DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most common first name among the vendor contact?
original_query: SELECT FirstName FROM Person WHERE PersonType = 'VC' GROUP BY FirstName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the vendor with the second lowest minimum order quantity?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.MaxOrderQty ASC LIMIT 1, 1

question: Please list the credit card IDs of the employees who work as store contact.
original_query: SELECT T2.CreditCardID FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.PersonType = 'SC'

question: How many high-class products are sold by preferred vendors?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Name) FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 USING (ProductID) INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.PreferredVendorStatus = 1 AND T2.Class = 'M'

question: Which country has the most crowded city in the world?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T2.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the capital city of the country with largest population?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T1.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the countries that officially use the English language, what country has the highest capital?
original_query: SELECT T1.Code FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T' ORDER BY T1.Capital DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the head of the country where Santa Catarina district belongs?
original_query: SELECT T1.HeadOfState FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.District = 'Santa Catarina'

question: How many countries have Socialistic Republic form of government?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Code) FROM Country WHERE GovernmentForm = 'Socialistic Republic'

question: How many percent of the population of China used Chinese as their language?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'China' AND T2.Language = 'Chinese'

question: What country declared its independence in 1994?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country WHERE IndepYear = 1994

question: List the district name of the city with the smallest population.
original_query: SELECT District FROM City ORDER BY Population LIMIT 1

question: List all the cities in the country where there is high life expectancy at birth.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T1.LifeExpectancy DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the country names of countries that have a GNP lower than 1000 and have Dutch as their language.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.GNP < 1000 AND T1.IsOfficial = 'T' AND T1.Language = 'Dutch'

question: What is the average life expentancy of countries that speak Arabic?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.LifeExpectancy) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'Arabic'

question: What are the official languages used in Belgium?
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Belgium' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T'

question: How many countries have no GNP?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Country WHERE GNP = 0

question: How many cities are there in the country with the largest surface area?
original_query: SELECT T2.ID FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.SurfaceArea = ( SELECT MAX(SurfaceArea) FROM Country )

question: Provide the district of the city with a population of 201843.
original_query: SELECT District FROM City WHERE population = 201843

question: What is the surface area and GNP of the country where Namibe district belongs?
original_query: SELECT T2.SurfaceArea, T2.GNP FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.District = 'Namibe'

question: Which country has the smallest surface area?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY SurfaceArea ASC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the language used in the country ruled by Pierre Buyoya.
original_query: SELECT T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.HeadOfState = 'Pierre Buyoya'

question: Calculate the average GNP of all countries that use Arabic language.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.GNP) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'Arabic'

question: Which country has the smallest surface area and the most crowded city?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code ORDER BY T1.Population DESC, T2.SurfaceArea DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all the countries in Asia.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country WHERE Continent = 'Asia'

question: Provide the country, population, capital city, and official language of the country with the smallest surface area.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Population, T1.Capital, T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN City AS T3 ON T1.Code = T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.IsOfficial = 'T' ORDER BY T1.SurfaceArea LIMIT 1

question: How many countries use Portuguese?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Language = 'Portuguese' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM CountryLanguage

question: How many languages are used in Cyprus?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Name = 'Cyprus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode

question: List down the districts belong to the country headed by Adolf Ogi.
original_query: SELECT T2.District FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.HeadOfState = 'Adolf Ogi'

question: What country in Asia has the largest gross national product(GNP)?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country WHERE Continent = 'Asia' ORDER BY GNP DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the cities belongs to the country that has surface area greater than 7000000.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.SurfaceArea > 7000000

question: What is the GNP of the least crowded city in the world?
original_query: SELECT T2.GNP FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code ORDER BY T1.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the language of the smallest population country?
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T1.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: List down languages used in Malaysia.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Malaysia'

question: Calculate the percentage of the surface area of all countries that uses Chinese as one of their languages.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Language = 'Chinese', T1.SurfaceArea, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.SurfaceArea) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode

question: Calculate the average population per city in Karnataka district.
original_query: SELECT AVG(Population) FROM City WHERE District = 'Karnataka' GROUP BY ID

question: List all the countries in the continent of Asia that use English as their unofficial language.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Continent = 'Asia' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'F' GROUP BY T1.Name

question: What are the official languages used in Greece?
original_query: SELECT T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.IsOfficial = 'T' AND T2.name = 'Greece'

question: List the languages used in Turkmenistan.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Turkmenistan'

question: What is the capital city and population of San Marino?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital, T2.Population FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'San Marino'

question: What is the district of Zaanstad?
original_query: SELECT District FROM City WHERE name = 'Zaanstad'

question: What country has the largest surface area?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY SurfaceArea DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the official language of the countries which declared independence after 1990,
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndepYear > 1990 AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T'

question: Give the cities and district names that belong to the country with Hajastan as its local name.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T2.District FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.LocalName = 'Hajastan'

question: What is the average surface area of all countries?
original_query: SELECT AVG(SurfaceArea) FROM Country

question: How many percent of countries in North America use English?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Language = 'English', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Code) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode

question: List the languages used in the USA.
original_query: SELECT Language FROM CountryLanguage WHERE CountryCode = 'USA'

question: Among the languages used in Baltic Countries, provide the languages which are used by over 80%.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Region = 'Baltic Countries' AND T2.Percentage > 80

question: What is the GNP of the country where district "Entre Rios" belongs?
original_query: SELECT T2.GNP FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.District = 'Entre Rios' LIMIT 1

question: What is the life expectancy of the countries that uses Japanese as their language?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.LifeExpectancy) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Japanese'

question: What is the local name of the country where "The Valley" city belongs?
original_query: SELECT T2.LocalName FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'The Valley'

question: What is the form of government that the city of Manila has?
original_query: SELECT T1.GovernmentForm FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name = 'Manila'

question: Which country have conducted population census from 2010 until 2012 and have completed vital registration?
original_query: SELECT ShortName, LongName FROM Country WHERE LatestPopulationCensus >= 2010 AND LatestPopulationCensus < 2013 AND VitalRegistrationComplete = 'Yes'

question: Mention the series code of countries using Australian dollar as their currency unit. Which country belongs to middle income group among them.
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryCode, T2.SeriesCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Australian dollar' AND T1.IncomeGroup = 'Lower middle income'

question: From 1960 to 1965, which country has the lowest value of indicator belongs to Health: Population: Structure?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE Value = ( SELECT MIN(T1.Value) FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T1.Year >= 1960 AND T1.Year < 1966 AND T2.Topic = 'Health: Population: Structure' )

question: What is the percentage of countries in the Middle East and North Africa that have finished reporting on their real external debt?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ExternalDebtReportingStatus = 'Actual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CountryCode) FROM Country WHERE region = 'Middle East & North Africa'

question: From 1968 to 1970, what are indicator names whose license type is open and values are less than 100?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.IndicatorName FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T1.Year >= 1968 AND T1.Year < 1971 AND T2.LicenseType = 'Open' AND T1.Value < 100

question: How many countries are using the same type of currency? Please list the short names of any 3 countries.
original_query: SELECT ShortName FROM country WHERE currencyunit = 'U.S. dollar' LIMIT 3

question: Which countries have notes on the indicator BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD?
original_query: SELECT T1.ShortName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T2.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T3.Seriescode = 'BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD'

question: How many countries have reached their Adjusted net national income per capita (constant 2005 US$) indicator value to more than 1,000 but have not finished their external debt reporting?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.CountryCode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Adjusted net national income per capita (constant 2005 US$)' AND T1.ExternalDebtReportingStatus = 'Preliminary' AND T2.Value > 1000

question: What's the description of the series code SM.POP.TOTL for Aruba?
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T2.Seriescode = 'SM.POP.TOTL'

question: Which country have the highest CO2 emissions in 1960?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE Year = 1960 AND IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions (metric tons per capita)' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of increase of the indicator on Adolescent fertility rate from 1960 to 1961 in the country whose Alpha2Code is 1A?
original_query: SELECT (( SELECT T2.Value FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' AND T2.Year = 1961 ) - ( SELECT T2.Value FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' AND T2.Year = 1960 )) * 1.0 / ( SELECT SUM(T2.Value) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' AND T2.Year = 1960 )

question: From 1961 to 1980, what was the highest percentage of land used for agriculture in the Republic of Benin?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T1.Value) FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Year >= 1961 AND T1.Year < 1981 AND T1.IndicatorName LIKE 'Agricultural land (% of land area)' AND T2.LongName = 'Republic of Benin'

question: In 1960, what is largest population for country with upper middle income?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.Value) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'Upper middle income' AND T2.Year = 1960 AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Population, total'

question: How many countries in the North America Region has completed the vital registration?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode) FROM Country WHERE VitalRegistrationComplete = 'Yes' AND Region = 'North America'

question: What country have the series code of SP.DYN.CBRT.IN?
original_query: SELECT T1.ShortName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.SeriesCode = 'SP.DYN.CBRT.IN'

question: How many countries have notes on the indicator Stocks traded, turnover ratio of domestic shares?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Countrycode)  FROM CountryNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.Seriescode = T2.SeriesCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Stocks traded, turnover ratio of domestic shares (%)'

question: What is the series note description of the series "SP.DYN.TO65.MA.ZS" which covers the topic "Health: Mortality" in 1967?
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Series AS T1 INNER JOIN SeriesNotes AS T2 ON T1.SeriesCode = T2.Seriescode WHERE T1.SeriesCode = 'SP.DYN.TO65.MA.ZS' AND T1.Topic = 'Health: Mortality' AND T2.Year = 'YR1967'

question: Name the country in which the topic is about Poverty: Shared Prosperity. Indicate the long name of the country.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.LongName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN footnotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T2.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T3.Topic = 'Poverty: Shared prosperity'

question: Please list the notes for Aruba on the indicators under the topic of Environment: Energy production & use.
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T2.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T3.Topic = 'Environment: Energy production & use'

question: What is the indicator code for Mobile Cellular Subscriptions of Brazil?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT IndicatorCode FROM Indicators WHERE CountryName = 'Brazil' AND IndicatorName = 'Mobile cellular subscriptions'

question: How many countries have a latest population census in 2011? Indicate their full names.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(LongName) FROM country WHERE LatestPopulationCensus = '2011' UNION ALL SELECT LongName FROM country WHERE LatestPopulationCensus = '2011'

question: Which European countries had the highest private expenditure on health in 2005? List the top ten countries in descending order and find the source of the data.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode, T3.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T3 ON T1.CountryCode = T3.Countrycode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Out-of-pocket health expenditure (% of private expenditure on health)' AND T2.Value > 0 AND T2.year = 2005 ORDER BY T2.Value DESC LIMIT 10

question: In which years does the country whose Alpha2Code is 1A have a result of the indicator Adolescent fertility rate?
original_query: SELECT T2.Year FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)'

question: What is the short name of the country in which the "Net bilateral aid flows from DAC donors, Sweden (current US$)" indicator hit the 570,000 value in 1970?
original_query: SELECT T2.ShortName FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName = 'Net bilateral aid flows FROM DAC donors, Sweden (current US$)' AND T1.Year = 1970 AND T1.Value = 570000

question: What are the sources for the data of children who finished primary school education in North American countries?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T3 ON T2.CountryCode = T3.Countrycode WHERE T1.Region = 'North America' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Out-of-school children of primary school age, both sexes (number)'

question: Name the countries' long name with national accounts base year prior to 1980.
original_query: SELECT LongName FROM Country WHERE NationalAccountsBaseYear < '1980' AND NationalAccountsBaseYear != ''

question: Mention the series code of countries using pound sterling as their currency unit. Which country belongs to high income group among them.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode, T1.CurrencyUnit, T1.IncomeGroup FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Pound sterling' AND T1.IncomeGroup LIKE '%high income%'

question: How many nations in East Asia and the Pacific have completed their external debt reporting on time?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode)  FROM Country WHERE Region = 'East Asia & Pacific' AND ExternalDebtReportingStatus = 'Estimate'

question: How many countries in Europe & Central Asia uses Danish krone as its currency? List the full names of those coutnries.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(longname) FROM country WHERE region = 'Europe & Central Asia' AND currencyunit = 'Danish krone' UNION SELECT longname FROM country WHERE currencyunit = 'Danish krone' AND region = 'Europe & Central Asia'

question: What is the description of the footnote on the series code AG.LND.FRST.K2 in 1990 for Aruba?
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T2.Seriescode = 'AG.LND.FRST.K2' AND T2.Year = 'YR1990'

question: Which countries in the upper middle income category still have unfinished external debt reporting? Please provide the country codes in your answer.
original_query: SELECT CountryCode FROM Country WHERE IncomeGroup = 'Upper middle income' AND ExternalDebtReportingStatus = 'Preliminary'

question: Which country has the smallest land area in square kilometers for 19 consecutive years starting from year 1961? Indicate how much is its land area in square kilometers in those years and the income group of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName, SUM(T1.Value) area, T2.IncomeGroup FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName = 'Land area (sq. km)' AND T1.Year >= 1961 AND T1.Year < 1980 GROUP BY T1.CountryCode ORDER BY SUM(T1.Value) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many countries have country note description as "Sources: UN Energy Statistics (2014)"? List the currency of these countries.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Countrycode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Sources: UN Energy Statistics (2014)' UNION SELECT DISTINCT t1.CurrencyUnit FROM country AS t1 INNER JOIN countrynotes AS t2 ON t1.CountryCode = t2.Countrycode WHERE t2.Description = 'Sources: UN Energy Statistics (2014)'

question: List the East Asia & Pacific countries which are under the High income: nonOECD group. Please include their alpha code.
original_query: SELECT CountryCode, Alpha2Code FROM Country WHERE Region = 'East Asia & Pacific' AND IncomeGroup = 'High income: nonOECD'

question: How many of the countries do not have special notes? List the long name.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(LongName) FROM Country WHERE SpecialNotes = '' UNION SELECT longname FROM country WHERE specialnotes = ''

question: How many footnotes did Aruba got on different series code in the year 2002?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.SeriesCode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T2.Year = 'YR2002'

question: In 1970, how many Middle Eastern & North African countries whose value for CO2 emissions from gaseous fuel consumption (kt) indicator is more than 600?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.CountryCode)  FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions FROM gaseous fuel consumption (kt)' AND T1.Year = 1970 AND T1.Value > 600

question: List all the country in East Asia & Pacific region that have more than 2000000 urban population in 1970.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Year = 1970 AND T1.Region = 'East Asia & Pacific' AND T2.Value > 2000000 AND t2.indicatorname = 'Urban population'

question: Which countries have a fertility rate between 4 and 5 in 1979? List their names.
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE Year = 1979 AND IndicatorName = 'Fertility rate, total (births per woman)' AND value >= 4 AND Value <= 5

question: What are the special notes for the country whose average adolescent fertility rate is the highest?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SpecialNotes FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Value = ( SELECT Value FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName LIKE 'Adolescent fertility rate%' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: How many annual indicators use the Sum aggregation method from 2001 to 2003?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.SeriesCode)  FROM Footnotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.Seriescode = T2.SeriesCode WHERE T1.Year IN ('YR2001', 'YR2002', 'YR2003') AND T2.Periodicity = 'Annual' AND T2.AggregationMethod = 'Sum'

question: How many low income countries are there in South Asia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode) FROM Country WHERE Region = 'South Asia' AND IncomeGroup = 'Low income'

question: Which country has the highest population in largest city for 19 consecutive years starting from 1960? Indicate the region to which the country is located.
original_query: SELECT T2.CountryCode, T2.Region FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName = 'Population in largest city' AND T1.Year >= 1960 AND T1.Year < 1980 ORDER BY T2.Region DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the years when countries have indicator name of "Air transport, passengers carried"? List the table name of these countries.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Year, T1.TableName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Air transport, passengers carried'

question: List the series code of country with country notes description as "Data sources : Eurostat" and state the Wb2Code of these countries.
original_query: SELECT T2.seriescode, T1.Wb2Code FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Data sources : Eurostat'

question: What's the value of the indicator whose long definition is "Adolescent fertility rate is the number of births per 1,000 women ages 15-19." for the Arab World in 1960?
original_query: SELECT T1.Value FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T1.CountryCode = T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.LongDefinition = 'Adolescent fertility rate is the number of births per 1,000 women ages 15-19.' AND T3.ShortName = 'Arab World' AND T1.Year = 1960

question: Mention the series code of countries using Hong Kong dollar as their currency unit.
original_query: SELECT T2.SeriesCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Hong Kong dollar'

question: What is the average adolescent fertility rate of the country whose Alpha2Code is 1A over the years this indicator was calculated.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Value) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName LIKE 'adolescent fertility rate%'

question: What is the note for Australia on the indicator SP.ADO.TFRT?
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Seriescode = 'SP.ADO.TFRT' AND T1.ShortName = 'Australia'

question: How many of the countries name start with alphabet A? List down the Alpha2Code of them.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ShortName) FROM Country WHERE ShortName LIKE 'A%' UNION SELECT alpha2code FROM country WHERE shortname LIKE 'A%'

question: Which country have data classified as official aid?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Data are classified as official aid.'

question: What country in the region of Sub-Saharan Africa has a series code of "SP.DYN.AMRT.FE"? Indicate the long name of the country
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.LongName FROM SeriesNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.SeriesCode = T2.Seriescode INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Countrycode = T3.CountryCode WHERE T3.Region = 'Sub-Saharan Africa' AND T1.SeriesCode = 'SP.DYN.AMRT.FE'

question: Name 5 country codes of country with highest value and state the region of these countries.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode, T1.Region FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T2.Value DESC LIMIT 5

question: Please provide the subject of series of Austria.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Topic FROM CountryNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Countrycode = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T1.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T2.ShortName = 'Austria'

question: Among the countries in the High income: OECD group whose currency unit is Euro, how many of them have a note on the series code SP.DYN.AMRT.FE?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Countrycode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'High income: OECD' AND T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Euro' AND T2.Seriescode = 'SP.DYN.AMRT.FE'

question: List out the country code and country name of the rich countries using Euro as their currency unit
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode, T2.CountryName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Euro' AND (T1.IncomeGroup = 'High income: OECD' OR T1.IncomeGroup = 'High income: nonOECD')

question: List down 10 country codes and it's short names.
original_query: SELECT CountryCode, ShortName FROM Country LIMIT 10

question: Please list out all annual indicator names of Sudan in 1961?
original_query: SELECT T1.IndicatorName FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T1.CountryName = 'Sudan' AND T1.Year = 1961 AND T2.Periodicity = 'Annual'

question: For the country that has notes on the indicator Inflation, consumer prices, in which region is it in?
original_query: SELECT T1.Region FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T2.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T3.IndicatorName = 'Inflation, consumer prices (annual %)'

question: Please write down the footnote descriptions of Albania in 1981.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Description FROM FootNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Countrycode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Year = 'YR1981' AND T2.ShortName = 'Albania'

question: How many countries uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode)  FROM Country WHERE SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology.'

question: Among the low income countries, which country has the lowest fertility rate?
original_query: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'Low income' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' ORDER BY T2.Value LIMIT 1

question: What portion of the nations in Latin America and the Caribbean had more than 50% of their land used for agriculture in 1961?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Value > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.CountryCode) FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Year = 1961 AND T2.Region = 'Latin America & Caribbean' AND indicatorname = 'Agricultural land (% of land area)'

question: Please list the indicator names of Arab World whose values are higher than 50 in 1960.
original_query: SELECT IndicatorName FROM Indicators WHERE CountryName = 'Arab World' AND Year = 1960 AND Value > 50

question: How many countries are having their country's footnotes described as "unspecified"? Please provide the full names of any three of those countries.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CountryCode)  FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Footnotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Unspecified' OR T2.Description = 'Not specified' UNION SELECT T1.LongName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Footnotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Unspecified' OR T2.Description = 'Not specified' LIMIT 4

question: How many country uses the 2008 System of National Accounts methodology? List our their table name.
original_query: SELECT TableName  FROM Country WHERE SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 2008 System of National Accounts methodology.'

question: What are the full names of the countries in South Asia that belongs to the low income group?
original_query: SELECT LongName FROM Country WHERE IncomeGroup = 'Low income' AND Region = 'South Asia'

question: Please list the Alpha2Codes of all the countries that have an indicator on Rural population in 1960.
original_query: SELECT T1.Alpha2Code FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Rural population' AND T2.Year = 1960

question: List down the World Bank code of the countries whose country note has described "Data source : Human Mortality Database by University of California, Berkeley, and Max Planck Institute for Demographic Research."? Please include their lending category.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Wb2code, T1.LendingCategory FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Data source : Human Mortality Database by University of California, Berkeley, and Max Planck Institute for Demographic Research.' AND T1.LendingCategory != ''

question: What are the footnote description of Finland in year 2000?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.TableName = 'Finland' AND T2.Year = 'YR2000'

question: Which country has had the highest proportion of CO2 emissions from transport?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName LIKE 'CO2 emissions FROM transport%' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the agregation method for the indicator whose value is 133 in 1960 for the Arab World?
original_query: SELECT T2.AggregationMethod FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T1.CountryCode = T3.CountryCode WHERE T3.ShortName = 'Arab World' AND T1.Value = 133 AND T1.Year = 1960

question: What is the agricultural land area in sq. km of Italy in 1968?
original_query: SELECT Value FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName = 'Agricultural land (sq. km)' AND Year = 1968 AND CountryName = 'Italy'

question: What is the average value of Adolescent fertility rate in the country whose Alpha2Code is 1A?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.Value) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Year) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)'

question: Please list the full names of any three countries that have their series code with a description of UN Energy Statistics (2014).
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.LongName FROM CountryNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Countrycode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Description = 'Sources: UN Energy Statistics (2014)' LIMIT 3

question: What percentage of countries in South Asia have the Life expectancy at birth, female (years) greater than 50?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.value > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CountryCode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Region = 'South Asia' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Life expectancy at birth, female (years)'

question: What is the series code for Germany and what is its description?
original_query: SELECT T1.Seriescode, T1.Description FROM CountryNotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.ShortName = 'Germany'

question: Please list annual indicator names which have values of more than 100 in 1965.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.IndicatorName FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T1.Year = 1965 AND T1.Value > 100 AND T2.Periodicity = 'Annual'
